name: Voter Action Project Georgia
subject: A loophole to get around elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=]
Bolts: After a Judge’s Death, Renewed Scrutiny for a Georgia Loophole That Can Nullify Elections [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=]
A quick story, Team: After losing an election race last year, a Georgia State Court Judge turned to a loophole in state law that could have erased the result and blocked the winner from taking office.
We're not making this up. In Georgia, if judges announce they’ll quit at some point before the end of their term, they hand the governor the ability to choose their replacement for the next two years. Even if an election was about to be held for their seat, that race gets canceled and kicked years down the road. Even if an election for their seat has already happened , a judge could still resign after they’ve lost, giving the governor the power to make an appointment that would nullify the result.
Looking to trigger this rule after losing his nonpartisan runoff, conservative Georgia State Court Judge Stephen Yekel told Governor Brian Kemp in a Dec. 6 letter that he intended to resign effective Dec. 30, just one day before his term was set to end. Kemp rejected his resignation letter, thankfully, but that doesn't mean a more cynical governor would do the same in the future.
Opponents of voting rights will take ANY opportunity to silence the will of the people and hold onto their power. We need to fight to close this loophole in Georgia and similar loopholes around the country.
Voter suppression comes in all forms, Team, both in Georgia and nationally. Step up and defend our right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15.00&tknfa=sX09NTEAk1hkVf9f91yKRjlfvaWKvwaOngemLwEic34=&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&tknfa=sX09NTEAk1hkVf9f91yKRjlfvaWKvwaOngemLwEic34=&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50.00&tknfa=sX09NTEAk1hkVf9f91yKRjlfvaWKvwaOngemLwEic34=&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100.00&tknfa=sX09NTEAk1hkVf9f91yKRjlfvaWKvwaOngemLwEic34=&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250.00&tknfa=sX09NTEAk1hkVf9f91yKRjlfvaWKvwaOngemLwEic34=&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=]
While Kemp didn’t give in this time , he has used the loophole to postpone or cancel other judicial elections, though state observers say he has never done so to block a winner after an election has already taken place, only before elections.
But that doesn't mean it won't happen in the future, either with him or another governor. In fact, Kemp had a direct hand in the controversial 2020 maneuver that effectively created the loophole in its current form and gave him the authority to cancel judicial elections.
“ You’re creating an opportunity to bypass an election, ” Sara Tindall Ghazal, a member of the Georgia Board of Elections, said. “ If the judge or the governor doesn’t like the outcome of the election, there’s this opportunity to encourage the incumbent to resign and then fill the seat. ”
Georgia needs stricter legal guidelines now. Our fundamental right to vote needs defending across the country. Our democracy is too important to let these petty dictators, MAGA sycophants, and conspiracy theorists stay in control.
We have to start working now to defend our democracy in next year's elections. Chip in $25 or more right now to join the fight for our rights before it's too late >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=8YDNqLoIpOqeh28NnGO3jYtNRAvDXAKZETAuk1t4OxaXEcGDRTRu8vYDrHTmLBHugG06Lt+YDMTRealEgvPCSoolejPD3ldllKQkAtki0FU=]

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=wscBvNZsns2PkL72snqndtmnaXGhkayaVyPYNoKqe6%2BkoyRG%2FG9cV7hwixy9CO%2FHzAel6h0ge3zB7vIJtLmzAoUUVIKONNu3A7igx%2BlXAVvk712ZUGPgsPb88WSVY3ukz3q4SoPUrJprAu2L0t%2BL6ZXyN4Px7MCmkH6sq5KQNo1R%2FlJ2zndhQw1WwyqMt4jWPIxmAOBzDuUSM%2BNO61N8X7TV7UsxG4W0PYal8zS5saqLvkpBBNA1TNYhfHyVLD2%2FoEQpBBKuKLQ8U6zhStc%2FxzTNVbRYTpzV5oH2WydLzuMe6wSy44gt2T8INa1%2BikGLhGKq17zF7m%2BuQkXMSXaqAgTcVDtqoky4VMVyv3cNVZAQLQovPInXSI6nWR0xrZ7yTNyqMo0WC7aO97NspAenjja%2F4mbWx6N%2FSVsmgma6DCM%3D .

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Grieving for our girls.
body:
We reached our first campaign milestone.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0d25e5af7e1a/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6420368?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.

---
|
# Grieving for our girls.
# Last Sunday, I walked into my church and our Girl Scouts were lined up as greeters and ushers before they headed to a week long sleep away camp. We received communion that morning and for the first time in a long time I knelt at the alter and quietly cried. The catastrophe experienced by residents, families and young campers last week in Kerr County is truly unspeakable. And the immediate blame game that ensued is all that is wrong with the over politicization of well, everything.
# Consider supporting the Kerr County Relief Fund through the [Community Foundation of the Texas Hill Country](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=687cd60406&e=edbde6c9b1), the [local Red Cross](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f22b55a331&e=edbde6c9b1), or [World Central Kitchen ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f9b73c6b99&e=edbde6c9b1)

|
**The budget bill passed, now what?**|
Big cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, Obamacare subsidies, and more are scheduled to land AFTER the midterm elections in late 2026 and beyond In hopes that Republican Representatives will be reelected before the pain hits, but tax breaks for the wealthy will be immediate. So what’s next?
Organizations like the ACLU or a state attorney general can file a lawsuit to block its harmful effects. Under federal law, they can challenge a new statute if they can show it violates the Constitution or federal protections.
**What can we do right now?****•Watch closely to see which group files first.****•Share their updates on social media to spread awareness.****•Support their legal fight with donations; legal challenges are costly but powerful.****•Keep contacting your federal representatives to register your opposition.**
**CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVES** Ralph Norman 202 225 5501 William Timmons 202 225 6030
---
| **This week’s Frogmore Stew substack is an op-ed by Billy Webster** _I’ve never been one to mince words about Congressman William Timmons (R, South Carolina, 4th District). Our political philosophies rarely, if ever, align—particularly when it comes to the lawless conduct of President Trump, whom Timmons continues to support. But for all our differences, I’ve given him credit where it’s due: on the critical issue of our national debt, we’ve shared a common concern. Until now. Timmons has betrayed not just his stated convictions, but the economic future of the very country he claims to protect. And in doing so, he’s reminded us all why words without principle are worth nothing._

clean_body: We reached our first campaign milestone. | | | | | | | | | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate. | Grieving for our girls. Last Sunday, I walked into my church and our Girl Scouts were lined up as greeters and ushers before they headed to a week long sleep away camp. We received communion that morning and for the first time in a long time I knelt at the alter and quietly cried. The catastrophe experienced by residents, families and young campers last week in Kerr County is truly unspeakable. And the immediate blame game that ensued is all that is wrong with the over politicization of well, everything. name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: If you’re feeling disheartened, you’re not alone.
body:
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=678%2E2563979%2E1WefSB)

Peter – If you’re feeling disheartened, you’re not alone.
The constant barrage of terrible news is enough to make anyone want to look the other way. But even in these dark times, you still have power to make a difference.
**Today, you can join thousands of others who care about the future of this country through one small act toward a better tomorrow.**
Here’s the deal:
Right now, Republicans are strategizing on how best to hold onto power for years to come.
They’re making decisions on which elections to prioritize, how much money to spend, and where they’ll face the toughest challenges.
A huge part of that comes from fundraising. They look to FEC reports and donations to emails like this one to see how much pushback they’ll get from enacting their extreme Project 2025 agenda.
They want to know how much Democratic energy is out there, and if we’re willing to fight back even when the odds are stacked against us.
The same thing is happening at the Democratic National Committee. The DNC is scaling up now to flip the House and Senate blue next year, and they’re looking at donations like yours to make important decisions for the future.
So your donation today matters. It sends a clear message to Republicans that they’re going to pay the political price for their actions, and it helps the DNC prepare to win big.
**Early and consistent donations are the best way you can make a difference now. So we’re respectfully asking:**
[**Please make a donation to the Democratic National Committee today. The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself. When you join the thousands of other Democrats donating right now, it all adds up to show that there’s plenty of energy to take on the Trump administration and Republicans across the country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250708&refcode2=678_2563979_1WefSB&akid=678%2E2563979%2E1WefSB)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Off the Sidelines PAC
subject: The truth about the big, beautiful bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
Donald Trump won’t stop spreading lies about his so-called “big, beautiful bill” that he signed into law last week. But what will the GOP’s reconciliation bill _actually_ do? Give us 60 seconds to explain and share how you can break down the bill’s reality for your friends and family. Here’s what Trump doesn’t want you to know about it: 1️⃣ Trump’s 2017 massive tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy are now _permanent_ 2️⃣ To offset the cost, **Republicans are making the largest cut to Medicaid and food assistance in American history** 3️⃣ Lower-income households, seniors and kids are bearing the brunt of the bill’s consequences — while the top 20% earners stand to benefit the most 4️⃣ The bill is as cruel as it is unpopular **— 55% of registered voters oppose it** 5️⃣ **And zero Democrats voted for it,** while the vast majority of Republicans in Congress fell in line and voted **yes** **_TLDR;_** Democrats are fighting to lower costs and protect healthcare for working families. Republicans are willing to throw you under the bus to prop up billionaires. Every Republican member of Congress who voted for this bill needs to answer for the devastating cuts they made to the benefits millions of Americans rely on to survive. That’s why we’re asking for your help.
**[_Can you help us spread the word about the consequences of this bill? Your support today will get us closer to taking back the House and Senate so we can stop Trump’s MAGA agenda in its tracks. Give us 60 seconds to explain and share how you can break down the bill’s reality for your friends and family. Here’s what Trump doesn’t want you to know about it: 1️⃣ Trump’s 2017 massive tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy are now permanent 2️⃣ To offset the cost, Republicans are making the largest cut to Medicaid and food assistance in American history 3️⃣ Lower-income households, seniors and kids are bearing the brunt of the bill’s consequences — while the top 20% earners stand to benefit the most 4️⃣ The bill is as cruel as it is unpopular — 55% of registered voters oppose it 5️⃣ And zero Democrats voted for it, while the vast majority of Republicans in Congress fell in line and voted yes TLDR; Democrats are fighting to lower costs and protect healthcare for working families. Republicans are willing to throw you under the bus to prop up billionaires. Every Republican member of Congress who voted for this bill needs to answer for the devastating cuts they made to the benefits millions of Americans rely on to survive. That’s why we’re asking for your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Off the Sidelines will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for staying informed and joining the fight. — Off the Sidelines PAC © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: This bill is a blueprint for austerity
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250708-1417-foote&t=1001&akid=1417%2E342411%2E9YkblD ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Last week, President Trump signed the so-called “One Big Beautiful Bill”
into law — a sweeping tax and spending package that hands out $4.5
trillion in tax breaks, mostly to billionaires and giant corporations.
Meanwhile, working families get crumbs... and cuts.

From steep Medicaid cuts and SNAP restrictions, to rollbacks on green
energy programs and more, this bill is a blueprint for austerity.

It’s simple: While Republicans celebrate tax breaks for their billionaire
donors, our communities are left fighting for scraps. They’re rigging the
system to keep us powerless.

That’s why the Squad Victory Fund exists.

While the Squad is holding the line in Congress, we’re building a bench of
unapologetic progressives ready to stand shoulder to shoulder with working
families. But we can’t build this movement without grassroots power.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250708-movement.pxC-Jl&refcode=em20250708-1417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1417%2E342411%2E9YkblD ]Chip in $3 to stand our ground, speak out, and help
elect progressive champions who will fight for our rights rather than
exploit working families.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250708-movement.pxC-Jl&refcode=em20250708-1417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1417%2E342411%2E9YkblD ]Contribute ››

Let’s end billionaire tax scams — and fight for a future where everyone
thrives.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

I 'm here to defend our Constitution--and expose the truth. 🔻 Abolish the ATF and protect the Second Amendment 🔻 Uncover fraud and corruption through the DOGE Subcommittee 🔻 Expose Biden's swamp holdovers and demand accountability I sit on the Oversight Committee, the House Freedom Caucus, and the DOGE Subcommittee. But I need backup. The Left is salivating to flip the House--and stop Trump in his tracks. HOW YOU CAN HELP I'm not taking orders from lobbyists. 🔥 Your fuels this mission 🔥 Your support powers the investigations and field operations 🔥 Your voice helps us hold the House--and take the fight to the next level Will you chip in before tonight 's deadline? 👇 RUSH A DONATION TO TEAM BURLISON 👇 We have the House. We have the White House. Now let's finish the job--for the people. For America, Congressman Eric Burlison Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. Independence Ave. #1007 Springfield, MO 65807 "Eric Burlison for Congress"

name: Cynthia Lummis
subject: The majority is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjmn2kcb639i1rq6a7gdclle9337s2r9rmsil7eo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)

Dear Friend,
I've spent my life fighting for Wyoming -- because this is my home. I was born and raised on a cattle ranch in Laramie County, and my roots here run deep.

I know what it means to work hard, live free, and take pride in where you come from. That's the Wyoming way -- and it's exactly what I've taken with me to Washington.

From my years in the State Legislature to serving as your U.S. Senator, I've never stopped fighting to protect the values that make Wyoming strong and America great.

Whether it's securing our borders, defending the Second Amendment, or creating good-paying jobs, **[I've always put Wyoming and America first.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zelpk80nf9vl4g65vsb9s8fd720hstpm2tv72gjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)**

As Chair of the Senate Western Caucus and a member of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, I pushed back against the Biden administration's extreme agenda -- especially when it came to reckless spending, anti-energy mandates, and efforts to lock up our lands.

I've fought to protect our coal, oil, gas, and uranium industries, because I know how vital they are -- not just to Wyoming's economy, but to America's future.

This year, I've also been fighting to cut red tape, secure our border, and lead on crypto policy that protects innovation and freedom. _**[I'm in the Senate to make Washington work for Wyoming -- not the other way around.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3d3gc15jdd25oo1cqn7lrera2msrcsd7lul3joo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)**_

_But now, our work is under serious threat._

**[Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0evhroa6d0dkkodcesqtb98j362lnghnr9dl198_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)** They know that without the Senate, they can't ram through their radical agenda.

That's why they're pouring money into races across the country -- including right here in the West -- trying to tip the balance of power in their favor.

_**[We can't let that happen.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zts6uobqnsniva2gfa31b5s78dik6cfm1on8sjro_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)**_

If we lose our Senate majority, we lose the ability to block dangerous policies and stand up for the freedoms we hold dear. **[That's why I'm asking for your help today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbr82ae776g3t199mhs93gi3lmqspnou9h3gnaa0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)**

**[Will you chip in to help us hold the line and defend our Senate majority?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z44js3fpd4ga15h2nd3pgkrb95ekcv1iifofscs0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs) [Every dollar you give will go directly toward fighting back against the Left's assault on our values and helping me continue to be a voice for America First priorities in Washington.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za9gnv8sbs77h95frob12m4vnp95fgolpab4lkv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)**

[Chip in $10](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv1rlplokm1899v96brq36u9gqft3regqc2uitl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)

[Chip in $25](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt25cjaudi2kt5tq2cfp13ts9mo4hi221qfp3qmo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)

[Chip in any amount](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zesu6p09d75kequ5tklcn52vq9e14k8i83jd1ne0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)

I'm not in this fight for headlines or personal gain. I'm in it because I love Wyoming and America -- and because I believe that with the right leadership, our best days are still ahead.

Thank you for standing with me.

With gratitude,

Cynthia Lummis
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuh6140sjfvbhdp84j6nrjpcnr2b0q1cr9ot08u8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)
United States Senator - Wyoming
[Chip in any amount](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm9326pchal2rfql39m3tj7m77nuanstqgvkfe00_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)

** **

| Paid for by the NRSC.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.NRSC.org](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoff00lfesaqhbakoeet73sso78arj6ku47al578_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs)

---

---

---
President Trump’s border czar, Tom Homan, has officially sounded the alarm.
---

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziab94le1vjti2oqbi0hfkp1luaj8q8lfcjbhlug_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1imaoj6clh2bs) **_“I think [the Biden] administration thought these millions of people were going to be future Democratic voters. subject: Fighting, and I need you with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z48m8c8ic5v44nk0jtlk4sir46ncoou5ggfq0d80_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)

Dear Friend,
I've spent my life fighting for Wyoming -- because this is my home. I was born and raised on a cattle ranch in Laramie County, and my roots here run deep.

I know what it means to work hard, live free, and take pride in where you come from. That's the Wyoming way -- and it's exactly what I've taken with me to Washington.

From my years in the State Legislature to serving as your U.S. Senator, I've never stopped fighting to protect the values that make Wyoming strong and America great.

Whether it's securing our borders, defending the Second Amendment, or creating good-paying jobs, **[I've always put Wyoming and America first.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjojpk6m12al84h4k2ckdgbv8fh5pjhsf2r93ah0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)**

As Chair of the Senate Western Caucus and a member of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, I pushed back against the Biden administration's extreme agenda -- especially when it came to reckless spending, anti-energy mandates, and efforts to lock up our lands.

I've fought to protect our coal, oil, gas, and uranium industries, because I know how vital they are -- not just to Wyoming's economy, but to America's future.

This year, I've also been fighting to cut red tape, secure our border, and lead on crypto policy that protects innovation and freedom. _**[I'm in the Senate to make Washington work for Wyoming -- not the other way around.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1oqbd7p6ss8uip2rlnm49k514g3a2gbp4q5dakg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)**_

_But now, our work is under serious threat._

**[Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt86gj2s7n9dpv3f8ifajgdkerk8tn25sdkcm250_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)** They know that without the Senate, they can't ram through their radical agenda.

That's why they're pouring money into races across the country -- including right here in the West -- trying to tip the balance of power in their favor.

_**[We can't let that happen.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhd98hhk2beoknfg2s7li7i5csmnvbspciq0d7e0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)**_

If we lose our Senate majority, we lose the ability to block dangerous policies and stand up for the freedoms we hold dear. **[That's why I'm asking for your help today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqsq48rjs6fs8uclu753k38p9e7ng8std4uvm5oo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)**

**[Will you chip in to help us hold the line and defend our Senate majority?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4qu9oa3j4048qgtbi44pl27s2s5oircfbol431o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs) [Every dollar you give will go directly toward fighting back against the Left's assault on our values and helping me continue to be a voice for America First priorities in Washington.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgf9okk9mgqsovbl4d1gjok218il1ogocdg6tlo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)**

[Chip in $10](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqe1298emo46ibpc6q6u76ck8md6t3msuojiqdp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)

[Chip in $25](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zngi2hd5kdqr1vqi9fkk4f6kb0m5q8nu7i7u1fg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)

[Chip in any amount](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7p6pt9c542j0os8pk6vfbcno2q1hnv450i88vc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)

I'm not in this fight for headlines or personal gain. I'm in it because I love Wyoming and America -- and because I believe that with the right leadership, our best days are still ahead.

Thank you for standing with me.

With gratitude,

Cynthia Lummis
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsbbh90u1i1ttfv8gctrkeo7c99r15c31lt20uso_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)

name: Congressman Ryan Zinke
subject: This is not what I hoped for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
Can I tell you why?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0pa6cj0jom1c9bej05foalu8oh2pgq6cvq7puu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)Friend, I honestly expected more. I'm not angry, I'm just disappointed.

A few days ago, I sent out the signal calling on every conservative patriot in the nation to rescue my campaign from the Democrat vultures trying to take me out. But nothing happened...
No cavalry came. I was left to fight the Democratic Party by myself. I feared the worst.
But then I remembered, YOU never let us down, Friend. You are the reason for our historic victory last year, and you would never turn your back on me.

I served as President Trump's Secretary of the Interior and was the Ground Forces Commander for SEAL Team 6. For the past four years, I've been at the forefront of fighting Joe Biden's disastrous agenda and passing President Trump's plan. Needless to say, I'm as conservative as they come.
The truth is, my team is hours away from a critical fundraising goal that could make or break my campaign. Democrats have spent millions in the past to destroy me, and you can guarantee that they'll spend millions more to slander my good name and take me out.

If we miss this goal, it could be game over for us. You wouldn't let that happen, would you?
[If you're a rock-ribbed conservative just like me, then I'm asking you to step up and chip in to help us reach our critical goal.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj523p8pf1bpmlpt1ri93cu7ghkplkinrorm6qdg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)[CHIP IN NOW
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z24sqec1bbtseg3v601egbchns5306g2tq4bt6lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)[HELP US REACH OUR GOAL
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmsobkqnp4fpt90a0aoqu8dd4upmo5cqkeqjs2og_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im6p36c1h2bs)Thank you for your support, Friend.
\- Congressman Ryan Zinke| | Paid for by Zinke for Congress

name: American Action News
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuookr712l0mfuf3aalfekkr6lnrk0sps4h5jfd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im9pr6cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0r0fm4feftt0fmrh84v0obovvp33tgoj8k2pebg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im9pr6cph2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3kmh6l6kn3h1kc2g5rujsq6gur136ptdlbug050_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im9pr6cph2bs)
---
| | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znhfqi8ksdni94gtjj25o8sjos9mjmvjv2qb73q8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im9pr6cph2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsbt9cq2drbjj1lhh2o27nuosegpn6sijcavodag_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1im9pr6cph2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---

Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4gm1q1q3uq66rlamk0u9ugjdiifo03pkbn2n230_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1hmcpj6chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztfp5g1a1n2erh3jktokcfj4fkr7utnpeqjvddgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1hmcpj6chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoplumo3bb185pcl6fg36it6bsb0iu906q5424k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1hmcpj6chh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztjnfu2fobirdd47imi96hopj1lilveii7fmkbh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1hmcpj6chh2bs)**
---

name: Team Downing
subject: Do you support the National Farm Security Action Plan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We’re protecting our nation’s most treasured industry.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-LTjeRBw)Peter,
_American farms are under attack. __
__The Biden Administration failed to act. __
__But President Trump and his team are fighting back._
Under Secretary Brooke Rollins’ bold leadership, the **_National Farm Security Action Plan_** is restoring strength to our food systems, defending American farmland from foreign adversaries, and declaring once and for all.
**_Farm security is national security._**
China and other hostile nations are trying to buy up U.S. farmland, infiltrate our research labs, and exploit our food supply. Enough is enough.
**This plan puts America First by:**
✅ _Blocking foreign land ownership_ ✅ _Defending our food supply from bio-threats_ ✅ _Cracking down on fraud in nutrition programs_ ✅ _Protecting American agricultural innovation_
The radical Left won’t like it, but patriotic Americans know the truth: if we can’t feed ourselves, we can’t defend ourselves.
__Stand with President Trump. Stand with our farmers. Stand for America.__
[ Sign now to support the National Farm Security Action Plan:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Z4MxpmL7bmGpU2WT_neWA)[ADD YOUR NAME IN SUPPORT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Thank you,
Team Downing| |

name: The Flyover
subject: Airport Shoe Rule Ends, Tough Love Coach, and Firework Donuts
body:
Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem announced Tuesday that air travelers in the U.S. will [no longer be required to remove their shoes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAQBeCnwR0WDMY_BUWkyN1G6VJaGMb2RBhWwO7Kbx85um9w6xkdne_8eSwPS4Hi_sueaOqWloifErBWzIul_Ey5liNhfgXE6EtNr_0ICwjQXAxcTIu3FK6la7zZEAFVg0YOGoTWg9bNYdCOcpIKegmjW1Eo3W2dHbVQq_PjKhsyd5oYxCSFmKRq-x78tG79plYn0CLrBHqqKbd_E8V64Bau9MbcunQ2wRy1PgtTPxjMDGa7ulvQ7uk-M5h_p0CVXGEwH-nEYKPnBd0rU734TeKnjd7WlC9-S3nGM71t4F96XlxGjBR3BnO535iayTP1U4LSo5S6b7Lxzw-FQKUfWCf201L4365-a9K3gX8BAAD__4dfjR4) at TSA checkpoints, a rule that has been in place since 2006.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAQBeCnMV0ixz8YFy5WitJl2y0tgweYlY2RGRLl7Vdko3sf4LbnmxmNzp-7vwdMuEy_QwZHY_ELPLcERFB9wLqWSttcoO4JYIkblX2akxdc6BM3J259DJheXjXRjQACZAPuYrTgWhutm9mpvreD7IyRojdKKd6pQelog-yU7bRo0B3XuOH2wrm9yHPbimj7sR1lP3AIwBSHiFTq-W_BhWYY06s8oJ6HkpvkZqJ1Y_IXEzcmbjTDWvb69lKn_8ln4ZiQt52y38peB2Dy-iXtEWeIuGcmr98lfGQIeQ04LYcFwrKE1FQX1yemhFtrmOJTDpjeP9GPinw48S8AAP__642Kfg) | |
# Wednesday, July 9, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1846, during the Mexican-American War, U.S. forces raised the [American flag over Yerba Buena (now San Francisco)](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGnwRsRxmDigeEu3nLXjhaBQzgthghOkubtK_cVOn76pN_w_7hsF4cZy-2_28FSrFuBV89ABG1z2O61UU8V2iMDlNCpPm4pb1JIzYXhYtmCw_ze1BBsBJAwDWBHo6XQ2mg9pGOcz8p45Y0R58X4OchRTW7y-qqMVgPaQxNGLKMQyzid5lmG5RrnOF29AAdMCQhItZ0-KxZKEPO7PqGdfN2HbBPRvbPpH5Mrk2twbywJOx0vk-uDd07uCzrvrvDYXPHYfeWx1Z3v8I2-MrkOzYb7C3PGPhumxG13mH99-lOUp5U_AQAA__9Rf3bO), marking the beginning of U.S. control over the area, which had previously been part of Mexico. After nearly 20 years of barefoot shuffles through airport security, the TSA is finally [phasing out its shoes-off rule](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAQBeCnwR0WDMY_BUWkyN1G6VJaGMb2RBhWwO7Kbx85um9w6xkdne_8eSwPS4Hi_sueaOqWloifErBWzIul_Ey5liNhfgXE6EtNr_0ICwjQXAxcTIu3FK6la7zZEAFVg0YOGoTWg9bNYdCOcpIKegmjW1Eo3W2dHbVQq_PjKhsyd5oYxCSFmKRq-x78tG79plYn0CLrBHqqKbd_E8V64Bau9MbcunQ2wRy1PgtTPxjMDGa7ulvQ7uk-M5h_p0CVXGEwH-nEYKPnBd0rU734TeKnjd7WlC9-S3nGM71t4F96XlxGjBR3BnO535iayTP1U4LSo5S6b7Lxzw-FQKUfWCf201L4365-a9K3gX8BAAD__4dfjR4). ## Supreme Court Greenlights Federal Layoffs
The Supreme Court on Tuesday gave the [green light for President Trump to proceed with mass layoffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFuhCAURb8Gdxh8CI4LFk0ad9N016VBeSgN-gzgmPn7ZuYXur65N_ecn_t4tyGGffmyG5riadzxyhFLwTTakA5KJa-E6YyIu8uFzmWNIwhQXHRc9KOzIT7HtnLGIwLKCk3TKRBKdUpVq9GNtw56oSfVaD8LdFMLfW-hnSbb3KAK5rUmOtE3QvSNrLUG109eeznNAi2yVqALhVL9S2EvK_r4pAemeqatimYt5chMfjAYGAx2ml8E9UKvmMHwTTGUMGcGQz6PhBvymc5UuI2RrsxLOreDb_RA7ildNjl-RLtnvtn8LhVKTyaH4Jj8bECqm-7krUrGHVeIMWTdsVYsmw3xfaj8y-LDwF8AAAD__6IoiGI) and a sweeping reorganization of federal agencies. In a brief, unsigned order, the justices lifted a lower court's block, saying the administration is likely within its legal rights to move forward, though individual agency plans can still be challenged later. The move clears the path to overhaul 21 agencies, including Commerce, Energy, and HHS. [Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson dissented](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvgzAQBeBfYzaiy4EhDB66sKVrR2TwGbs6MLKPRPn3Vdqf0Pl7ek96X_fpbiPHff20GxnxadrpWZhEKE825iNlKSFRPplod0XSuQaeEFDX0NcwTM5Gfk1t5YwnQmoqMtdeI2jda10FQw1461po594NiMsNgRBwAI1Oz_OtiubdBj0MV4Dh2ly6Dt0w-8438wJkSbVALkrKl-8Udwnk-ZUelC9L2io2QeQoqvlQOCocJVCIzG9TOGZaT7YS065wXNKZpZ6tCFNROOpmAN13dTmPTBvVfy753I56s6XUbF_J-3e0ysYdz8gcS9erFtbNxt-NSv512sPgTwAAAP__SM6CaA), calling the decision "senseless" and warning of unchecked executive power.
## AI Voice Mimics Marco Rubio in Global Scam
A fake voice generated by AI was used to [impersonate Secretary of State Marco Rubio](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAURL_GdH4y9jM8ChdEEUqKTZMiJTL2NdzI-BLbLNq_j9hf2G6kkY5mzp-3-c1ixLT-sjuYGmhOcJUItUKeLeaDci0bQT4jQPKl0rlucZZCai56LobZW4wf87PxJgBIUA2YttdSaN1r3WxGdMq2Fl7dU79CEBokDF68lPIhOOuGBs1NE70YWiGGVj26TvphCV1QixNggT0FeKyUH38JU90gxA96h_xwtDfRbLUehamRyYnJ6bqux17S3TE5QeJnYXK6TzE5HRSxortjPhckjvsBuVCylTI_C3hukWPizsZYeCUeKAOuie-YsFTIhTu7ROBlo0-izXwc259u_PGPqYkceqa-f7t9wlV-Qz6abPxxYYxYup49xbpbjJ_L65d0vxv5PwAA__8mApfx) in calls and messages to at least three foreign ministers and two U.S. officials, according to a State Department cable seen by the media. The imposter used the Signal app in mid-June, leaving voicemails and texts in an apparent [effort to extract sensitive information](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbHOnDAQhJ_GdHvy2RhCQXFRhJTiT5Mi6dAeXmAjYyN7D3RvH_G_wt-NNNKMvpk_H-MHcuC4_MKNepnTGOksgUQoj8h5T1nKmii_AlH0RdJrWcNotHGgW9Dd6JHDe6wr389EhmxF_b11RjvXOlet_Teyra81tsb7zvq5cR1O2tXGOnI1PSvurzTd6u6udXe3t6YxvnvOzWyfkyYkVWvyLCnf_iWOstIc3umgfJvSVoV-FdmLsg9lBmWG8zxvW4mXp8xAEV5FmeGCUmbYU2Dh6ZIYARmOxBMBbzvlkiIKedgwTwny68kJOMJGpeBCBSTByssKgQ4KkOaZJ8ZQoAgKgacds2wUBQq-PwsyPB73n57-BmWHNLFX9sf3a2k6y2_Ke5V7v58cApemVbVeNuTwySRfOuLozf8AAAD__99DoXU). Officials believe the actor had detailed knowledge of State Department protocols and warned diplomatic posts to stay alert for similar hoaxes.
## Homeland Security Ends Shoes-Off Airport Rule
Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem announced Tuesday that air travelers in the U.S. will [no longer be required to remove their shoes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAQBeCnwR0WDMY_BUWkyN1G6VJaGMb2RBhWwO7Kbx85um9w6xkdne_8eSwPS4Hi_sueaOqWloifErBWzIul_Ey5liNhfgXE6EtNr_0ICwjQXAxcTIu3FK6la7zZEAFVg0YOGoTWg9bNYdCOcpIKegmjW1Eo3W2dHbVQq_PjKhsyd5oYxCSFmKRq-x78tG79plYn0CLrBHqqKbd_E8V64Bau9MbcunQ2wRy1PgtTPxjMDGa7ulvQ7uk-M5h_p0CVXGEwH-nEYKPnBd0rU734TeKnjd7WlC9-S3nGM71t4F96XlxGjBR3BnO535iayTP1U4LSo5S6b7Lxzw-FQKUfWCf201L4365-a9K3gX8BAAD__4dfjR4) at TSA checkpoints, a rule that has been in place since 2006. _"We expect this change will drastically decrease passenger wait times at our TSA checkpoints, leading to a more pleasant and efficient passenger experience,"_[Noem said](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAQRb8GM622FdGA4CVm89INqZ6hFbYYsYDR8u-33F_Y5Ib31DlfD_MgH_y2_qc367JEs_GZA5fCyZBPe0wlu8jpE5g3m0v8rC4YBJQ1qBomY8mHy_SV1QszclexbpVEkFJJWTlNyo697EhJ6AYcmVrbjq2VPT2JeMDK6_sNFEwtwNR2zTCgnZ7LsHTPFzCx6IGtLzE139FvxfESrnhwal7xXQXtStmz6P4JnAXO53k21uVmjYfA-ZYRON8AgTOoe0aBs3W55s3Wt1quS6KDQ73H4F9XlbTdTx-Cz4MSPaxv8uEXVf7U59D4EwAA___vIXkI). The policy is already active at major airports like LAX and LaGuardia, with full rollout expected soon. The move follows years of criticism over the effectiveness and inconvenience of the "shoes-off" mandate, first imposed after the 2001 shoe bombing attempt.

Stay informed with the news while remaining focused on Christ with | Supreme Court Greenlights Federal Layoffs The Supreme Court on Tuesday gave the and a sweeping reorganization of federal agencies. In a brief, unsigned order, the justices lifted a lower court's block, saying the administration is likely within its legal rights to move forward, though individual agency plans can still be challenged later. The move clears the path to overhaul 21 agencies, including Commerce, Energy, and HHS. , calling the decision "senseless" and warning of unchecked executive power. AI Voice Mimics Marco Rubio in Global Scam A fake voice generated by AI was used to in calls and messages to at least three foreign ministers and two U.S. officials, according to a State Department cable seen by the media. The imposter used the Signal app in mid-June, leaving voicemails and texts in an apparent . Officials believe the actor had detailed knowledge of State Department protocols and warned diplomatic posts to stay alert for similar hoaxes. Homeland Security Ends Shoes-Off Airport Rule Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem announced Tuesday that air travelers in the U.S. will at TSA checkpoints, a rule that has been in place since 2006. "We expect this change will drastically decrease passenger wait times at our TSA checkpoints, leading to a more pleasant and efficient passenger experience,". The policy is already active at major airports like LAX and LaGuardia, with full rollout expected soon. The move follows years of criticism over the effectiveness and inconvenience of the "shoes-off" mandate, first imposed after the 2001 shoe bombing attempt. body:
At least 111 people are confirmed dead from the [catastrophic flooding](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAURL8GM6wLikhAsInZ23RD6w5clVoG3gIzjn-_NfMLL-7qU93nz9f6hSGGtP_GO9n22vKa6KyRWqOybjFnf2JJIe3134NqCzmRd8cqQSoOmoNZPYZ4rWPn7Q28ER1ZoZUENc9m7A6LetZukLMYPHgxuk2ZYQLY3HhTZtLQBfuGgQYjBAhp-mkajQM9o9CTUijZCORDy6VvBzV6Yd3ilZ9UepfvXbRHa9-VDb-YXJhczvPs_74wvUMmF0epFYz802NyieFJ_Bbzzj_neCH3Rl38kTyVEy-OlVfC4g6q3OXUQnoQ33Lhqh3c48Xk0hXrv88QY6iTZiPsdwzxs6b9zOHTyv8BAAD__8JOh9I) this past weekend in Kerr County and Central Texas. While search and rescue efforts continue, the warnings provided to those in harm’s way prior to the deadly flooding are coming under intense scrutiny.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1716, the Nuestra Señora de Guadalupe de los Nacogdoches Mission was founded by the Domingo Ramón expedition at the site of the [future settlement of Nacogdoches](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyqzAQRb9GdDCLHgJUqHgNndOmZBZpjTQRWkeSjf33GecXUt7mzjnn87JeMMSQ9g88yNTnlddEZ4lUK-X1GpndiTmFtJfvO5UaOJGzfpUgVQtTC3p1GOJrHRpnNnC6b8j0k5Kg5lkPjTdAWg5O93KbQSHBpvTsBmsnC5a0ck0w7zOYQPc99FJ34zhoC9OM_TQqhVIMQC5Uzl31VOmJ5Rpf_KDcWT6aaHyttyL-_RdyEXI5z7OrxSOnGBJ1nHchF4_JbcxfQi6Uag5UhFzSWyhjWyhxxtZRu9_RYbzf6D0ilzah5d2x9VTaI5QSODXZuNsZYgxlnMQA-4Eh_pLUv_V7GPkTAAD__76ph9w), the oldest town in Texas. ## Flood Warnings Questioned
At least 111 people are confirmed dead from the [catastrophic flooding](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAURL8GM6wLikhAsInZ23RD6w5clVoG3gIzjn-_NfMLL-7qU93nz9f6hSGGtP_GO9n22vKa6KyRWqOybjFnf2JJIe3134NqCzmRd8cqQSoOmoNZPYZ4rWPn7Q28ER1ZoZUENc9m7A6LetZukLMYPHgxuk2ZYQLY3HhTZtLQBfuGgQYjBAhp-mkajQM9o9CTUijZCORDy6VvBzV6Yd3ilZ9UepfvXbRHa9-VDb-YXJhczvPs_74wvUMmF0epFYz802NyieFJ_Bbzzj_neCH3Rl38kTyVEy-OlVfC4g6q3OXUQnoQ33Lhqh3c48Xk0hXrv88QY6iTZiPsdwzxs6b9zOHTyv8BAAD__8JOh9I) this past weekend in Kerr County and Central Texas. While search and rescue efforts continue, the warnings provided to those in harm’s way prior to the deadly flooding are coming under intense scrutiny. Some critics have suggested recent staffing cuts at the National Weather Service led to [inadequate warnings](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGymzAQRb8GuvVIAiGpoEhD99KmZBa0GCUycqS19fj7DP6FVFvszJl77v31NX9hiOG4_8QHjfy9pfmgWiIxU563mJKvmI9w3MvfFxUO6SC_7rMSSoMwINzsMcRz7ls_LsI72dIojVZCW-v6dh8H7fSiaHPb4ge79p0jb7SzThlLsnNtGC-YMMJJKaRyt2Ho3SqMRWkGrVE1vSAfOOUb78T0jWWLZ3pTvq3p0cZxZ36WpvvRqKlRU6319ieEwO_r3agJM4c1UqOmy-w6eGlATTn6Rk2eFmQCyq8nF8gpEvxOC6wvLvCMeJKHSsg7ZdhSphULF_CEPp7wSQOfmi6yFgaMVIas60D12kG_GgvWIgFtRi-y00psos2jf9YQYyiDaXpxf2CIHxv-vw3eo_oXAAD__xtymsY) being issued for Kerr County. On Monday, U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz said the New Braunfels office had [additional staff on duty](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAUBOCnwd2xAP9gCoo07jZtSouFg42CwQF2vc7TR450n-A204z0aTS_HstD--Dj-lPvqOrHpSXiWQLWinlxISV76hx9XMufF5bqU0RrtoVTPgAVQOVitQ_X0jdWPamVrEHFxMDpME2ybzbVjRMfJDOu509Gx15K4XTn9DTaqbMdNl7dGBVUMkYZl-049tJQMWkmxmHQnPQUra8pt3XDih9dXLjSG3Nr0t4EtdV6FNL9IHwmfD7Ps_191s9dEj7fNuEzFV9RMILJr7-wpQMLBCwlxQKnDwGeCAF1jmhBu4oZjN4P2K9SvYGa9Yr2giPjG2OFLeXsnTcQUikQvEPC5yYre9yWL6MgPV137cP_nfV7774V_xcAAP__o9KPlQ) the night of July 3. ## South Padre Church Faces Eviction
Despite a 100-year lease with the county, one of three churches on South Padre Island [could be forced to move](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ8GOwzwq0hB8Td2s-2W5gpXJUGYhTvj-Pab2ewbbHmSk3PyfZ-3-QYhhrR9wIGWXmueE541IhGWeY05-xNKCmmrXw-sFHJC7_ZZCdVzobkws4cQr7lrvF2EN7JBK3WvRD-Opmt2i4t0eui17sXojB_UosZlGYXGFUxnTBPse0xoYaQUUpl2GDrjhB5B6qHvQbFOoA-US0s7Er6grvHKTyyty0cT7U50r-zff6YmpqbzPNsnxIiXw0QF4rvF1PTGYmqK2UHkv-EOlXLhJySq3MGBJSfu8iPRxSnzPadcuBSCXwiFR4SKHLaCeGAipqamWH8_Q4yhDpp1Yjsg_Pw19DeXT6u-AwAA__-DZ4rs) to accommodate new development. Pastor David Boughter, who leads Chapel by the Sea, received a letter from local officials saying the church’s lease had been terminated. The Cameron County Commissioners Court approved a 100-year lease for the church in 1979, but County Administrator Pete Sepulveda Jr. [said the agreement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL0SnCAUhZ8Gu7uDrIIUFGnsNm1K5ypXZYJg5O66vn3GvEKa05yZ8_P9eg0vDDGk5Sdu5Pg75yHRWSIx0zHMMWd_4pFCWsqfNxUOOZGf1kFJ1YI0IO3gMcRraCrvRultXZGrTatk23W2qVbXdeM4mZH8aDQqifopnyTHztq50VZTFdwdJo20dS1rZR9aN3aSpsPa6LZFJRpJPnA-HrwS0xfLHK_8oeMx5a2KbmXei3j-EKoXqt-uY_ncjlB9zBNGuA8J1d8tQvXS3NII1fucGBh_EwQGPPGC-cgbvAtMK-4UYbyAV4JCCHsk9AU4Q2G8AAtM-Z34Akq-QCQsJFRfHc7vZ4gxFG1EI5cNQ_y3kv-P7cepvwEAAP__eEmN6w) “was found to have major flaws rendering the lease voidable.” Cameron County Judge Eddie Trevino, however, said the letter was sent in error, and the county simply wants to “figure out a way forward that’s mutually beneficial to the church and to the county and everybody involved.” “ _I would like for them to just honor the lease_ ,” said Boughter, who insisted it is “very well spelled out.” While its [summer attendance](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFurDAQRb_GdKDxPIxx4eI1dJs2JRrwAJa8NsHeZTdfH5FfSH91j875vI038sHH9YPubMtrSWPkMwcuhY9xCSm5k47o45q_HpyLT5HdvI0IqGrQNZjRkQ_vsa2cncAZWbGVWiGovjdttVliZKV6rTrSRtEEwNPkeJZGO90iVN5eZ6DBSAkSTdN1rZlB9yR1pxShaIGdL-loysaFX5SX8E5PPpo53atgt1L2LP79FzgIHM7zbOaNdg7Tu2ycmfLur6XAgab0KPUjCxxyoWWpKbo6HStF_02XW40Ch-qwbj99CD53WrSw3smHX1b5W6GnxZ8AAAD__yBAe9I) is between 100 and 125, up to a thousand people attend every week during the winter. Chapel board member Susan Bagley said she’s “just hoping and praying that they’re going to change their minds and not take the chapel away from us.”
## Mixed Reactions to Flooding
While some have responded to the disastrous flooding in Central Texas by exploiting others, many more have demonstrated generosity and sacrifice in the midst of calamity. Sightseers have hampered search and rescue operations. On Monday, a helicopter involved in the effort [collided with a private drone](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd0TAYmMKim3cZdstLWIGGy0GL0zi-O-fiPS-4DXTzOjMvefvfb7bEENa_9gdDL59nhOcNQIilNnHnN1pSwpprf-fUDHkBG7ZZsFET5miTM_OhnjNsnPmwZzmHRiuesH6cdSy28yoQD88135RXnErQQsh9eicGq3rgXfBNBhTTHPOuNC3YZB6YWq0XA19bwWRDFzAXG64AcLbVh-v_IJyW_LeRbMhHpX8-k3ERMSUriNXbCsipkYmYmLqezwrbf2ImGpYN6wApdLd_gtppbi1mvTMpQK1HqFQB9bFi36e0o-NdrjkoxG6YtxxhhhDHRSRbN1tiJ9M-DOTLyO-AgAA__853oiG) flying in restricted airspace, forcing it to make an emergency landing. clean_body: At least 111 people are confirmed dead from the this past weekend in Kerr County and Central Texas. While search and rescue efforts continue, the warnings provided to those in harm’s way prior to the deadly flooding are coming under intense scrutiny. | | | | | | Wednesday, July 9, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1716, the Nuestra Señora de Guadalupe de los Nacogdoches Mission was founded by the Domingo Ramón expedition at the site of the , the oldest town in Texas. Today in the Roundup , we take a look at how the flooding in Central Texas has brought out the best and worst in people. Our listeners love The Flyover Podcast —so much so that it just broke its daily listen record again. Catch up on news in bite-sized audio format on , , or . Today’s sponsor, , offers a breakthrough method shown to be up to 10 times more effective than retinol. Abilene 🌩️ 95/73° | Amarillo ☀️ 95/67° | Austin 🌩️ 93/74° | Brownsville 🌥️ 93/78° | Corpus Christi ⛅ 92/78° | DFW ⛈️ 94/75° | El Paso ⛅ 101/76° | Houston 🌩️ 91/76° | Laredo 🌥️ 98/78° | Lubbock 🌩️ 95/69° | Midland 🌤️ 93/71° | San Antonio 🌩️ 93/75° | Tyler 🌩️ 90/74° | Waco 🌩️ 89/74° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Flood Warnings Questioned At least 111 people are confirmed dead from the this past weekend in Kerr County and Central Texas. While search and rescue efforts continue, the warnings provided to those in harm’s way prior to the deadly flooding are coming under intense scrutiny. Some critics have suggested recent staffing cuts at the National Weather Service led to being issued for Kerr County. On Monday, U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz said the New Braunfels office had the night of July 3. The Texas Hill Country is known as “Flash Flood Alley” due to its and the that drain into major rivers like the Guadalupe. Although were issued, most people were asleep when the river rose to in under two hours. Kerr County Judge Rob Kelly that “nobody saw this coming.” Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has pledged the state will pay to along the Guadalupe River before next summer. South Padre Church Faces Eviction Despite a 100-year lease with the county, one of three churches on South Padre Island to accommodate new development. Pastor David Boughter, who leads Chapel by the Sea, received a letter from local officials saying the church’s lease had been terminated. The Cameron County Commissioners Court approved a 100-year lease for the church in 1979, but County Administrator Pete Sepulveda Jr. “was found to have major flaws rendering the lease voidable.” Cameron County Judge Eddie Trevino, however, said the letter was sent in error, and the county simply wants to “figure out a way forward that’s mutually beneficial to the church and to the county and everybody involved.” “ I would like for them to just honor the lease ,” said Boughter, who insisted it is “very well spelled out.” While its is between 100 and 125, up to a thousand people attend every week during the winter. Chapel board member Susan Bagley said she’s “just hoping and praying that they’re going to change their minds and not take the chapel away from us.” Mixed Reactions to Flooding While some have responded to the disastrous flooding in Central Texas by exploiting others, many more have demonstrated generosity and sacrifice in the midst of calamity. Sightseers have hampered search and rescue operations. On Monday, a helicopter involved in the effort flying in restricted airspace, forcing it to make an emergency landing. A pediatrician and a former city board member in Houston were condemned for making . Kerr County officials have received false reports of missing persons, and some families of victims have been contacted by to release their children. Meanwhile, children in Fort Worth to raise money for Camp Mystic, students in Midland ISD have for victims, and Michael McKenzie of Kyle is using a trolley car to to volunteers and first responders in Kerr County. , 27, sacrificed himself to save his two children, fiancée, and mother when he cut himself badly punching out a window in their mobile home so they could escape as the flood waters were rising. He tragically severed an artery in the process and later died. | Flying together with our sponsor Scientists at University College Cork have validated a surprising 10-second method that’s transforming how women fight signs of aging—without creams or invasive treatments. In a study involving 674 women with deep wrinkles, sagging skin, and dark spots, researchers found that using this simple technique in front of the mirror each day led to dramatic improvements in appearance within just a few weeks. What’s more shocking? has been shown to be up to 10 times more effective than retinol, without any of the harsh side effects like redness, irritation, or dryness. It’s fast, painless, and surprisingly easy to do at home. Thousands of women are already using it to look 10, 15, or even 20 years younger—and the results speak for themselves. Watch the short video below to discover exactly how this method works—and why so many scientists and skincare experts are calling it the future of anti-aging. | ➤ Alvarado: Eleven suspects have been charged in connection with a “coordinated attack” on officials at the federal Prairieland Detention Center on Friday, 10 for attempted murder and one for obstruction of justice for allegedly attempting to destroy evidence. () ➤ Leander: A bridge that was the only entrance to a neighborhood near Big Sandy Creek was washed away during flooding over the weekend. People are transporting supplies across the creek on ATVs or by foot. name: Byron Donalds
subject: Trump and JD Vance wanted me to share this with you.
body:
The age of illegal aliens overrunning our country is over.

| | | | |
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aM37/?__vbtrk=MzAxMjg1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAxMjg1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
_**I just finished my meeting with President Trump.**_
It’s his STRONGEST supporter in Florida, Byron Donalds, and I want to share with you what we discussed:
**Alligator Alcatraz.**
Radical Democrats’ open border policies for far too long have endangered EVERY American citizen. These policies are _UNACCEPTABLE_ and _DANGEROUS_.
Alligator Alcatraz will be the **LARGEST illegal detention center EVER** , and it will be sitting deep in the Everglades, preventing any chance of escape.
But the Democrats, including the man spending millions against me to flip Florida BLUE, are doing EVERYTHING possible to _DESTROY_ Alligator Alcatraz and put illegal immigrants ahead of American citizens.
They’re raising MILLIONS of dollars with the promise to _END deportations_.
I won’t let that happen and I know you won’t either. Your response, right here, right now- _**[will send a message loud and clear that MAGA Patriots stand with President Trump and MAGA’s fight to save our nation from illegal immigration.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aM37/?__vbtrk=MzAxMjg1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAxMjg1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

|
---
As the next Governor of Florida, I will enact President Trump’s America First agenda to the _LETTER_ and protect Floridians from illegal aliens.
_**[But I WON’T be able to win this fight on my own.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aM37/?__vbtrk=MzAxMjg1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAxMjg1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

Byron Donalds

Scott did something amazing this past Saturday. He helped save 165 people from the flash floods in central Texas. Can [...] Whoa... she is really out there. Donald's their worst nightmare. PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/9/2025
body:
Trump’s new MABA commission puts conservation back in the hands of the people
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Parents are pushing back on Colorado’s gender policies, arguing the state is [overreaching into family life.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In El Paso County, 19 illegal immigrant offenders were [transferred to ICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), as the sheriff’s office reaffirmed its focus on public safety. Meanwhile, Rep. Carlos Barron was [elected House Minority Whip](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and a new initiative aims to [enshrine transparency rights](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in the state constitution.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Trump’s [“Make America Beautiful Again”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Commission is giving power back to the people—streamlining conservation and boosting public land access. At the same time, Byron York explains how Medicaid reforms in the “Big Beautiful Bill” are [undoing Obama-era expansions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), reinstating work requirements and limits on benefits for non-citizens.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** C. J. Garbo says the GOP shouldn’t fear internal tension—it’s [key to rebuilding](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). A Paonia ["sex ed" day camp](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) reveals how deep gender ideology runs, even among kids. Kim Gilmartin [defends classical schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from attacks, while Dr. Joondeph critiques left-wing [“theater kid” politicians](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) who prioritize drama over solutions.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, July 9, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Ganahl: Trump’s new MABA commission puts conservation back in the hands of the people](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
While most folks were watching fireworks, President Trump was signing something far more lasting—an Executive Order that could reshape how we care for the land we love.
It’s the kind of bold step we need to bring common sense back to how we manage the wild, wide-open spaces that make this country worth fighting for. The creation of the Make America Beautiful Again (MABA) Commission is about more than pretty trails and national parks. It’s about restoring common sense and local control in how we care for the land we love.
As a board member of the American Conservation Coalition (ACC), I’ve long pushed for this kind of approach—where conservation doesn’t mean locking up our lands, but opening them to responsible use, careful stewardship, and future generations.
Now we’re seeing that vision take shape.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Boll: A day camp in Paonia shows how far the agenda to sexualize kids has gone](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A nonprofit in Paonia is hosting a “Sex Health Education Day Camp” for 10–13-year-olds, sparking backlash over its mature content and bypassing of school board oversight.
* The camp’s organizer previously failed to get a progressive sex-ed curriculum adopted by the local school district and is now pushing similar themes—like consent, tech, and sexuality—directly through the camp.
* Critics say this reflects a broader trend of national agendas overriding local values, with parents increasingly sidelined in decisions about how and when children learn about sex and identity.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Garbo: Let the purists prune—a thought exercise in Republican renewal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* C. J. Garbo presents a hypothetical scenario where purist Republicans are given full control to reshape the GOP without opposition, leading to ideological purging and exclusion of moderates, reformers, and pragmatists.
* He argues that such an approach, while initially satisfying to its enforcers, would ultimately render the party irrelevant—isolated, uninspiring, and incapable of broad political victories.
* Garbo concludes that true renewal will come not by resisting the purge, but by rebuilding afterward—on the principles of truth, grace, and liberty that once defined the conservative movement.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[They never saw it coming: Kerrville flood sparks call for weather readiness](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV STAFF****| NATIONAL | JULY 8** _At least 82 people lost their lives in Kerrville when floodwaters tore through the area in the middle of the night. Families had no warning. Rain poured harder and faster than forecasted. In Kerrville, the flood was already doing damage before most people knew it was coming._
__
**[Baker: Freedom still rings loud in Brush](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY HARVEY BAKER | COMMENTARY | JULY 7** _In Northeast Colorado, where faith, family, and freedom still shape daily life, over 1,200 residents lined the streets under clear skies to celebrate the 70th Annual Brush Fourth of July Parade. This wasn’t just another parade—it was a full-hearted tribute to the traditions and people who keep the American spirit alive._
**[Hearing lays groundwork for GOP-led reform after 3-year immigration surge, 500K visa overstays](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SHAINA COLE | NATIONAL | JULY 7** _The U.S. House Judiciary Committee held a hearing June 25 on visa security and legal immigration pathways, revisiting the Trump administration’s policies and examining how current enforcement gaps could be putting national security at risk._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🍣 DID YOU KNOW?** **Spam (the food) got its name from a contest.** Despite the myths, Spam isn’t an acronym. The name came from a 1937 contest held by Hormel. A New York actor—and brother of a Hormel exec—won $100 for coining “Spam,” possibly short for “spiced ham.” The company loved it, and it stuck.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Politics ought to be the part-time profession of every citizen who would protect the rights and privileges of free people and who would preserve what is good and fruitful in our national heritage." – Dwight D. Eisenhower
|
---

[SUBSCRIBE FOR FREE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Freedom under fire: You can help defend it
body:
Freedom needs defenders. Will you be one of them?

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl8f8qrbhsnthl5h3g5rgv8bauabo09m4f9hs7vo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1jm6o76c3h2bs)

##
Dear Fellow American,

**Freedom needs defenders. Will you be one of them?**

Across the country, government overreach and discrimination threaten the basic rights of everyday Americans. Religious liberty and free speech face relentless opposition--and while we've secured some key victories, the fight is far from over.

That's why **Alliance Defending Freedom** is taking action every day to protect your God-given rights. Since 2011, we've won **15 cases at the U.S. Supreme Court** and upheld the freedoms that allow Americans to live and speak according to their beliefs.

We don't charge our clients a dime. We rely on people like you to stand with us and make that defense possible.

Your gift will help maximize the impact of a $250,000 challenge grant!

Will you seize this moment? Your gift equips us to stand in court for those who can't--and to keep fighting until freedom wins.
[ GIVE NOW ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4u5fncukk8lggbpufhr4hr53s6sol8gf9mhqr28_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1jm6o76c3h2bs)

clean_body: Freedom needs defenders. Will you be one of them? | | | Dear Fellow American, Freedom needs defenders. Will you be one of them? Across the country, government overreach and discrimination threaten the basic rights of everyday Americans. Religious liberty and free speech face relentless opposition--and while we've secured some key victories, the fight is far from over. That's why Alliance Defending Freedom is taking action every day to protect your God-given rights. Since 2011, we've won 15 cases at the U.S. Supreme Court and upheld the freedoms that allow Americans to live and speak according to their beliefs. We don't charge our clients a dime. We rely on people like you to stand with us and make that defense possible. Your gift will help maximize the impact of a $250,000 challenge grant! Will you seize this moment? Your gift equips us to stand in court for those who can't--and to keep fighting until freedom wins. Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Stand with Gov. Newsom! (via VPP)
subject: Newsom fights BACK >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
... But MAGA Republicans are FURIOUS!
| Folks, Gavin Newsom continues to fight back against MAGA extremism: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91775?t=6&akid=20518%2E878179%2E5IqLAO) We’re THRILLED he’s so bravely standing up to Trump — but MAGA Republicans are FURIOUS, _and attacking him relentlessly._

[**We’re rounding up urgent signatures to stand with Gavin Newsom in the face of MAGA attacks — Please: Add your name to stand with Governor Gavin Newsom! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91775?t=7&akid=20518%2E878179%2E5IqLAO) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91775?t=8&akid=20518%2E878179%2E5IqLAO)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. Dear Governor Newsom,

_Thank you so much for standing up for what’s right — even when it’s unpopular and makes you a target for MAGA extremists!_

**MAGA Republicans are already furious with you, but you are showing them you won’t back down. We need more heroes like you!**

Republicans are plotting to END Social Security and Medicaid, DESTROY the federal government, and make Trump an untouchable KING — but you’re working tirelessly to stop them, and we’re so grateful.

**I know that Trump has put a MASSIVE target on your back — so it means the world that you refuse to step down and let them get away with this.**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91775?t=9&akid=20518%2E878179%2E5IqLAO) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91775?t=10&akid=20518%2E878179%2E5IqLAO)
---

**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20518%2E878179%2E5IqLAO). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20518%2E878179%2E5IqLAO).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20518%2E878179%2E5IqLAO) to request fewer emails. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Good morning!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=480%2E181023%2EwoY3oW)
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250709_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=480%2E181023%2EwoY3oW)
Good morning, team!
I’m having my morning cup of coffee right now before I head into my first meeting of the day, and my team just let me know that we’re a little bit short of our upcoming fundraising goal that we need to hit by July 20.
I’m running for Governor of Michigan to build the future Michiganders deserve — one that raises wages, lowers costs, protects our rights from bullies and billionaires, and ensures every person has the tools they need to thrive.
Our fight to make Michigan the best place to call home requires a lot of hard work and _a lot_ of resources. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll be in this fight with me. Michigan is a battleground state, and we can’t afford to take any voter for granted.
I’m counting on grassroots support from folks like you to help me take our message across Michigan and reach voters in all 83 counties.
**[We all want to build a better future for our families and for Michigan. That’s why I’m asking: Will you join me in creating the future we deserve by pitching in a donation? Every amount makes a difference.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250709_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=480%2E181023%2EwoY3oW)**

body:
| | Friends,

I’m Sean Gregory, Seth’s campaign manager. I just crunched the numbers and we need to **raise $24,463 to reach our goal by Friday’s fundraising deadline.**

**[Can you pitch in $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can to help us close the gap and finish strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111132179/556337629/-1414184198?contactdata=+mceEt3usQ6KLZdyBUCHg/HkEpnYYcdVHVq79fI2cwycBpALpvMwKQfYSiyPcNE4PZvQCzqR9pjLPlRyItF7ynkvrpkFF9KrbTMUVaZF75U=&am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&left_to_give=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg4ZDVkYWMtYzQ1Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XTJpkmLNXE8250wJvIn08zrAhVG0yjiLWIHGUiLyt5g=&emci=b3454593-515c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=088d5dac-c45c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17551891)**

Bruce Blakeman’s failures – from reckless spending to a broken property tax system – have held this county back for too long. **Seth Koslow is ready to lead with solutions, not politics. But we can't get there without you.**

Seth’s plan will move Nassau forward:

💰 Cut wasteful spending and lower taxes
👮♂️ Fully staff our detective unit and increase the Nassau Police Department staffing
🏡 Fix the broken property tax system

And Blakeman’s ridiculous idea for his own militia? That will end on day one when Seth is our next Nassau County Executive.

**[We’re in striking distance — but time is running out. Help us power this campaign across the finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111132183/556337632/-1414184198?contactdata=+mceEt3usQ6KLZdyBUCHg/HkEpnYYcdVHVq79fI2cwycBpALpvMwKQfYSiyPcNE4PZvQCzqR9pjLPlRyItF7ynkvrpkFF9KrbTMUVaZF75U=&am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&left_to_give=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg4ZDVkYWMtYzQ1Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XTJpkmLNXE8250wJvIn08zrAhVG0yjiLWIHGUiLyt5g=&emci=b3454593-515c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=088d5dac-c45c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17551891)**

Bruce Blakeman’s failures – from reckless spending to a broken property tax system – have held this county back for too long. Seth Koslow is ready to lead with solutions, not politics. But we can't get there without you. Seth’s plan will move Nassau forward: 💰 Cut wasteful spending and lower taxes 👮♂️ Fully staff our detective unit and increase the Nassau Police Department staffing 🏡 Fix the broken property tax system And Blakeman’s ridiculous idea for his own militia? subject: How far can we stretch a $10 donation?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
It goes further than you think.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111139851/556359185/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTkzZmE5NC1jODVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQ67ODempPNNkASzdGKF-f4EO_JUkjkJkSqyFltdSiM=&emci=f5d14f60-3a5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2e93fa94-c85c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15759664)
---
Derek, We’ll keep saying it, because it’s true: the results of Virginia’s election will decide which way the rest of the nation swings in 2026. We’re facing a Trump-aligned Republican ticket that’s determined to roll back every inch of our hard-fought progress. To top it all off, their MAGA donors are pouring money into their races. **But you might be surprised at just how far we can stretch a grassroots donation. A single $10 donation can help us do any one of these things:**
* Print a stack of pamphlets for canvassers in Roanoke
* Run an hour of phone banking to reach voters in Hampton Roads
* Supply a batch of clipboards and pens for volunteers in Richmond

clean_body: It goes further than you think. | Derek, We’ll keep saying it, because it’s true: the results of Virginia’s election will decide which way the rest of the nation swings in 2026. We’re facing a Trump-aligned Republican ticket that’s determined to roll back every inch of our hard-fought progress. To top it all off, their MAGA donors are pouring money into their races. But you might be surprised at just how far we can stretch a grassroots donation. A single $10 donation can help us do any one of these things: Print a stack of pamphlets for canvassers in Roanoke Run an hour of phone banking to reach voters in Hampton Roads Supply a batch of clipboards and pens for volunteers in Richmond Launch social media ads reminding college students in Charlottesville to register to vote = | ************=********** Becoming a monthly donor means you’re not just helping us win today. You’re helping us build a lasting infrastructure that will help us win elections and protect our rights for years to come. = **********=********** **********=************ Supporters like you are the reason we’re able to hold the line — let’s keep it going.
