Fellow activist,
Last week, the Trump regime’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” was signed into law. This budget reconciliation bill clearly shows where the priorities of the Trump regime and the GOP who ran with it are – and it’s not pretty.

Among other terrible things, this bill includes the largest ever cuts to Medicaid and SNAP, which will result in tens of millions of people across the nation losing access to healthcare and food assistance. It is arguably the worst bill to ever be passed in U.S. history – and the kicker? According to _Axios_ , **many of the bill's massive impacts won’t take effect until after the 2026 midterm elections.**

**It’s no secret that this bill is wildly unpopular.** During this process, Republicans avoided facing their constituents by canceling public events, including town halls, depriving voters of the opportunity to make their voices heard. Republicans then went and voted to slash a trillion dollars in funding from Medicaid, add trillions to the national debt, and more, in order to give massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy.

**Now, Republicans in Congress are hoping that American voters will forget what they did. We’re not going to let that happen. **

Trump’s Big Un-beautiful Bill will have real-life consequences for the people of Pennsylvania, and the elected officials who voted for it must be held accountable. That is why it’s so important that we continue year-round voter engagement, civic education, and mobilization work to ensure voters are informed and ready to cast their ballots in every single election.
[**
We are working to engage our centered communities on the ground and make sure voters understand the role that elected officials play in their everyday lives. Help us engage our centered communities by rushing a MATCHED donation of $25 or more today →

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, Last week, the Trump regime’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” was signed into law. This budget reconciliation bill clearly shows where the priorities of the Trump regime and the GOP who ran with it are – and it’s not pretty. Among other terrible things, this bill includes the largest ever cuts to Medicaid and SNAP, which will result in tens of millions of people across the nation losing access to healthcare and food assistance. It is arguably the worst bill to ever be passed in U.S. history – and the kicker? According to Axios , many of the bill's massive impacts won’t take effect until after the 2026 midterm elections. It’s no secret that this bill is wildly unpopular. During this process, Republicans avoided facing their constituents by canceling public events, including town halls, depriving voters of the opportunity to make their voices heard. Republicans then went and voted to slash a trillion dollars in funding from Medicaid, add trillions to the national debt, and more, in order to give massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. Now, Republicans in Congress are hoping that American voters will forget what they did. We’re not going to let that happen. Trump’s Big Un-beautiful Bill will have real-life consequences for the people of Pennsylvania, and the elected officials who voted for it must be held accountable. That is why it’s so important that we continue year-round voter engagement, civic education, and mobilization work to ensure voters are informed and ready to cast their ballots in every single election. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In this together, Katy Personette Chief Development and Grants Officer Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Emergency Census
body:
We need it now
| | | | Friend,
As it currently stands, illegal immigrants are massively tipping the scales in favor of Democrats through the allocation of congressional districts. That’s before any of them have even cast an illegal ballot!
**If congressional district maps were drawn fairly, without counting illegal immigrants, Republicans would have won at least 15 more seats in the House Of Representatives in the 2024 election.**
Counting illegal immigrants the same as citizens disenfranchises and dilutes the voting power of every American citizen, and it needs to stop now.
**That is why, working with President Trump directly, I have introduced legislation that calls for an emergency census of ONLY American citizens and subsequent redrawing of all congressional districts.**
**_[If you’re ready to take action, I’ve just opened up my citizen co-sponsorship initiative and I would love to have you as one of the first Republicans on my team](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckk-PmzAQxT-NuTkyNgRy4NCUTQ5VV9poK7W5WF57IF75D7VNUvbTVxCaVr3OvHm_p2cLOxjdTQ2q9ojSi1YRUYrYJ0Tpsf4xbTv187jHz08ThvaZfMxL-nlVXulD66QQp-Pr1_7bR3w617Hdn8k1f6jTNMBDuyI3YIU287RqM9XUVSdUl0GTVyUl25qxPLs0pGRvBWFMFQCifpNiR4DVZUVgtytlRTLdUEJLUpFdzlhd1JsdEVCzXBBJ8q4DggqygDZ9AHBQSO_6ADFupLeZaS4pDXHJdUD0EEGOATY37QKoWYHowYrw7oMGnMRkfMB3HxzxAH4wgP0VAh680UlLLVzEcj5KPVfecStu0nM3Si5hvuBg-Z_AiB3CzAva9Yi1KYyA6HZMlltQerSItWtFyzD6MUhArHXS8LXDdSWFHYTuHWLt3RqvfJH0vyEMjJFLcHGMfICkl-3C-BtqdfQugUt3Gq7ke30qfr1-eUF0y53RCrH2v-HydVj7cj5d8u8lyUKjhps2RsdthQrSL28wd35t6O8AAAD__1Y-yuY)_.**
There’s no question that Democrats were thrilled when Biden opened the borders and gave them a massive electoral advantage by flying them into cities across the country... but now each illegal ICE deports is one less pawn they have to rig the system, and they are furious!
**_No wonder they are all trying to be photographed getting arrested for interfering with ICE deportation operations!_**
Right now is the only time before the 2030 census we have to stop these illegal immigrants from disenfranchising American citizens.
---
[BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckklv2zAQhX8NdaPBxVp80CGuYp8aoOmC1BeCpUYyAy4qSdmQf30hWXWLXGfevO_hkdIORndTjco9Yuys24gYQ_wJMXasfk5F1_4-7vHL84SheSG3eck-rcoLe2idkvL1-O1z__0Wn09VbPYncqEPdZoGeGhX5Aas1Gaelk3W1lXZybbLoKZlzkhRcU6zc81IoXbb_FeeAwVK2lJJylRFgbMKCkkyXTPCclKSHeW82labHZFQcSqJIrTrgKAtWUCbPgA42Crv-gAxbpS3manPKQ1xyXVA7BBBjQE2V-0CtLMCsYOV4d0HDTjJyfiA7z444gH8YAD7CwQ8eKOTVlq6iNV8lHrReiesvCov3KiEgvlCgBV_AyN-CDMvaNcj3qQwAmLFmKyw0OrRIt6sFS3D6MegAPHGKSPWDteVknaQuneIN3drvPJl0v-HMDBGocDFMYoBkl62C-NfqNXRuwQu3Wn4q7upJ7d_e_-BWCGc0S3izYfh8nV48-X0eqZvOclC3Q5XbYyORYm2pF_eYO78UrM_AQAA__95RMvR)
Democrats know that without tens of millions of illegal immigrants being counted in the census, and being included in congressional redistricting, their chances at winning a majority in 2026 are slim to none.

## **907Honest** **=** **Tropic Tundra**
---

### **Breaking: Court deals final blow to Kendall lawsuit over ranked-choice voting repeal petition**
---
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=686e74b6ba91c6638a76fc94&u=https%3A%2F%2Fmustreadalaska.com%2Fbreaking-court-deals-final-blow-to-kendall-lawsuit-over-ranked-choice-voting-repeal-petition%2F&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_686e73d91f591f13b808a01b&l=en-US&s=NQQKjEuw5Di5isGQ7tWDaQdOamw%3D)
---
**A short explanation of the court win above, this case was decided last September 2024, but the Supreme Court ruling in our favor at the time, said the final order would come at a later time. That happened at the end of June. More to Come this week.**
---
### The Fight for Fair Elections: A Personal Mission
When I began the effort to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska, I knew it would be a challenge. But I was determined not to let our electoral process be twisted into a confusing system that leaves voters disempowered.My commitment went beyond Alaska. I wrote **three books** and created a **30-part animated video series** to expose the truth about RCV, distributing thousands of copies and making the videos free nationwide. I've also spent countless hours collaborating with grassroots leaders across the country, helping establish organizations now fighting RCV. My websites, **RCValert.org** and **RemoveRCV.com** , offer years of research, resources, and tools like RCV Election Simulators.This fight is personal. My own grandfather, a wise and hardworking man, couldn't understand the ranked choice ballot. If someone with his common sense was confused, I knew there was a fundamental flaw. That moment spurred me to draft Alaska's repeal initiative.We didn't have billionaire funding or political party backing. What we had was unwavering determination and the support of over **700 dedicated Alaskan volunteers**. We knocked on doors, braved the cold, and gathered over **42,000 signatures** —far exceeding the requirement—all without help from political insiders.I've also traveled nationwide, warning states like Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, and Florida about RCV's manipulative nature, funded by out-of-state billionaires.As expected, the political establishment fought us. The attorney who brought RCV to Alaska even sued to prevent our repeal initiative from appearing on the ballot. But we prevailed in both the Alaska Superior Court and the Alaska Supreme Court. They outspent us by a staggering **one hundred to one** , with millions flowing in from out-of-state organizations like Unite America and the Sixteen Thirty Fund, supported by figures like George Soros and Hansjorg Wyss.On Election Day, I was immensely proud. Not only had I fought RCV in Alaska for years, but seven other states where I'd been active decisively rejected it. Those rejections alone cost the pro-RCV lobby nearly **$150 million** between 2020 and 2024. Here in Alaska, despite our small population, it took nearly three weeks to get election results—a clear example of RCV's confusion and delay.Our repeal effort in Alaska came agonizingly close, falling short by just 743 votes after nearly three weeks of counting. But my resolve is unbroken. This fight is a warning to the entire country. We must maintain simple, clear, and honest elections, demanding voter ID and keeping out-of-state special interests out.I am incredibly proud of what we achieved in Alaska. We showed the nation what ordinary, hardworking people can accomplish when they stand firm. The fight isn't over—not in Alaska, and not anywhere freedom-loving Americans call home.**Stand with us! Let's protect our elections for Alaska and for America.**
---

The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.****The phase approach is:****1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building****2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education****3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / Education****Our team at**[**http://PetitionEngine.com**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=686e74b6ba91c6638a76fc94&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2Fq3ow7fFBOA&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_686e73d91f591f13b808a01b&l=en-US&s=tdVbYI9q1utekRLgoFK4F52hSfo%3D)**, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history.**[**https://eaglexit.com**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=686e74b6ba91c6638a76fc94&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FCwYOkRQoPB&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_686e73d91f591f13b808a01b&l=en-US&s=9VXTP_3IoC_lzIz-4t1DsIfe_t0%3D)

I've also spent countless hours collaborating with grassroots leaders across the country, helping establish organizations now fighting RCV. My websites, RCValert.org and RemoveRCV.com , offer years of research, resources, and tools like RCV Election Simulators.This fight is personal. My own grandfather, a wise and hardworking man, couldn't understand the ranked choice ballot. If someone with his common sense was confused, I knew there was a fundamental flaw. That moment spurred me to draft Alaska's repeal initiative.We didn't have billionaire funding or political party backing. What we had was unwavering determination and the support of over 700 dedicated Alaskan volunteers. We knocked on doors, braved the cold, and gathered over 42,000 signatures —far exceeding the requirement—all without help from political insiders.I've also traveled nationwide, warning states like Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, and Florida about RCV's manipulative nature, funded by out-of-state billionaires.As expected, the political establishment fought us. The attorney who brought RCV to Alaska even sued to prevent our repeal initiative from appearing on the ballot. But we prevailed in both the Alaska Superior Court and the Alaska Supreme Court. They outspent us by a staggering one hundred to one , with millions flowing in from out-of-state organizations like Unite America and the Sixteen Thirty Fund, supported by figures like George Soros and Hansjorg Wyss.On Election Day, I was immensely proud. Not only had I fought RCV in Alaska for years, but seven other states where I'd been active decisively rejected it. Those rejections alone cost the pro-RCV lobby nearly $150 million between 2020 and 2024. Here in Alaska, despite our small population, it took nearly three weeks to get election results—a clear example of RCV's confusion and delay.Our repeal effort in Alaska came agonizingly close, falling short by just 743 votes after nearly three weeks of counting. But my resolve is unbroken. This fight is a warning to the entire country. We must maintain simple, clear, and honest elections, demanding voter ID and keeping out-of-state special interests out.I am incredibly proud of what we achieved in Alaska. We showed the nation what ordinary, hardworking people can accomplish when they stand firm. The fight isn't over—not in Alaska, and not anywhere freedom-loving Americans call home.Stand with us! Let's protect our elections for Alaska and for America. More News | Exciting News, My team and I have been hired to manage and deliver the Eaglexit project for Eagle River and Chugiak. The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.The phase approach is:1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / EducationOur team at, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history. | | Phil Izon 12110 Business Blvd Ste 6 PMB 113 Eagle River United States | ---|---

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: BREAKING: Tennessee criminalizes compassion.
body:
A cruel new Tennessee law makes it a crime to help undocumented neighbors. We’re fighting back—and we need you with us.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JZQPZ6CQ1BCN2KFZNX4N6AFN_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JZQPZ6CQ1BCN2KFZNX4N6AFN_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, A dangerous new law just went into effect in Tennessee—one that criminalizes churches, non-profits, landlords, and neighbors who offer shelter and services to undocumented people. Let’s be clear: this discriminatory law is an attack on our faith, our values and our freedom. It’s designed to instill fear, divide our communities and punish kindness. While Republicans criminalize compassion, Tennessee House Democrats continue to stand up for families who have come to America for opportunity and a better life for their children. We’re fighting for a more streamlined immigration system and fully inclusive healthcare and educational opportunity in every community.
We’re supporting legal challenges to stop this law in its tracks. We need your help to fight back.
---
| | [ Donate now to defend immigrant and refugee rights ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JZQPZ6CQ1BCN2KFZNX4N6AFN_2)
---
| In solidarity,
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus

name: Team Moore
subject: What it takes to fuel our campaign
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=282%2E1086043%2En0r-8J ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=282%2E1086043%2En0r-8J ]Wes Moore for Governor

Peter,

Since he first decided to run for office, Wes has been determined to Leave
No One Behind.

That’s the ethos at the heart of our movement. It’s what we work to make a
reality here in Maryland, and it’s what your contribution
will go toward
when you decide to chip in to power our reelection
campaign.

But what does that look like in reality? We want to break down the nuts
and bolts of some of the components of the campaign for you:

Events
Wes will be criss-crossing the state meeting with voters to understand
what he can do best serve them. In order to accomplish this, we need to be
able to afford gas to get there, materials, event spaces, and everything
that goes into hosting an event in every corner of our Maryland.

Advertising
We need to run ads online and on television to build awareness of Wes’
reelection campaign and his message for Marylanders. As opponents start
jumping into the race, it’s critical that we don’t get drowned out.

Office Supplies
Whether it’s an endless collection of pens and paper, or some snacks to
help fuel our staff — and making sure we’re always stocked with dog treats
for Tucker 🦴 — we have to ensure our team is equipped for success.

Before we know it, it will be the busiest part of the election season and
we need to be prepared. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250709-1?refcode=em-20250709-1&refcode2=282_1086043_n0r-8J&akid=282%2E1086043%2En0r-8J ]Peter,
we need to continue building our
resources as 2025 marches on. Will you pitch in any amount today to help
us out?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250709-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250709-1&refcode2=282_1086043_n0r-8J&akid=282%2E1086043%2En0r-8J ]Donate $5 ››

Onwards,

Team Moore

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.wesmoore.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=282%2E1086043%2En0r-8J

body:
| | | [**Defeat anti-choice Del. Ian Lovejoy and expand a 51-49 pro-choice majority in the VA House of Delegates. Donate to help Elizabeth Guzman win.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6JVWfSIy4GZfox9RzBB5J3TnJDY4SPpstg6EW9e8zbsCg_Ggro0oQHjIylOcDMatx15DhYWndQdheFwpdm775lQ1Gy2ab4Mib_b8H1tjvhug4iiLjSxnzf5giD7fSE2swL90fUCEyNaaGdMM_-0EEBGlsPlkYn2tFDqtN8uhnENVzgN5E4NpZQpu-Y407QEGkWU32fyBo8EIzuUf2DvLpVtKBVChIxHtq-QYqSBlzfUV/4i1/yVJQ9jhlSKuI1sIv_dJm-w/h0/h001.QNn05-K6T40uFFv_VBpdMkshsYKp5kqtzT7wXhl3qx4)
* * *
In Virginia, a 51-49 pro-choice Democratic majority in the House of Delegates is stopping a Republican abortion ban. This November, _every seat is up for election_ , and Planned Parenthood-endorsed champion Elizabeth Guzman is taking on anti-choice Del. Ian Lovejoy in a TOSS-UP, red to blue race. Del. Ian Lovejoy:
* Used zoning regulations as a city councilman to block an abortion clinic in Manassas, VA
* Voted to allow doctors and nurses who provide abortion care to be extradited out of state for prosecution
* Voted against protecting access to contraception

**Virginia was the ONLY state in the South to stop new abortion bans after**** _Roe v. Wade_****was overturned.** Mom, social worker, and pro-choice Democrat Elizabeth Guzman needs your help to defend our rights and win a “DLCC Spotlight” race. clean_body: | | | In Virginia, a 51-49 pro-choice Democratic majority in the House of Delegates is stopping a Republican abortion ban. This November, every seat is up for election , and Planned Parenthood-endorsed champion Elizabeth Guzman is taking on anti-choice Del. Ian Lovejoy in a TOSS-UP, red to blue race. Del. Ian Lovejoy: Used zoning regulations as a city councilman to block an abortion clinic in Manassas, VA Voted to allow doctors and nurses who provide abortion care to be extradited out of state for prosecution Voted against protecting access to contraception Virginia was the ONLY state in the South to stop new abortion bans after Roe v. Wadewas overturned. Mom, social worker, and pro-choice Democrat Elizabeth Guzman needs your help to defend our rights and win a “DLCC Spotlight” race. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. subject: Chilling…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
# # # # - - - # # # # - - - # # # # - - - # # # # - - - # # # #

Friend,

Polls show congressional Democrats are at a RECORD-LOW approval level.

_But we need to hold off on celebrating just yet ..._

...You see, poor Democrat polling numbers do _NOT_ guarantee a Republican win.

Because, what's rising to fill the vacuum left by congressional Democrats is not common sense - it's socialism. Or, if we're being blunt: _communism_.

You may have heard that the Democrat nominee for Mayor of New York City is an antisemitic socialist named Zohran Mamdani who said on camera that his goal is _**["seizing the means of production."](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrhnucf0d7ffapjak1unjcop9m0h9tsor23f2a8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ge2o36chh2bs)**_

**[That's a CHILLING thing to hear in the United States of America - _especially_ around the time we celebrate our nation's independence.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9cq5oqs4vbt8mu2ud2k22tes0816i1308lknm18_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ge2o36chh2bs)**

**[But what's __more chilling__ is that Mamdani's cohorts are MOBILIZING so well that national Democrats have an edge over us in voter verification.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcf0tad91facq2vp8rnt796u1mnd6bv20c232mp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ge2o36chh2bs)**

And with congressional margins now as tight as 1 point - well within the MARGIN OF ERROR - every GOP voter profile matters.

_In fact, we 've identified YOUR profile as the difference maker in your zip code._

Which is why we were so disheartened to see that it was still **[UNVERIFIED.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zocdjnriejcr8k25nectgau6htqe989rjrg47jg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ge2o36chh2bs)**

**[So please, we're begging you, privately complete (don't let someone view your screen) your Official 2025 Voter Questionnaire by midnight tonight. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi1d7ce4bkn5q91nm4otf38dipsj92vtnb9126gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ge2o36chh2bs)**
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9fv4335bpl598p5edmj2vaklvo86ddh3vb08hpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ge2o36chh2bs)
[VERIFY YOUR VOTER PROFILE >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1bnefd4mqcbksgpci5fk14vomgu6i97fmiv9ha8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ge2o36chh2bs)
Thank you,

Voter Verification Questionnaire 2025 Polling Team

Recently Trump visited his “Alligator Alcatraz” migrant detention camp where he waxed poetic about death by alligator and called former President Joe Biden a “son of a b*tch” for allegedly wanting to put Trump there. False. Trump just had the 5000 capacity swamp prison surrounded by alligators and pythons built weeks ago. It didn’t exist when Biden was president, because President Biden isn’t a psychopath! _But to be fair, don’t we all want to see Trump in confinement? I mean he’s a criminal and a danger to the world! He ran for reelection to stay out of prison._ The convicted felon and adjudicated sex predator admired the swamp cages, funded by denying FEMA funds to North Carolina hurricane victims. and had some chuckles with Florida’s extremist Governor Ron DeSantis and his DHS Secretary and puppy killer Kristi Noem. Good times! **Protect your home and get this one-of-a-kind collectible firearm, complete with Certificate of Authenticity.** The firearms demonstrated on GunStuff TV typically have less than 100 rounds shot through them and are highly prized by collectors. They come with signed, sealed, and embossed certificates to prove your ownership of these one-of-a-kind collectibles. But don’t put this one on a shelf, take it to the range, shoot it, and arm yourself against home invasion! **This semi-auto bullpup shotgun is only 30 inches long, making it perfect for home defense.** Shotguns are often the choice for home defense but are unwieldy. Not this Best Arms Bullpup. It is easy to handle and maneuver in tight spaces. It comes with one 5 round and one 10 round magazine, plus choke and choke wrench. **That’s not all, you get 100 shot shells to get you started!** **Plus we get you an electronic alarm to hang on your doorknob to alert you in case of intruders.** No home monitoring subscription required, just arm it and hang it on your doorknob for extra peace of mind. ---

Under Secretary of the Air Force Matthew Lohmeier **[couldn't take it anymore and went off](https://substack.com/redirect/aaa31777-ad56-4779-a179-73e775a9c4c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at Democrat clown Rep. Jamie Raskin for mocking the Trump administration's effort to un-woke the military.
Raskin regrets this big time...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/aaa31777-ad56-4779-a179-73e775a9c4c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/aaa31777-ad56-4779-a179-73e775a9c4c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I take it that this is part of the big anti-woke indictment of the military that we have renamed military bases after pro-Union generals as opposed to this who took up arms against the Union in traitorous insurrection!" Raskin chirped.
"What you're saying is we should have military bases named after confederate generals or Nazi generals?" Raskin continued to press Lohmeier.
**["No, I'm not willing to let you put words in my mouth,"](https://substack.com/redirect/aaa31777-ad56-4779-a179-73e775a9c4c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the military veteran fired back before making his point clear. "Diversity is not our strength... skill and performance matter in the military if you would like to deter conflict and win our nation's wars, period!"
**["Don't bulls**t me,... you don't know what you're talking about!](https://substack.com/redirect/aaa31777-ad56-4779-a179-73e775a9c4c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Most of the people in the military don't care about what you're talking about!" Lohmeier went off.
Watch the tense clash here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/aaa31777-ad56-4779-a179-73e775a9c4c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

## **[Wine That's NOT Made by Globalists](https://substack.com/redirect/d0f48b11-0431-4946-97e1-fffa51715469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---|---|---
Want to know what's really in that $12 bottle at the store?
* Chemical dyes
* Fake oak flavoring
* Grape concentrate

These mass-market wines are made in factories owned by global corporations.
What they don't want you drinking? Wine made in tiny batches by honest, hardworking families -- deep in the Andes, or tucked away in the hills of Tuscany.
**[That's what we source at the Bonner Private Wine Partnership.](https://substack.com/redirect/d0f48b11-0431-4946-97e1-fffa51715469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Every quarter, we ship 6 rare bottles -- from places so remote, most Americans will never even hear about them.
These wines aren't for sale in stores, and they'll never be featured on a celebrity's Instagram.
They're for people like you. Folks who still believe in hard work, tradition, and doing things the right way.

* * *
# Russia launches biggest drone strike on Ukraine, NATO allies scramble to respond
Russia launched its **[largest drone attack on Ukraine](https://substack.com/redirect/de1d359d-a19f-4976-98d0-c2a755a7b6ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to date, deploying over 700 drones of various types including 300+ Shaheds, plus 13 Kinzhal and Iskander missiles, primarily targeting the northwestern city of Lutsk and multiple other regions.
* **Ukraine's air defenses successfully neutralized 718 enemy aircraft** , with 303 shot down by fire and 415 "lost in location," while Ukrainian forces used interceptor drones and mobile fire groups to counter the massive assault.
* **NATO jets were scrambled and Poland activated all available forces** , with Ukrainian, Polish, and allied aviation operating in Polish airspace as ground-based air defense and radar systems reached highest readiness levels before standing down as the threat diminished.
* **President Zelenskyy condemned the timing of the attack** , noting it came during ongoing peace efforts and calling for "biting sanctions" against Russian oil and secondary sanctions on countries that buy it, saying the attack proves Russia continues to reject ceasefire attempts.

* * *
# Boston's woke mayor opens city hall to Chinese communist
Boston Mayor Michelle Wu's administration has allowed an eyebrow-raising nonprofit called Boston Urban Forum (BUF) to hold events at City Hall that have repeatedly featured Chinese Communist Party members as moderators and speakers, with at least 8 CCP members participating in events since May 2024, **[the Daily Caller reports.](https://substack.com/redirect/d9e73c07-b3dd-4bc7-a13d-afd24a47aef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9e73c07-b3dd-4bc7-a13d-afd24a47aef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **BUF's founder Gary Yu has connections to Chinese intelligence operations** , as he's listed as an official of the All-China Federation of Returned Overseas Chinese (ACFROC), which is part of China's United Front Work Department intelligence service, according to federal authorities.
* **Wu has publicly commended Yu and approved Chinese cultural events he organized** , including establishing "Boston-Hangzhou Day" and supporting Lunar New Year festivals, while issuing multiple certificates of recognition for his community service despite his intelligence connections.
* **The events appear designed for influence operations** , with experts saying China uses such cultural forums to allow CCP agents to "craft pro-Beijing narratives" and gain "tacit endorsement" from U.S. lawmakers, while some speakers have explicitly recruited academics for Chinese talent programs linked to technology theft.

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Absolutely hammered
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Ok here’s the deal
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Jon Ossoff is running for Senate in Georgia and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from his team, and [**rush a split donation between Jon's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250709-1-90&t=1&akid=6115%2E6688874%2EbN9bOK)
---
One $5 donation.
That is what we are asking you to split between Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign and Mark Kelly today. We'll explain more shortly, but if you're willing to make that $5 donation right now, please use this link.
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-ossoff**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250709-1-90&t=2&akid=6115%2E6688874%2EbN9bOK)
Ok here's the deal.
We're looking for a huge number of donations before our weekly fundraising deadline ends. This is important.
As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely hammered by attack ads in Georgia. Millions of dollars on TV and online already. It's ridiculous.
It also means we have to ramp up our fundraising earlier than we wish — and our numbers have slowed since Marjorie Taylor Greene said she wasn't running.
Jon Ossoff is the only Democrat running for re-election to the Senate in a state won by Trump. That is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign.
So if Jon is going to defend this seat, we really need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and emails like this are a huge part of how it happens.
One $5 donation. That's what we're asking for before this deadline ends. Can you make it?
[**Please split a donation of $5 (or more!) between Senator Jon Ossoff's re-election campaign and Mark Kelly today. We're being hammered with ads and need to build the war chest it takes to win.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250709-1-90&t=3&akid=6115%2E6688874%2EbN9bOK)

Polls show congressional Democrats are at a RECORD-LOW approval level.

_But we need to hold off on celebrating just yet ..._

...You see, poor Democrat polling numbers do _NOT_ guarantee a Republican win.

Because, what's rising to fill the vacuum left by congressional Democrats is not common sense - it's socialism. Or, if we're being blunt: _communism_.

You may have heard that the Democrat nominee for Mayor of New York City is an antisemitic socialist named Zohran Mamdani who said on camera that his goal is _**["seizing the means of production."](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z39mt8785qt5n23rk1e17icva470esvehmqk25to_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ge2p74cph2bs)**_

And with congressional margins now as tight as 1 point - well within the MARGIN OF ERROR - every GOP voter profile matters.

A wee ago today, Senate Republicans rammed through a brutal bill slashing over $800 BILLION from Medicaid — hoping the House would do their dirty work for them and go against their King Trump and shut it down.
That did not happen.
The bill is now law, and this is what's going to happen because of it:
🔴 16 million people will be stripped of healthcare.
🔴 25% of nursing homes will be forced to close.
🔴 51,000 preventable deaths will happen every single year.
🔴 2 million kids will lose access to food.
🔴 1.75 million blue collar jobs will be wiped out.
🔴 1.4 million students will lose their Pell Grants.
All of this pain — for what? So the richest 1% can pocket a $975 BILLION tax break.
We’re building an unstoppable grassroots wave to defeat this cruel agenda and it starts by putting every single Republican on notice: If you backed this bill, we will replace you at the ballot box. name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth– Will You Stand with Me?
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll. I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety. But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

| [****](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zu54q6l6v4j86j9584i8tbtmgn5iss6glvui2f0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)
[****](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zpa17gq2qj4k4boq061692p4fpv1r2buedjeqgi0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who's poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that's bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I've fought to expose the truth--about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It's been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I'm asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O 'Keefe Media Group****](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zdjfmuoqjq5rbg4mpv1vjsqhkb0b5vm0992ehle0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what's right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone --exposing NPR's bias in 2011**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zofsvei3i54f3dlbips8lsd0o6p89mc5jck3viig_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs).

I'd lie awake at night, wondering how I'd pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt--**Congress cut ACORN 's funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don't like being exposed**, and they 've been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgmfsoegham0jilertivbrh952lurbc3m3s4dmrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z45bicj19junqj9n9vlss73jn48not7ikfkoth98_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu's office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zpehkakvh24bqq4k6froproe8cf3ncde7qd14jno_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me--the Americans who deserved to know the truth--and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn 't stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government's thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR's CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me "one of the great journalists," and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a "grand slam."**

But every victory came with a cost--more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zq7tgt78vdm7b504uki2bkgv943j633fpo0pprq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)****.** We're the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjfntkfj30dl4ii3dktcrvu2oqtc6gvjnecp4kh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden 's daughter. **

They took my phones, my computers, everything--trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, "This is an attack on the First Amendment." That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I've faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O'Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zosddoipok7e4re74uj8hbm7v9si6qbclb13kd4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zob9ctmk2rko8jf9i5pdjiiciienb8vpse2nd16g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)

[**Your gift of $25 or $75 will help us train citizen journalists and fight back against those trying to silence us. Donate today.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zapsh134otbhd7esg0mf77rjok9j2g9o7k1i8df0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)

There have been nights when I've questioned if it's worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure--it takes a toll.

I've sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we've touched. Like the voters who saw our exposes on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O 'Keefe Media Group**, I'm building a legacy.

We're not just reporting news--we're training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we're not done.

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. **We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism.**

**[**Will you stand with me?**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zb00c6khi9qthe3v1ojtfo8onh9t3443svskpako_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)**

[**We need**$28,400 within days** to keep going. **](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zk73vdkpiu44e0hf5oeunn8if1n08s8ke2mob79o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)

[**Your donation of $50, $100, or $500 is a direct blow against corruption, ensuring the truth reaches millions.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zn6lfvsrf8b5c127kvgsa3c99jshuk9leln28vo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)

I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden.

The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites.

But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me.

Your support isn't just a donation--[**it 's a lifeline**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgpgjf9gre0b6gj7894v7rtls62l7bj4m9lc96io_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs).

It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, **and the fight for our Republic**.

Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, [**donate today**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zrdloa2sc70u0j29a94bp5gj52oamotkfi0bfl20_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs). [**We 're down to the wire, and every dollar counts. **](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1j62timbhusojg8el93m32n0obvf82mokndnt18_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geao74cjh2bs)

Together, we can keep **exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable**.

Thanks for standing with me,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Support Jamie Raskin's call for Justice Department to Release Epstein Files Mentioning Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Justice Department Release Epstein Files Mentioning Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee55903e-deb6-433a-9661-b49ee38b2101/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78902d91-b255-4fb2-b44a-d0df7b2ded31/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | After years of being obsessed with the Epstein files, and promising to release them and his client list when they took office, Trump officials are suddenly trying to shift the conversation from them as quickly as possible. And they are doing [downright weird things](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5b7dd4e-e00d-4a61-a46d-cea4cfc1aecf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), like releasing tapes that are clearly missing sections, and insisting there is no client list (even though they previously said they had it). **[Jamie Raskin wants to know what the hell is going on, and so do we.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T208375a3-764a-4d9b-9748-a252befd53a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Raskin, the top Democrat on the House Judiciary Committee, sent a letter to Attorney General Pam Bondi, demanding the release of ALL Epstein documents mentioning Trump, and condemned DOJ's apparent pattern of hiding information that normally would be made public, in order to keep it from damaging Trump. [**If you agree, add your name: Demand Trump's Justice Department Release Epstein Files Mentioning Trump.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfedbb080-1501-48fc-8bf7-921e792de455/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdb39f62-0ea7-4ee6-9cf5-4358a122d257/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8239b9e7-ea2e-4485-b818-04a9aecae704/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5ed095b-3b02-4ad5-87de-c49448c43897/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

PRC: Majority of Americans continue to favor moving away from Electoral College| | | Team: When nearly two out of every three Americans agree on something, it's probably a good idea to do it. When it comes to the Electoral College -- a system that isn't equipped to handle the stress tests that opponents of voting rights are giving it -- we need to end it and stop letting cynical candidates game the system to take power. **[Fuel our efforts to support a popular vote standard that will end the Electoral College forever with $25 or whatever you can right now>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111151111/556389260/-523723236?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlZTIzYzQwLWQ2NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t9ULDwCb9nefBP1W3KkyN95qfUOuS4E22S6jFgWa4k0=&emci=61624acd-ca5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eee23c40-d65c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

As has been the case for over 200 years, the Electoral College determines the outcome of U.S. presidential races. Yet most Americans have long supported moving away from this system. **More than six-in-ten Americans (63%) would instead prefer to see the winner of the presidential election be the person who wins the most votes nationally.** Roughly a third (35%) favor retaining the Electoral College system, according to a Pew Research Center survey of 9,720 adults conducted last fall. We're clearly all tired of a system where all our candidates and their campaigns care about is whether the margin of victory is close enough in the state to make it worthwhile to campaign there instead of speaking to real Americans with real challenges. **[The people who tell you we can't get rid of the Electoral College are wrong. Chip in $25 or more to help us change to a popular vote system once and for all>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111151114/556389263/-523723236?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlZTIzYzQwLWQ2NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t9ULDwCb9nefBP1W3KkyN95qfUOuS4E22S6jFgWa4k0=&emci=61624acd-ca5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eee23c40-d65c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

clean_body: PRC: Majority of Americans continue to favor moving away from Electoral College| | | Team: When nearly two out of every three Americans agree on something, it's probably a good idea to do it. When it comes to the Electoral College -- a system that isn't equipped to handle the stress tests that opponents of voting rights are giving it -- we need to end it and stop letting cynical candidates game the system to take power. | | | As has been the case for over 200 years, the Electoral College determines the outcome of U.S. presidential races. Yet most Americans have long supported moving away from this system. More than six-in-ten Americans (63%) would instead prefer to see the winner of the presidential election be the person who wins the most votes nationally. Roughly a third (35%) favor retaining the Electoral College system, according to a Pew Research Center survey of 9,720 adults conducted last fall. We're clearly all tired of a system where all our candidates and their campaigns care about is whether the margin of victory is close enough in the state to make it worthwhile to campaign there instead of speaking to real Americans with real challenges. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go. It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to move to a system that's right and just over a system that benefits only themselves and silences others. This is about the people's voices being heard and their votes meaning something. This is about a system that has rewarded the popular vote loser with the job anyway five times now. This about the people and the states that get ignored and lost along the way to just enough Electoral College votes. you, Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. name: Johnny Garrett
subject: Matthew 28:18 really hits home for me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Johnny Garrett For Congress
body:
Here’s why:

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5csrmsj0aqd5p0aoa49vgsmephbh8smln7ob5ng_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geeor6cph2bs) "Then Jesus came to them and said, 'All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.'" The meaning of Matthew 28:18 has always resonated with me, Friend.
How come?
Because no matter what happens in this world, I ultimately answer to one authority: God.
It's Johnny Garrett here, the pro-Trump conservative candidate for Congress in Tennessee's must-win 6th Congressional District.
I was born and raised in the heart of Tennessee, where the values of family and faith were instilled in me from a young age.
20 years ago, the idea of running for Congress wouldn't have even crossed my mind. I would have laughed if someone had suggested it.
But this is God's plan.
In a swamp where special interests and mega corporations call the shots, I'm committed to answering to Him, and Him only.
If you send me to Washington, I'll NEVER forget that.
I'm just an everyday guy who goes to church on Sundays and volunteers with Little League baseball. [Now, I'm asking you to take this leap of faith with me by chipping in a few dollars to support my campaign.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcui77orjct8bbgkk545j0ocbuf93v3aiibf0ov0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geeor6cph2bs) | [TAKE A LEAP OF FAITH >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp7fj19blmkiglgj00rqjpln62cj0ee8930c8mk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1geeor6cph2bs)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?_Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

subject: Please don’t scroll away

body:
We must speak out.
#

Team -- if ending the gun violence epidemic in America is important to you, then please don’t scroll away.
We’re sure you are busy this Wednesday, so we’ll make this quick: We need your help.
Our country just marked more than 20,000 people who have died or been injured from guns this year.
At the same time, the Trump administration is trying to make it easier to get more weapons on our streets. Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” which was just signed into law, will mean even more dangerous gun silencers will flood into our communities.
Donald Trump and Republicans are putting the needs of their gun CEO friends above you. They need to pay a political price.
**GIFFORDS depends on donations from grassroots supporters like you to power our work. But less than 2% of people give, which is why we’re asking:**
[**Will you contribute your first $10 donation, or whatever amount you can afford, to GIFFORDS PAC this Wednesday? Your donations will help hold the Trump administration accountable and continue making progress in states across the country.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250709-1-b&t=1&akid=10662%2E3935704%2EMas2Mj)

name: Team KTR Communications
subject: Top U.S. Military Leaders Endorse Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
Military leaders trust Karrin Taylor Robson to lead Arizona

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/karrinforarizona/military-endorsements?e=ebfb0fda52)
---
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=84eba49987&e=ebfb0fda52)
| | | | | **Top U.S. Military Leaders Endorse Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor** _Military leaders trust Karrin Taylor Robson to lead Arizona_
**Phoenix, AZ** – Karrin Taylor Robson, Trump-endorsed candidate for Governor of Arizona, today announced the endorsements of several high-ranking retired U.S. military officials who praised her leadership, integrity, and commitment to national security. These endorsements underscore Karrin’s long-standing support for Arizona’s military families and her track record of working alongside the defense community to keep our state and country safe.
---
|
---
| **Gen. T. Michael Moseley (USAF, Ret.)**_18th Chief of Staff of the United States Air Force_ “Karrin Taylor Robson is the kind of leader Arizona needs. She understands the importance of national security, backs our military, and brings the same integrity and mission focus I saw in our best commanders. I’m proud to support her.”
**Gen. Robin Rand (USAF, Ret.)**_Former Commander, U.S. Air Force Global Strike Command and Air Education and Training Command_ “I know Karrin Taylor Robson well, and she is a leader I trust because she understands what it means to serve. She is a champion for those who wear the uniform and for the families who support them. With her deep national security experience and unwavering commitment to American freedom, she will be an outstanding Governor for Arizona."
**Lt. Gen. Richard Newton (USAF, Ret.)**_Former Assistant Vice Chief of Staff, United States Air Force_ “Karrin leads with discipline, purpose, perseverance and has deep respect for our military and our Veterans. She’s spent years supporting national defense and understands what’s at stake. Arizona will be much stronger with her as Governor.”
**Lt. Gen. John Regni (USAF, Ret.)**_Former Superintendent, U.S. Air Force Academy_ “Karrin embodies the same values we teach at the Air Force Academy: graduating leaders of character with integrity, service before self, and excellence in all endeavors. She brings people together and delivers results. Arizona can count on her.”
**Maj. Gen. A. Bowen Ballard (USAF, Ret.)**_Former Assistant Chief of Staff for Intelligence, U.S. Air Force, and Former Mobilization Assistant, National Security Agency_ “Karrin Taylor Robson has a deep respect for those who serve and a clear understanding of what it takes to keep our nation secure. She brings strength, integrity, and steady leadership to everything she does. I’m proud to support her for Governor of the great state of Arizona.”
**Lt. Col. Rusty Mitchell (USAF, Ret.)**_Former Commander, 21st Fighter Squadron & Luke AFB Community Liaison_“Karrin has been a champion for Luke Air Force Base and Arizona’s military families. She listens, builds trust, and gets things done. She’s the right choice for Governor.”
**Karrin Taylor Robson** welcomed the endorsements, saying:“It is an incredible honor to have the support of these distinguished military leaders. These men have dedicated their lives to defending our country, upholding our freedoms, and leading with integrity at the highest levels of service. As Governor, I will fight every day to keep Arizona strong, secure, and free. I’ll always back the men and women of our Armed Forces, and I’ll never apologize for putting America First.”
---
|
---
| PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA. AUTHORIZED BY KARRIN TAYLOR ROBSON.
---

name: Deb Haaland
subject: green chile chicken posole recipe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Cooking has always been a way for me to foster connection and build community.
Hey Peter – it’s Deb Haaland. I’m running for Governor of New Mexico and Heartland Patriots said I could reach out to you.
One thing you should know about me is that **I love to cook.**
My love of cooking New Mexican cuisine started early, thanks to the hours I spent watching my grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir huge pots of posole. She wouldn’t let us kids in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours. I still hold those memories close as I prepare my favorite traditional New Mexican dishes.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90135?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH) _New Mexico chiles – the best in the world!_
**There’s something powerful about connecting with others over a home cooked meal.** When I was in law school at UNM, I’d make chicken green chile stew for student gatherings, and I made that same dish for my Congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season. I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
Cooking became more than a hobby after I decided to start my own salsa business. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and bought my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. I’d prepare my salsa and deliver jars to mom-and-pop shops across the state, often with Somáh riding with me in the back seat.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90135?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH) _Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa. Kids in New Mexico start early... 🌶️_
**For me, cooking has always been a way to foster connection and build community, which is exactly what we’re doing now as we grow our campaign for New Mexico.** I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. Every conversation is another reminder of the incredibly high stakes in this race – and proof that if we organize around our shared values, we will win.
**[Will you split $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today? If you donate through this link, I’ll even send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90135?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90136?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90136?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90136?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90136?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90136?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90136?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90135?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH)
---
Happy cooking,
Deb 🌶️
P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has helped me bring my community together – and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this campaign. **[If you make a donation of any amount to my campaign and Heartland Patriots through this link, I’ll be sure to send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole so you can cook it for your friends and family.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90135?refcode=em20250709-9099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9099%2E614464%2EqJOWGH)**

Kids in New Mexico start early... 🌶️ For me, cooking has always been a way to foster connection and build community, which is exactly what we’re doing now as we grow our campaign for New Mexico. I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. Every conversation is another reminder of the incredibly high stakes in this race – and proof that if we organize around our shared values, we will win. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Happy cooking, Deb 🌶️ P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has helped me bring my community together – and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this campaign. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

**Blue Amp 's building something big. [But we need YOUR help](https://substack.com/redirect/cfc71a38-5d4c-43ec-8b3c-27b3f2ba3dac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)! We launched The Soundcheck Fund to elevate **_**independent voices**_**and build an ecosystem of bold, hard-hitting journalists, video producers & commentators.**
**We 're providing grants and using our platform for promotion. **_**We donated five figures to launch the fund. But we need you**_**to build truly independent, pro-democracy media. So please** _**[get a paid subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/cfc71a38-5d4c-43ec-8b3c-27b3f2ba3dac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**! And join a movement** _**that won 't be stopped!**_
#### **🔵 Subscribe now! Power indy media & **_**our**_**democratic future!**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.tH7O5t-TqLlEBtHsy6NQOoeC6fwA7LO1PnjuJutHyq8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167912079)

_**Lisa Murkowski once played the "rational Republican." Yet, it turns out she--not the Tasmanian Devil--is the largest carnivorous marsupial..As the deciding vote on Trump's vile budget, she cemented her legacy as MAGA scurvy, which'll haunt her for the rest of her days. **_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ee2ee959-52d9-4aca-b4d4-29b8d21396f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**Trump & Bibi clearly made a corrupt deal. I share likely details re these 2 criminals trying to stay in office just to stay outta The Big House..Bibi nominated Trump for the Nobel he craves (part of the deal?). He'd have a better chance if he were by Ngo Dinh Diem...or Mephisto.**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b4a93cfb-d7ff-439b-bba5-643362c54bf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**Warren 's so good at this. Any GOPer in front of her who's committed a financial crime or the slightest unethical practice will find themselves in pieces when she's done:**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a6f61526-2507-4cd5-bc2e-981344746029?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**My feelings on America, republics, empire, and some eerie parallels as I stood at the Collosseum in Rome on my vacation this week (more on this whole experience, Fri):**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/48fdff87-563a-4790-86fb-6735d2dc7fcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[](https://substack.com/redirect/d940b298-5b37-4bf3-b8aa-c90095ed29bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading.

State Democrats are facing competitive special elections over the next few months.

**We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will block the extreme MAGA agenda.** [ A $7 donation is all it takes to fuel our work → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDgicZfgb3kpC3Q-b6VCjsBRbJtRyA3BWhuVAjcJpCeY-HKDJgD_A6xKbbu-C3I-L_O3g5AU8dMxDwRD6aBeLhIVLW6DX0f9QaLDGGuGDgAjjpqTmXLzPrLdAUggCr7zOK9l5-z-ad_Z0civk5OGxbwr9Rwxcaw8s02aqd5vVJXekfMIGHKk-U43swbMT-rbZ_mM74aXD0BKcb6gXTlDYWC7ARpC4P91YuQKZTp6TkAyKDNVjIgCRaTvBFFPUn1g8p6d62gY2brgkBcOF_PSlNe7fSTUCHONQ6CZIcTTOOETT5kQ-Cw7QVR-veBaewTk5SLIsQ4fgmin01hcNg68pf0mW-Q58VUsIl8a67LJcW8F00_piTL7cfmkAWwecxaolKuAxIP54Sw_eHvNjni8aigA/4i1/5VhlJ4ugS_24pIe3pvsPBA/h0/h001.SCZUpQxgSICk-MTtEKA95Q5Wn3Zt6hN1s27weexvaG0)

But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC.

name: Team Freedom Va
subject: Good Trouble Lives On: Join Us in Virginia Beach!
body:
Join us for an active night of celebrating the legacy of Good Trouble and John Lewis.
| | |
---
| |
---
|
# Good Trouble Lives On: A Community Conversation in Virginia Beach
---
| |
---
| Join us for an active night of celebrating the legacy of Good Trouble and John Lewis. It will be an exciting and informative night of carefully applying the knowledge left by John Lewis and how it applies to the Beloved Community in Virginia Beach and surrounding areas.
There will be an exciting panel focusing on two issues: 1) Health care and Prescription Drug Affordability and 2) Voter Suppression and the issue of 10-1 District Voting in Virginia Beach.
It will be an exciting night of audience participation and learning, so come join us in Virginia Beach!

It might be tough, but it’s the right thing to do. = Thanks for being part of this movement. When we fight together, we win. – Team Simon | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = ** Prepared and paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee Simon for Secretary of State Committee P.O. name: The Democratic Party
subject: Remember these states, Derek
body:
---
Derek, these five states could change everything: **Georgia
North Carolina
Texas
New Hampshire
Michigan ** Flipping the Senate means defending our seats in Georgia, New Hampshire, and Michigan, while flipping North Carolina and Texas. [But it’s not going to be easy, and we’re counting on your support to help us do it — will you contribute $3 to help us power our fight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250709_3916_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3916_22930333_4VkB_2&akid=3916%2E22930333%2E4VkB_2) If we win in these states, Democrats will take back the Senate, and we’ll be one step closer to being able to effectively block Trump and congressional Republicans’ attacks on Americans nationwide. **But we’ve got our work cut out for us.** Trump’s billionaire allies will be spending _big money_ to make sure they maintain their congressional majority. **If we’re going to flip the Senate, our work needs to start _now_.** **The DNC is the organization best positioned to strategically move resources where they are needed, when they are needed most, to help win races up and down the ballot.** And your support today means that we can organize and mobilize in these five states and beyond. **Ryan Mackenzie hasn’t held a single in-person town hall since taking office.** Instead of hearing directly from you, he’s been busy siding with special interests and Trump’s billionaire donors. He’s avoiding the hard conversations because he knows his record doesn’t hold up.

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Invitation to the Republican Women Reception Honoring Chairwoman Lana Keesling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | Dear Hoosier Republicans, I am reaching out to personally invite you to our **2025 Republican Women Reception.** Women are at the forefront of the Republican Party. From county chairs to statewide officeholders, Republican women are leading the charge to ensure Indiana remains a beacon of freedom and opportunity for the nation. Republican women from across the state will be joining me in **Indianapolis** on **Wednesday, July 30 th** to celebrate everything we've been able to accomplish and what we can do to get more women involved with the party moving forward! **To RSVP, or for additional details, please email Danielle at****[RSVP@indiana.gop](mailto:RSVP@indiana.gop)**. I hope to see you there! Yours in service,
---

Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
