name: Johnny Garrett
subject: Matthew 28:18 really hits home for me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Johnny Garrett For Congress
body:
Here’s why:

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjffr7d5303c7tt9v11bveo6ekivvmcj5nj6qhkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie8oj6cjh2bs) "Then Jesus came to them and said, 'All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.'" The meaning of Matthew 28:18 has always resonated with me, Friend.
How come?
Because no matter what happens in this world, I ultimately answer to one authority: God.
It's Johnny Garrett here, the pro-Trump conservative candidate for Congress in Tennessee's must-win 6th Congressional District.
I was born and raised in the heart of Tennessee, where the values of family and faith were instilled in me from a young age.
20 years ago, the idea of running for Congress wouldn't have even crossed my mind. I would have laughed if someone had suggested it.
But this is God's plan.
In a swamp where special interests and mega corporations call the shots, I'm committed to answering to Him, and Him only.
If you send me to Washington, I'll NEVER forget that.
I'm just an everyday guy who goes to church on Sundays and volunteers with Little League baseball. [Now, I'm asking you to take this leap of faith with me by chipping in a few dollars to support my campaign.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5j93eubjb4u3gn0d47sngklqsaq2jmrtb6pvvn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie8oj6cjh2bs) | [TAKE A LEAP OF FAITH >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkh2bbnb3soo1soevuj41p6dkm1le847dbl8hdlo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie8oj6cjh2bs)

clean_body: Here’s why: "Then Jesus came to them and said, 'All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.'" The meaning of Matthew 28:18 has always resonated with me, Friend. How come? Because no matter what happens in this world, I ultimately answer to one authority: God. It's Johnny Garrett here, the pro-Trump conservative candidate for Congress in Tennessee's must-win 6th Congressional District. I was born and raised in the heart of Tennessee, where the values of family and faith were instilled in me from a young age. 20 years ago, the idea of running for Congress wouldn't have even crossed my mind. I would have laughed if someone had suggested it. But this is God's plan. In a swamp where special interests and mega corporations call the shots, I'm committed to answering to Him, and Him only. If you send me to Washington, I'll NEVER forget that. I'm just an everyday guy who goes to church on Sundays and volunteers with Little League baseball. | Thank you for your time, Johnny Garrett | | | | Paid For By Johnny Garrett For Congress PO Box 165, Goodlettsville, TN 37070 Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch: Federal Court Hearing Set in Lawsuit for Joe Biden’s Family Business Records
body:
Judicial Watch announced that a hearing was set by U.S. District
Judge Sparkle L. Sooknanan for July 8 at 10 a.m. ET in a Freedom of
Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. National Archives and
Records Administration (NARA) for Biden family records and
communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as
communications between the Bidens and several known business
associates.

[alt_text]

[*****]
July 09, 2025

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Re: MacArthur Park
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111157973/556410806/-1623651544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E1MDVhNjctZTE1Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HvIm0fQYPTw35SltYhzpsP_Au4oH_Q1PJCS-WrN_RWg=) I am outraged by what I saw this week, just outside of our district in MacArthur Park: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111157974/556410807/1987151627?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E1MDVhNjctZTE1Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HvIm0fQYPTw35SltYhzpsP_Au4oH_Q1PJCS-WrN_RWg=&emci=14d54761-e15c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7a505a67-e15c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8447100) These are armed officers, standing alongside and atop mounted weapons – In the middle of a park in Los Angeles. **This isn’t border enforcement. It isn’t making our communities safer.** And yesterday wasn’t a one-off. I know you all are seeing the same videos as I of masked, unidentifiable agents accosting law-abiding residents at Home Depots and on sidewalks. In California, we have requirements that agents have their name or badge number visible at all times. And that needs to be respected, and taken to a national level. Because if we don’t have the ability to hold our law enforcement accountable, we can’t keep the public safe. That’s why I’ve cosponsored the No Masks for ICE Act, which would bring California accountability to the national level for all enforcement agents. And today, I’m hoping for your solidarity in demanding that Congress bring this to the floor. [**Sign on today to end masked ICE agents, and demand more accountability from those tasked with keeping us safe.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111157975/556410808/1987151627?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E1MDVhNjctZTE1Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HvIm0fQYPTw35SltYhzpsP_Au4oH_Q1PJCS-WrN_RWg=&emci=14d54761-e15c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7a505a67-e15c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8447100) | ****[Sign today to demand – “No Masks for ICE!”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111157976/556410809/1987151627?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E1MDVhNjctZTE1Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HvIm0fQYPTw35SltYhzpsP_Au4oH_Q1PJCS-WrN_RWg=&emci=14d54761-e15c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7a505a67-e15c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8447100)****
---
Thank you for standing up for our communities.
Laura

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: 🎉Celebrate Kendra Brooks — PA’sWorking Families Champion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | Dear Peter, This month, we’re celebrating one of Pennsylvania’s boldest progressive leaders — Councilmember **Kendra Brooks** , a trailblazing WFP champion who’s been transforming what’s possible in Philly and across our commonwealth. Kendra’s unwavering voice for working people, housing justice, racial equity, and community power has reshaped local politics and inspired WFP candidates across Pennsylvania. As the first third-party candidate elected to Philadelphia City Council in over a century, Kendra is proof that our movement can win. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqttYh5RWANInS2nHva71aa2Xv9CqkWgX888TwcwTKY5Nn7yWupdHsyxi9t51-vkjnZ5jh0foppxbyi3F_oj4ZQ1l6dJuKoRgQXMbs8tPn8gxghSnsdetGe2F0C4uR_ESdabTtGaa1AwepJfK1DlwAI8iVsAUfsLswhzXI-QXHOkWKVXqX6Odz0PUwAcBplWqXkTu_WORYUj6v1xSe76JVT7apNqgpN1efeUEpLhycfjKPdfy2rBJgJMtZVK9O_ZXlOLP76zI2YNze7YOuk3xNrSvBIdnI1CxtBgrH3f3DJU_SEX0DkFjsMFdCPKlwZEG0rEkUK4eqzy7zoxnSzR19IaU4UOawCupbbUq8BlylaL1HXA8Nze_t5Z8sdw5KhgJPnmaYCjoxfu1JXV7TcJWR11/4i1/PWGLd0c3T6urSXcQBpmDaA/h0/h001.o0auVGJN2o3ritB3fx9zhrOVRst9fx7F8fYB2f3sSZ0) clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, This month, we’re celebrating one of Pennsylvania’s boldest progressive leaders — Councilmember Kendra Brooks , a trailblazing WFP champion who’s been transforming what’s possible in Philly and across our commonwealth. Kendra’s unwavering voice for working people, housing justice, racial equity, and community power has reshaped local politics and inspired WFP candidates across Pennsylvania. As the first third-party candidate elected to Philadelphia City Council in over a century, Kendra is proof that our movement can win. Now, as she celebrates her birthday, we have the chance to show Kendra some love and appreciation. 📅 Friday, July 18th, 2025 ⏰ 4:00 PM – 7:00 PM 📍 Cavanaugh's River Deck | 417 N Christopher Columbus Blvd, Philadelphia Expect music, joy, and the kind of community that makes this movement powerful. 💌 Not local? Let’s come together across Philly and across Pennsylvania to celebrate a leader who never stops fighting for us. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kEFz8iAQhn8NuZlZFgIfBw5fzcSDrVPrpe2NBKK0YCKJyfjvO1rrdffZfZ95TeyDby-ayCeCePB2IIiE_SeIp485pvNXXK8Wz0j54iQ2sbhucXlHJ3zAx8aUn9td4t_LaeiPm7YX7H2iD3y89O4B30NzF40P16ksM6tZa4FnTlNZIEilmMgO-h9ALblFRk0jTK0AaSGVdcZKWivJM68RsAAJiooCQeSgWmpaw2VRS2yFJRxuObmJLvnG0GGcTUpdF_Omi1nQh3Hsh5tYRbCaU5cfz01w5-H3rOkiwequTLCaCFalXa7W25e3vSCsupXGyvB6We8szC5L2vazD8EPQhIO-7832aTxJwAA___bi25m)
| |
---
| | Dear Patriot, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kF9vmzAUxT-NeSOyr42NH3hISkDTtkpLp2jdC7pg03jFgZo_Ub_9BErzYsnHv-Nzz0U_dK79zIg6EICLMyMBIHxPAD5ebz7M__z3Mv4BTMQf8tkn6ys83dEFHvC1wfzvr5cg3p-Wcbg-t4Pkfxb2wKfPwT7ge-jOenTdqqo8MhlvDRWRzZhKgCqtuYwuWYo8kSAQNU3R1K0QoIRlKGvdIE1p5DKgkFBFNZMJULmjumXYolBJraCVhgi65ezQ2-AaZON0wxD63u-a3kdddpmmYdwGKwgUo23mYHd4taafVoJAUQdcbFz3_ftIoEgFZy0kdSy0MbGA2sZaK4ib1ILgkCYiwfUvXsyTr8Z-Do0lPD_kZXw6ngnIVfbWuNkTnh9_3pUG_YDu7Up4_tWoOuRldTjtz8fqW1m-Ftv9dDxXL7_3p3g97t7JBr_5NGfVLbAoZGa4ua5zo1RE0LdtAWvdJYP_AQAA___zK5RR)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kF9vmzAUxT-NeSOyr42NH3hISkDTtkpLp2jdC7pg03jFgZo_Ub_9BErzYsnHv-Nzz0U_dK79zIg6EICLMyMBIHxPAD5ebz7M__z3Mv4BTMQf8tkn6ys83dEFHvC1wfzvr5cg3p-Wcbg-t4Pkfxb2wKfPwT7ge-jOenTdqqo8MhlvDRWRzZhKgCqtuYwuWYo8kSAQNU3R1K0QoIRlKGvdIE1p5DKgkFBFNZMJULmjumXYolBJraCVhgi65ezQ2-AaZON0wxD63u-a3kdddpmmYdwGKwgUo23mYHd4taafVoJAUQdcbFz3_ftIoEgFZy0kdSy0MbGA2sZaK4ib1ILgkCYiwfUvXsyTr8Z-Do0lPD_kZXw6ngnIVfbWuNkTnh9_3pUG_YDu7Up4_tWoOuRldTjtz8fqW1m-Ftv9dDxXL7_3p3g97t7JBr_5NGfVLbAoZGa4ua5zo1RE0LdtAWvdJYP_AQAA___zK5RR) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kF9vmzAUxT-NeSOyr42NH3hISkDTtkpLp2jdC7pg03jFgZo_Ub_9BErzYsnHv-Nzz0U_dK79zIg6EICLMyMBIHxPAD5ebz7M__z3Mv4BTMQf8tkn6ys83dEFHvC1wfzvr5cg3p-Wcbg-t4Pkfxb2wKfPwT7ge-jOenTdqqo8MhlvDRWRzZhKgCqtuYwuWYo8kSAQNU3R1K0QoIRlKGvdIE1p5DKgkFBFNZMJULmjumXYolBJraCVhgi65ezQ2-AaZON0wxD63u-a3kdddpmmYdwGKwgUo23mYHd4taafVoJAUQdcbFz3_ftIoEgFZy0kdSy0MbGA2sZaK4ib1ILgkCYiwfUvXsyTr8Z-Do0lPD_kZXw6ngnIVfbWuNkTnh9_3pUG_YDu7Up4_tWoOuRldTjtz8fqW1m-Ftv9dDxXL7_3p3g97t7JBr_5NGfVLbAoZGa4ua5zo1RE0LdtAWvdJYP_AQAA___zK5RR)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. clean_body: | | | | | Dear Patriot, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Millions of families are already watching Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on Iggy and Mr. Kirk and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. ** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111159348/556415568/-2147182090?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Money_250709_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQyNjFlYy1lNDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KivJeL3vvnaDqHC5GZGlupSk4_ktaNK1fyTVWUFAXGA=) All eyes are on Virginia, Derek.

Why? We’re the first test of Democrats’ strength since Trump took office again. This November, voters will decide whether we expand our razor-thin Democratic majority in the Virginia legislature and flip the Governorship.

Then next year, Republicans are eyeing my seat as an opportunity to expand their majority in the Senate.

**Simply put – we’ve got to fight like hell to keep Virginia blue. If that’s all you need to hear, you can donate right now at the link below:**

[_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250709**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111159349/556415569/-2147182090?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Money_250709_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQyNjFlYy1lNDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KivJeL3vvnaDqHC5GZGlupSk4_ktaNK1fyTVWUFAXGA=)

In elections as crucial as these, outside spending could very well make all the difference.

And right now, Republicans have the advantage: news broke that a GOP super PAC has committed as much as _$2 million_ to elect Republicans this year – that’s on top of the $600 million Donald Trump’s campaign has raised this year to expand his control of Congress.

With so much at stake in Virginia over the next two years, we can’t afford to be complacent. We need to be ready to fight back against this Republican cash haul. Just look at what Republicans have done in the Commonwealth over the past 171 days of Trump’s second administration:
* Driven up unemployment
* Fired thousands of federal workers
* Tore away health care from 323,000 Virginians with Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill
* Cut taxes for the wealthiest Americans while raising prices for Virginians

**Losing Virginia’s critical elections will have more real, detrimental consequences for folks all across the Commonwealth.**

[_**So, Derek, if you can, will you pitch in $5, $10, or anything you’re able to give us the resources we need to protect my seat and keep Virginia blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111159350/556415570/-2147182090?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Money_250709_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQyNjFlYy1lNDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KivJeL3vvnaDqHC5GZGlupSk4_ktaNK1fyTVWUFAXGA=)

The fight continues,

Mark Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111159351/556415571/-2147182090?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Money_250709_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQyNjFlYy1lNDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KivJeL3vvnaDqHC5GZGlupSk4_ktaNK1fyTVWUFAXGA=)****

I’m asking for something just as important -- Your endorsement! As the architect of the current Senate Majority that was instrumental in passing President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill, Democrats are 100% united in defeating me in 2026. We need to show Democrats we have a united front and we’re ready to defend this seat and our extremely narrow Republican Senate Majority. I need 2,221 more endorsement signatures in the next 48 hours. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. | | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

We need to be lowering the cost of prescription drugs. We need to be making childcare and housing affordable. We need to make sure that American families are being supported, not left behind. When I win this race it’s going to be because Coloradans know we deserve more. It’s time to hold our representatives accountable. name: Jane Fonda
subject: My heart is with Texas.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I can't stop thinking about the families who lost everything this weekend.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111161576/556423938/1328794144?refcode=ea.725f2460-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.725f2460-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyNWYyNDYwLWU5NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwqLL-87oq-fLMRgAW2KY4WH-bx7ND1d2dQXE_esUvk=&emci=10f75327-3b5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=725f2460-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
I’m holding the families across Central Texas in my heart as they navigate unimaginable grief. The flash floods that tore through Texas Hill Country claimed at least 100 lives and left families, volunteers, and search and rescue crews sifting through debris for missing loved ones. A girls' summer camp was among the hardest hit as rivers rose with devastating speed. Let me be clear: This should never have happened. No one should have to endure the heartbreak of losing a loved one to a preventable disaster. What happened in Texas is a direct consequence of the climate crisis, supercharged by warming temperatures that create extreme rainfall events. And while the Trump administration and Republicans in the states roll back climate protections and hand more power to fossil fuel companies, it's everyday families who will continue paying the ultimate price. **We need to confront this crisis at its source by electing climate leaders who will stand up to the fossil fuel industry and fight for the bold action our communities deserve.** JanePAC is at the forefront of that fight. But while we build that political power, the most immediate way to help our neighbors in Texas is through direct relief. **The Kerr County Flood Relief Fund** is distributing funds directly to organizations providing flood assistance to the hardest-hit communities, including Hunt, Ingram, Kerrville, Center Point, and Comfort. **[If you're able to help, please consider making a donation today to the Kerr County Flood Relief Fund. Your support will make a real difference for these grieving communities >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111161577/556423939/-2091410773?funit_id=4201&refcode=ea.725f2460-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.725f2460-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyNWYyNDYwLWU5NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwqLL-87oq-fLMRgAW2KY4WH-bx7ND1d2dQXE_esUvk=&emci=10f75327-3b5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=725f2460-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)** | [**DONATE →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111161578/556423940/-2091410773?funit_id=4201&refcode=ea.725f2460-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.725f2460-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyNWYyNDYwLWU5NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwqLL-87oq-fLMRgAW2KY4WH-bx7ND1d2dQXE_esUvk=&emci=10f75327-3b5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=725f2460-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e002d6a-b936-4474-9524-52234cec3f16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

North Carolina Republican Senator Thom Tillis just announced he won’t run for reelection. This is a huge opportunity for Democrats, Peter. This key retirement makes it much more likely Democrats can win back the Majority in the US Senate. The non-partisan Cook Political Report agrees: North Carolina is now a "top pickup opportunity" for Democrats. All of a sudden, North Carolina has skyrocketed to the top of rankings as Democrats best opportunity in the nation to flip a US Senate seat from red to blue. | | | | | | | | | | | | Getting ready now isn’t optional, Peter. Funds we raise now will go to support our Democratic nominee in North Carolina and show Republicans that we’re ready to take on their corrupt machine. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. name: Dan Goldman
subject: The Supreme Court created a bribery loophole. I’m closing it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Last year, Trump’s hyper-partisan Supreme Court issued a ruling that defies basic common sense. In _Snyder v. United States_ , the Court decided that it’s not a violation of federal bribery laws for an elected official to receive thousands of dollars after taking an official action that benefits someone financially. That means if a public official awards a contract, then gets handed a bag of cash afterwards as a “tip,” it’s not considered bribery. That’s unacceptable. It’s corrosive to public trust. And it’s just one more example of how our institutions are being manipulated to serve the personal interests of the powerful. **That’s why I introduced the bipartisan _No Gratuities for Governance Act_ to close this loophole and make it clear that elected officials cannot accept personal payments in exchange for government action, before _or_ after the fact.** **[If you agree, please add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of this bill:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111162550/556427835/1157070410?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250709_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzZjOTZiNS1lYzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTSkdl2VOBnvhomleRUnZvq9JSfaJqhROm60lXJfRVs=&emci=dcbb69e9-e65c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fc6c96b5-ec5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111162551/556427836/1157070410?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250709_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzZjOTZiNS1lYzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTSkdl2VOBnvhomleRUnZvq9JSfaJqhROm60lXJfRVs=&emci=dcbb69e9-e65c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fc6c96b5-ec5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13556823)

75% of Americans say they don’t trust elected officials. And rulings like _Snyder v. United States_ only make that worse.
We need to restore faith in our democracy, and that starts with rooting out corruption wherever it exists. This bipartisan bill is a commonsense first step in a much bigger fight, and I hope you’ll join me in supporting it.
Thanks for standing up,
Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: URGENT MESSAGE for YOU from Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
Karrin for Arizona

[https://secure.winred.com/karrin-for-arizona/w-eml-shs-i-only-endorse-fighters-flex8159?utm_campaign=067000018053020&utm_medium=email&xuno=38313539&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

Fellow patriot,

Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders here.

PLEASE GIVE ME TWO MINUTES OF YOUR TIME—I NEED TO TELL YOU:

*
Why this Arizona race matters more than ANYTHING

*
Why I’m backing Karrin Taylor Robson

*
And what YOU can do right now to help her WIN

Let’s get straight to it.

WHY ARIZONA MATTERS

Here’s what most Americans don’t realize:

ARIZONA IS GROUND ZERO FOR 2025. THE MEDIA MAY NOT BE TALKING ABOUT
IT—BUT THE RADICAL LEFT SURE IS.
[https://secure.winred.com/karrin-for-arizona/w-eml-shs-i-only-endorse-fighters-flex8159?utm_campaign=067000018053020&utm_medium=email&xuno=38313539&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

That’s why they’re already funneling MILLIONS into the state.

Because if Arizona falls...

🟥 Trump’s America First agenda could stall
🟥 The open border disaster will explode
🟥 The Left will have TOTAL control of a key swing state

The stakes couldn’t be higher.

And they know exactly who can beat them: KARRIN TAYLOR ROBSON.

WHY I’M BACKING KARRIN

Karrin is Trump-endorsed. And I’m proud to endorse her too—because
she’s a PROVEN CONSERVATIVE FIGHTER who knows how to WIN.

🔴 A job-creator who built a business—NOT A POLITICIAN
🔴 A border hawk who will SHUT DOWN cartel chaos
🔴 A constitutional conservative who DEFENDS life and
liberty
🔴 And a mom and Arizona native who LOVES this country

KARRIN IS TOUGH. SHE’S SMART. AND SHE’S READY TO LEAD.
[https://secure.winred.com/karrin-for-arizona/w-eml-shs-i-only-endorse-fighters-flex8159?utm_campaign=067000018053020&utm_medium=email&xuno=38313539&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

That’s why President Trump and I are ALL IN—and why NEWT GINGRICH
just joined our team too.

HOW YOU CAN HELP KARRIN WIN

Here’s the truth:

Karrin’s opponent is backed by RADICAL Leftists, D.C. elites, and
dark money billionaires who will do ANYTHING to keep Arizona blue.
[https://secure.winred.com/karrin-for-arizona/w-eml-shs-i-only-endorse-fighters-flex8159?utm_campaign=067000018053020&utm_medium=email&xuno=38313539&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

We don’t have that. We don’t want it.

We have something better: YOU.

Right now, Karrin’s building the strongest grassroots team in the
nation—DOOR-KNOCKING, PHONE BANKING, VOTER OUTREACH, AND LOCAL AD
BLITZES.

But to keep going strong, she needs urgent support.

Your donation of $10, $25, OR $50
[https://secure.winred.com/karrin-for-arizona/w-eml-shs-i-only-endorse-fighters-flex8159?utm_campaign=067000018053020&utm_medium=email&xuno=38313539&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]
could be the one that puts Arizona over the top.

Can she count on you?

:POINT_DOWN: RUSH A DONATION TO TEAM KTR :POINT_DOWN:

YES! I’LL HELP FLIP ARIZONA
[https://secure.winred.com/karrin-for-arizona/w-eml-shs-i-only-endorse-fighters-flex8159?utm_campaign=067000018053020&utm_medium=email&xuno=38313539&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

This isn’t just about one race—it’s about taking our country
back.

Join us. Let’s finish the fight.

For America,

Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders

[https://secure.winred.com/karrin-for-arizona/w-eml-shs-i-only-endorse-fighters-flex8159?utm_campaign=067000018053020&utm_medium=email&xuno=38313539&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

name: Congressman Mike Collins
subject: Should I run for Senate against a TRUMP IMPEACHER?
body:
I’ve been praying over this.

| | |
---
_**RUN, MIKE, RUN?**_
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zic4ilhkvf1p8k7md843ru4cqi2lorifetbpqb90_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie1ob6c5h2bs)

[ SHOULD I RUN FOR SENATE AGAINST __TRUMP IMPEACHER__ JON OSSOFF? ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze7hpr63t2hihjb7c48u58uece3o6c4i8ov4v100_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie1ob6c5h2bs)
---
July 2025 Patriot, ** ****I agree with you -- Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff must go.** He _DOES NOT_ represent the vast majority of Georgians. He _DOES NOT_ represent the vast majority of Americans. ** The fact that he’s ready to launch another SHAM IMPEACHMENT AGAINST TRUMP tells you exactly _how much of a traitor he is_.** ** But here’s the truth: I never planned on ****running for U.S. Senate. ** ** I love what I’m doing now in the** **House of Representatives:** **_> > Laying the groundwork for Trump's Big Beautiful Bill_ **– providing record tax cuts, funding for our ICE heroes, and ending the Green New Scams harming our American farmers _**> > Passing the Laken Riley Act** _– a bill I introduced that makes it easier for the White House to deport illegal aliens; and **_> > Pushing for Mass Impeachments_** – fighting against the judicial coup being run on President Trump and holding Radical Left Judges in check But sometimes it's not about what you WANT to do, but about __what you NEED to do_._ ** That’s why I’m seriously considering taking a swing at Jon Ossoff's Senate seat.** I’ve been praying over it. I’ve been speaking with my family about it. And soon, I’m going to meet with President Trump and see if this is something he actually wants me to do. ** But today, [I need to know if Americans like YOU would support me if I do decide to run](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhpi733ta53t4t8h95b67q242701g2rskum7nkh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie1ob6c5h2bs).** Because when I lace up the gloves to fight, there’s NO going back. I’m all in. **_ A final decision has NOT been made yet._** ** I’d love to hear your thoughts on this first.** **[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpaq05mbj4qna4s0cutn9qptipitnen178b81hog_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie1ob6c5h2bs)[ Should I run for Senate against TRUMP IMPEACHER Jon Ossoff](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8h325u19ianhm8qb6g2t89iris8rjentis4a3io_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie1ob6c5h2bs) ?**

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I’m not slowing down:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111163801/556432702/-550958566?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4YmU4NS1lZjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHe1tvBXStY4LTZkJy8esSrjjAHXdbs4XOeuJt3dPn8=)
Friend,

I want you to know that I’m working hard for Central and Southern Illinois despite the noise in Washington. That’s why today I’m passing along an update on what I’ve been up to in the district.

I’d be grateful if you could read my message the whole way through, but if you’re short on time I understand, and I’d appreciate a **[donation of $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111163802/556432703/-550958566?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4YmU4NS1lZjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHe1tvBXStY4LTZkJy8esSrjjAHXdbs4XOeuJt3dPn8=)** to move us forward.

It’s with your continued support that I am able to do this work.

Thank you,

Nikki
| **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111163803/556432704/-550958566?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4YmU4NS1lZjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHe1tvBXStY4LTZkJy8esSrjjAHXdbs4XOeuJt3dPn8=)**
---

* * *

There’s a lot of confusion about the passage of the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” and what it means for IL-13. I hosted a call for local healthcare stakeholders to strategize how to best protect this community – because we deserve better, and I won’t back down.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111163804/556432705/-550958566?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4YmU4NS1lZjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHe1tvBXStY4LTZkJy8esSrjjAHXdbs4XOeuJt3dPn8=)
I was proud to celebrate the Fourth of July marching in the Champaign County Freedom Celebration Parade alongside this incredible community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111163805/556432706/-550958566?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4YmU4NS1lZjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHe1tvBXStY4LTZkJy8esSrjjAHXdbs4XOeuJt3dPn8=)
Late last month, I hosted a ‘Take Action’ meeting in Piatt County. I talked about what the Big Ugly Bill means for working families, how I’m fighting back, and how we all can get involved in strengthening our communities.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111163806/556432707/-550958566?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4YmU4NS1lZjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHe1tvBXStY4LTZkJy8esSrjjAHXdbs4XOeuJt3dPn8=)
During my April town hall, I was particularly moved by Mary and Rachel’s story – a Springfield teacher and her daughter who relies on Medicaid. Please click **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111163807/556432708/-1030471601?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4YmU4NS1lZjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHe1tvBXStY4LTZkJy8esSrjjAHXdbs4XOeuJt3dPn8=&emci=3708be85-ef5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3c08be85-ef5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891387)** to watch.

clean_body: | = Friend, I want you to know that I’m working hard for Central and Southern Illinois despite the noise in Washington. That’s why today I’m passing along an update on what I’ve been up to in the district. I’d be grateful if you could read my message the whole way through, but if you’re short on time I understand, and I’d appreciate a = to move us forward. It’s with your continued support that I am able to do this work. Thank you, Nikki | = There’s a lot of confusion about the passage of the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” and what it means for IL-13. I hosted a call for local healthcare stakeholders to strategize how to best protect this community – because we deserve better, and I won’t back down. = I was proud to celebrate the Fourth of July marching in the Champaign County Freedom Celebration Parade alongside this incredible community. = Late last month, I hosted a ‘Take Action’ meeting in Piatt County. I talked about what the Big Ugly Bill means for working families, how I’m fighting back, and how we all can get involved in strengthening our communities. = During my April town hall, I was particularly moved by Mary and Rachel’s story – a Springfield teacher and her daughter who relies on Medicaid. Please click to watch. = Photo from another recent gathering in Jerseyville. I’m continuing to reach out to folks across the district, and advocate for our future on everything from fighting for Medicaid and SNAP to demanding at least $500 million in investment at Granite City Works. Our fight is far from over. I hope you’ll continue to stand with me as I work toward progress for working families at home, in Washington, and beyond. Thank you! name: Congressman Mike Collins
subject: Should I run for Senate against a TRUMP IMPEACHER?
body:
I’ve been praying over this.

| | |
---
_**RUN, MIKE, RUN?**_
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp8plg7skpltp4ikehgqvo9jguhpulauf7s38tpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie9pj1cph2bs)
---
[ SHOULD I RUN FOR SENATE AGAINST __TRUMP IMPEACHER__ JON OSSOFF? ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zglocup79itrkm7sliplp9pdlkie3llq5pvr1l60_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie9pj1cph2bs)
---
July 2025 Patriot, ** ****I agree with you -- Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff must go.** He _DOES NOT_ represent the vast majority of Georgians. He _DOES NOT_ represent the vast majority of Americans. ** The fact that he’s ready to launch another SHAM IMPEACHMENT AGAINST TRUMP tells you exactly _how much of a traitor he is_.** ** But here’s the truth: I never planned on ****running for U.S. Senate. ** ** I love what I’m doing now in the** **House of Representatives:** **_> > Laying the groundwork for Trump's Big Beautiful Bill_ **– providing record tax cuts, funding for our ICE heroes, and ending the Green New Scams harming our American farmers _**> > Passing the Laken Riley Act** _– a bill I introduced that makes it easier for the White House to deport illegal aliens; and **_> > Pushing for Mass Impeachments_** – fighting against the judicial coup being run on President Trump and holding Radical Left Judges in check But sometimes it's not about what you WANT to do, but about __what you NEED to do_._ ** That’s why I’m seriously considering taking a swing at Jon Ossoff's Senate seat.** I’ve been praying over it. I’ve been speaking with my family about it. And soon, I’m going to meet with President Trump and see if this is something he actually wants me to do. ** But today, [I need to know if Americans like YOU would support me if I do decide to run](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfssotqabdu2clg8ela3nrjdng60rnj5d5uggq8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie9pj1cph2bs).** Because when I lace up the gloves to fight, there’s NO going back. I’m all in. **_ A final decision has NOT been made yet._** ** I’d love to hear your thoughts on this first.** **[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zccloag6n33ckpgppo4pcqu0ut3chj4ghma7c68o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie9pj1cph2bs)[ Should I run for Senate against TRUMP IMPEACHER Jon Ossoff](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zim4u797fd82hrj88l2j8phf88tu06vd8thto388_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie9pj1cph2bs) ?**
---
[ TELL ME NOW ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z87kq74d13i8lvbsr0sn1im8dnbm4kktbn2r4a00_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie9pj1cph2bs)
---
For Country,
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z66ps9ni0sdkj269kqj8okbufjt5jchmt0ptog88_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie9pj1cph2bs)
---
Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA)America First Conservative
---
[ TELL ME NOW ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfeso6dspkt3dm17koema5radhltspgeq8ibl65o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie9pj1cph2bs)
---
[ SHOULD I RUN FOR U.S. SENATE? ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znk9rm2p5sga5emoac5tqsfnior7ir227ockbhe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1ie9pj1cph2bs)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: What Rep. Fine tweeted is a thinly-veiled death threat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am asking you to join me today in supporting a formal censure against Rep. Fine in the House of Representatives for his dangerous remarks
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1705%2E791427%2EXikEEH)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-censure-fine/?source=em250709-1-full&akid=1705%2E791427%2EXikEEH)
Friend — Another day, another outrageous and hateful statement from Republican members of Congress.
And this certainly isn’t the first time for Rep. Fine.
Before he came to Congress he tweeted a threat at myself and Rashida Tlaib. He said we should consider leaving before he arrived and #BombsAway. He suggested on live TV that Gaza should be nuked. He has even celebrated the death of Palestinian children responding to an image of a deceased child with “Thanks for the pic!” Even Marjorie Taylor Greene and Tucker Carlson condemned him for this. And now he is calling me a “Muslim terrorist.”
**[Friend, this level of hatred and Islamophobia is completely unacceptable for a member of Congress. I am asking you to join me today in supporting a formal censure against Rep. Fine in the House of Representatives for his dangerous remarks. Please, add your name to my petition:**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-censure-fine/?source=em250709-1-full&akid=1705%2E791427%2EXikEEH)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-censure-fine/?source=em250709-1-full&akid=1705%2E791427%2EXikEEH)**
Let me be absolutely clear: What Rep. Fine tweeted last night is a thinly-veiled death threat.
Benjamin Netanyahu has directed the mass murder of tens of thousands of Palestinians — hundreds of thousands in some recent estimates. These are innocent civilians who have been sentenced to either death or an existence of starvation and trauma by the Israeli military’s brutal assault of the Gaza strip.
By calling them my “fellow Muslim terrorists,” Rep. Fine is telling us that he doesn’t see any Palestinians as civilians, but rather targets. And he’s telling us that he thinks me and other Muslims deserve the same fate.
This is the state of much of the Republican party under Trump. Hateful, racist, violent, and completely devoid of compassion for their fellow human beings.
If they have any moral fiber left in their bodies, Republicans would call on Randy Fine to resign. But we all know they won’t, which is why I’m asking for your help in pushing for a formal censure in the House.
**[Please, sign on to my petition today calling for Rep. Fine to be censured for his violent rhetoric and racist comments against myself and millions of Muslim Americans. People like this have no business serving in government or making decisions that impact the lives of Americans.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-censure-fine/?source=em250709-1-full&akid=1705%2E791427%2EXikEEH)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-censure-fine/?source=em250709-1-full&akid=1705%2E791427%2EXikEEH)**
No matter the amount of vitriol and hate they throw my way, I will never back down.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1705%2E791427%2EXikEEH)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1705%2E791427%2EXikEEH)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1705%2E791427%2EXikEEH)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1705_791427_XikEEH&akid=1705%2E791427%2EXikEEH)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Elect State Dems (via DLCC.org)
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
The first big test of the Trump 2.0 era will come this November in Virginia, where our Democratic majority in the House and the governorship are on the line. | | |
---
| |
---|---
We know you probably receive a lot of fundraising emails from Democrats and progressive organizations asking for a donation – _including from the DLCC!_ And, yes, we will ask for your financial support in this email, but first, we wanted to give you three reasons why you should consider funding the DLCC’s critical work.
1. With Donald Trump and his MAGA allies in control of the federal government, **Democratic majorities in the states are our most effective firewall** against far-right extremism. Our work is wholly focused on electing local Democrats and ousting MAGA extremists who’ve infiltrated state legislatures.
**[$7 helps defeat MAGA Republicans](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDgicZfgb3kpC3Q-b6VCjsBfVXrsjnR2sodHjHqKUQamp39zUcHZaheiHsiLiw0Rx8zbbkZkRsl9x1DzL1bxrUB-u8vuOakJhIeJeTAZ5ZOy_8olQmbAtipWyWseaAlsiXmzEfben08z6kGfvzyaT-CEz7hNDypyOlKLxoHmIApJHS5F-DupZyT8GlysfchFZBTUW8c_sQy4wL9fPwmopEpPv7bY57gM6w-5539eVa33TVG8mgQcCxHR3YG2PtqCRJ33wkPuczyqpzQjSMHXHoJiaT03N7ZPRJ2nIvGRQdLjU8wCCCV-pH8307K5tjd96VY-FyffNR-5l9nx910wNNWA/4i1/nyq6Aby-QQGRY3iThxMUmQ/h0/h001.tLBXkxrYn1MhXrYhMaInQcIqFWliy63rCpblpc9D6Uo)**

2. The first big test of the Trump 2.0 era will come this November in Virginia, where our Democratic majority in the House _and_ the governorship are on the line. To ensure we meet this moment, **we’re investing seven figures** in the commonwealth to help protect and expand our majority.
**[$7 helps protect our majorities](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDgicZfgb3kpC3Q-b6VCjsBfVXrsjnR2sodHjHqKUQamp39zUcHZaheiHsiLiw0Rx8zbbkZkRsl9x1DzL1bxrUB-u8vuOakJhIeJeTAZ5ZOy_8olQmbAtipWyWseaAlsiXmzEfben08z6kGfvzyaT-CEz7hNDypyOlKLxoHmIApJHbVekAPZm8kkertIcGOFcn5fVTpQUtpoh_lIVY-eQ6LncmaBaodsMMTsVLbGBYeHQ0R3ktAc937MD5wnwsYEnHKzUVqDo2Iw2rZPL8SUtFH2L5VypiQ2ZIONW6RtzMKSO7wd_KKW4QerHJYst0SHZEsBfAIAMplAWnW4J8QUTVgQ/4i1/nyq6Aby-QQGRY3iThxMUmQ/h1/h001.HSe4o1q38acppt85CiuXZ6nr61J9OwT7LDjcOAU--m8)**

3. **We’ve released our 2025-2026 Target Map** , focusing on 11 states that our data-driven and evidence-based strategy has pinpointed as the battlegrounds for winning more legislative majorities and defeating MAGA extremism.
**[$7 helps fuel our strategy](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDgicZfgb3kpC3Q-b6VCjsBfVXrsjnR2sodHjHqKUQamp39zUcHZaheiHsiLiw0Rx8zbbkZkRsl9x1DzL1bxrUB-u8vuOakJhIeJeTAZ5ZOy_8olQmbAtipWyWseaAlsiXmzEfben08z6kGfvzyaT-CEz7hNDypyOlKLxoHmIApJGfB4Tqk7IOk-8aoCVtX6IDDjd11P6rz6jixCW9rohf3eSgXU5CbBhCyEO1ZkNmgtpljVFRuadNzW8jG4_ikERTB_7Lf4syhf2omZM_WaO_N0174TT8kSYkftyG5Fh9lp0AqzrJXlDbGN5wGuahGHgdHD_lMYxU5I-CtJyOvScEog/4i1/nyq6Aby-QQGRY3iThxMUmQ/h2/h001.PlT64VHLhFcVIgSdXwOdlm36nTRF_8GsdMQnNSSpPJ4)**
[Every dollar you donate helps support the critical mission of electing Democrats to state legislatures nationwide. body:
It’s been a busy year since the start of the 119th Congress and President Trump’s inauguration — and we’ve hit the ground running.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6583296fc807/were-keeping-our-promises?e=203c27af0d)
---
[|
---](https://erinhouchin.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=060500d14b42b6eab7cf78f6a&id=f4c4ddb0e0&e=203c27af0d)
| | | | |
# We’re Keeping our Promises: The One Big, Beautiful Bill is Now Signed into Law.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Good afternoon,It’s been a busy year since the start of the 119th Congress and President Trump’s inauguration — and we’ve hit the ground running. House Republicans are working around the clock to fulfill the promise of the America First Agenda that 77 million Americans voted for.The** One Big Beautiful Bill — **the cornerstone of our legislative agenda — has **passed the House** **and Senate. President Trump signed the bill into law on July 4th. **This bill will:
✅ Prevent the largest tax increase in American history
✅ End taxes on tips and overtime pay
✅ Unleash American energy production
✅ Protect and strengthen Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security
✅ Finish the border wall and secure our southern border
✅ Make government more efficient
✅ Return America to peace through strength**READ MY LATEST OP-ED:**[**“A ‘Big, Beautiful’ Pro-Growth Agenda Built for Main Street, not Wall Street” \- **_**The Hill**_](https://erinhouchin.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=060500d14b42b6eab7cf78f6a&id=b86108a091&e=203c27af0d)
---
| [FOX BUSINESS: White House Highlights Financial Impact of 'No Tax on Tips' in Trump's 'Big, Beautiful Bill’](https://erinhouchin.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=060500d14b42b6eab7cf78f6a&id=30213a0191&e=203c27af0d)
---
| [BREITBART: ‘Least We Can Do for the Sacrifices They Make’: Rep. Houchin and Police Chief Champion Big Beautiful Bill](https://erinhouchin.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=060500d14b42b6eab7cf78f6a&id=1ba78e53ca&e=203c27af0d)
---
|
---
| But as always, **Democrats are doing everything they can to distort the truth and spread lies** about this bill — because they know it puts the American people back in charge.[**WATCH HERE:**](https://erinhouchin.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=060500d14b42b6eab7cf78f6a&id=7df70b7cd6&e=203c27af0d)[ ](https://erinhouchin.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=060500d14b42b6eab7cf78f6a&id=c90f2c5248&e=203c27af0d)Members of Congress remained united in their commitment to deliver the One Big Beautiful Bill to President Trump’s desk. We can’t afford to slow down. The 2026 midterms are right around the corner, and we must hold the House majority if we want to **keep codifying President Trump’s agenda and make it law**.That’s why I need your help today. Will you chip in $10, $25, or even $50 to help us fight back, win in 2026, and secure a stronger, safer, and freer America?With Gratitude,
Erin Houchin

body:
Peter,

Last week, Republicans quickly passed Donald Trump's America-last budget bill just before the 4th of July, _and I'm livid._

This bill guts Medicaid, strips resources from our public schools, and turns its back on rural hospitals, job training programs, and everyday Missourians just trying to make ends meet. This has never been about making things better for Americans. For Trump and his allies, _**it's always been about putting themselves and their corporate enablers first.**_

But what exactly does this bill mean for Missourians? Let me explain.

First, there’s the **$900 billion in Medicaid cuts** over the next ten years, then, **$300 billion from SNAP** that will strip away food and health services from families who rely on them — just to hand another tax break to the wealthiest Americans. This will put healthcare coverage for over 150,000 of our neighbors at risk.

There’s also a provision in this big mess of a bill that slashes funding for infrastructure projects like new roads, bridges, clean water systems, and broadband expansion, which threaten the very investments rural and working communities need to grow and stay connected.

I didn’t run for Congress to sit quietly while budgets like this get forced on our communities. I ran to fight for working people, for the middle class, for the promise that if you work hard, you can build a good life right here in Missouri.

We can’t stop fighting Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda. But I can’t fight alone.

[**Chip in $5, or anything you can, to tell Trump and his extremist friends that we will NOT sit idly by while they play games with the livelihood of real people. >> Joe Biden's presidency _was_ a scandal.** That's the explosive revelation from a recent hearing chaired by conservative Senator**Eric Schmitt**(R-MO), this hearing exposed a constitutional crisis that should outrage every American. For four years, Biden routinely forgot the names of senior advisors and foreign leaders. He asked about deceased friends as if they were still alive. He froze up and drifted off during critical public appearances. He required stabilizing shoes because he kept falling down. But the lying was just the beginning. The Justice Department is now reviewing over 1,200 "signed" documents to determine if they're even legally valid. Biden's staff used the autopen even when he was physically present in Washington, D.C. Why? clean_body: | | | | Most presidencies have scandals. Joe Biden's presidency was a scandal. That's the explosive revelation from a recent hearing chaired by conservative SenatorEric Schmitt(R-MO), this hearing exposed a constitutional crisis that should outrage every American. For four years, Biden routinely forgot the names of senior advisors and foreign leaders. He asked about deceased friends as if they were still alive. He froze up and drifted off during critical public appearances. He required stabilizing shoes because he kept falling down. And for four years, Democrats and their allies orchestrated a massive cover-up. Senator Schmitt played a damning video montage of senior Democrats brazenly lying about Biden's mental fitness. But the lying was just the beginning. The hearing revealed the outrageous abuse of President Biden's "autopen" signature machine. A majority of Biden's official documents were never actually signed by the president himself. The Justice Department is now reviewing over 1,200 "signed" documents to determine if they're even legally valid. Biden's staff used the autopen even when he was physically present in Washington, D.C. Why? Because this wasn't about Biden's convenience — it was about whoever was really calling the shots behind the scenes. The evidence was so damning that Judiciary Committee Democrats literally ran away from the hearing room rather than face the truth. Every Biden Policy May Be Illegal All of Biden's unconstitutional executive orders, his crony policies, his corrupt family pardons — they may all be completely illegal. The entire administration appears to have been a criminal conspiracy from day one. Conservative senators didn't back down. Senator Josh Hawley (R-MO) demanded investigations into who was controlling the autopen. Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX) exposed how autopen usage suspiciously increased every year of Biden's presidency. Senator Ashley Moody (R-FL) connected this constitutional crisis to real-world disasters: the border invasion, the crime wave, the protection of criminals and terrorists. We Need More Fighters in 2026 The senators who stood up during this hearing — who refused to let this scandal be buried — are exactly the kind of conservatives we need more of in Washington. That's why the Senate Conservatives Fund is going ALL-IN to support proven fighters in 2026. Ashley Moody is running for Senate in Florida. She's been fearless in exposing the truth about Biden's failed policies and their devastating consequences. Roger Marshall in Kansas, Bill Hagerty in Tennessee, and Cynthia Lummis in Wyoming are battle-tested conservatives who've never backed down from a fight. And businessman Nate Morris , an anti-establishment insurgent in Kentucky, is working hard to replace Mitch McConnell in the Senate. These five leaders have proven they'll stand up to the establishment, expose corruption, and fight for constitutional government. But they're facing millions in attacks from liberal donors and the DC swamp. Here's How You Can Fight Back The Senate Conservatives Fund makes it easy to support ALL FIVE of these conservative champions with a single contribution. We'll pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your candidate contributions directly to their campaigns. ▶︎ Support Ashley Moody's fight for Florida's Senate seat ▶︎ Help Roger Marshall continue his conservative leadership in Kansas ▶︎ Back Bill Hagerty's principled stand in Tennessee ▶︎ Strengthen Cynthia Lummis's voice for Wyoming values ▶︎ Help Nate Morris replace Mitch McConnell in Kentucky Every dollar you give goes directly to these campaigns to help them fight back against the liberal establishment and win decisive victories in 2026. The Biden cover-up proves what we've always known: the DC swamp will do anything to maintain power, even if it means shredding the Constitution. We need senators who will never stop fighting to expose the truth and restore constitutional government. Don't let this scandal be forgotten. Don't allow it to go unpunished. Don't let these conservative fighters stand alone. The future of conservative governance depends on electing more fighters like Ashley Moody, Roger Marshall, Bill Hagerty, Cynthia Lummis, and Nate Morris. Your contribution today will help ensure they have the resources to win in 2026. Together, we can build a conservative majority that will never again allow such a constitutional crisis to unfold in America. For America, Co-Founder & CEO Senate Conservatives Fund P.S. Senator Schmitt called this "a scandal bigger than Watergate." Help us elect leaders who will never stop fighting to expose corruption and defend our Constitution. | END OF MONTH DEADLINE | Secure America's future. Support Senate Conservatives. name: Congressman Mike Collins
subject: Should I run for Senate against a TRUMP IMPEACHER?
body:
I’ve been praying over this.

| | |
---
_**RUN, MIKE, RUN?**_
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zal1blinn7m5hg2fj1b2o6vkdut71mgt1o2rd468_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chg60oj6cjh2bs)
---
[ SHOULD I RUN FOR SENATE AGAINST __TRUMP IMPEACHER__ JON OSSOFF? ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z962cgl44g0tigf1j7lc2jltun7aheqn43aait3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chg60oj6cjh2bs)
---
July 2025 Patriot, ** ****I agree with you -- Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff must go.** He _DOES NOT_ represent the vast majority of Georgians. He _DOES NOT_ represent the vast majority of Americans. ** The fact that he’s ready to launch another SHAM IMPEACHMENT AGAINST TRUMP tells you exactly _how much of a traitor he is_.** ** But here’s the truth: I never planned on ****running for U.S. Senate. ** ** I love what I’m doing now in the** **House of Representatives:** **_> > Laying the groundwork for Trump's Big Beautiful Bill_ **– providing record tax cuts, funding for our ICE heroes, and ending the Green New Scams harming our American farmers _**> > Passing the Laken Riley Act** _– a bill I introduced that makes it easier for the White House to deport illegal aliens; and **_> > Pushing for Mass Impeachments_** – fighting against the judicial coup being run on President Trump and holding Radical Left Judges in check But sometimes it's not about what you WANT to do, but about __what you NEED to do_._ ** That’s why I’m seriously considering taking a swing at Jon Ossoff's Senate seat.** I’ve been praying over it. I’ve been speaking with my family about it. And soon, I’m going to meet with President Trump and see if this is something he actually wants me to do. ** But today, [I need to know if Americans like YOU would support me if I do decide to run](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2kc0fook65u0ng44mi6n17i056hk5rlcqkj5o3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chg60oj6cjh2bs).** Because when I lace up the gloves to fight, there’s NO going back. I’m all in. **_ A final decision has NOT been made yet._** ** I’d love to hear your thoughts on this first.** **[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z28hbme89l1sa34ks6d7jdpanmo3s9kkalnkl71g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chg60oj6cjh2bs)[ Should I run for Senate against TRUMP IMPEACHER Jon Ossoff](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zms22gjjnfmqb1uoh65dh744o779jnsd8mf5n9og_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chg60oj6cjh2bs) ?**
---
[ TELL ME NOW ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgl22489df8g3vang9gs54c0mmo5v7r33d8rvff0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chg60oj6cjh2bs)
---
For Country,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zroo995elbcaij3c6t3uvcmttkp6jhkch1if4ck0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chg60oj6cjh2bs)
---
Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA)America First Conservative
---

---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Time and time again, this people-powered movement has stepped up to the fight.
One of the best political lessons I’ve ever learned was from you. The lesson? When people keep pushing, when they don’t back down from the fight, we _win._ Time and time again, this people-powered movement has stepped up to the fight. During Donald Trump’s first term, we successfully beat back the repeal of the _Affordable Care Act._ We need to build the support to hold him accountable this time. Right now, our fundamental freedoms — reproductive rights, voting rights, Medicaid and Social Security — are under constant attack by extreme Republicans who will stop at nothing to turn back the clock on progress. The truth is: We can’t afford to take breaks when they never stop. [**_Today, I’m asking you to double down with me: Please consider making a monthly donation to fuel the fight ahead._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111165392/556438774/246949951?amount=10&recurring=yes&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.09_Recurring_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiYjdkZC1mNDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pml61n4FVHnqTkQIwFdpCj8Cv653LAhOjvEhhMkDesE=) I know a monthly gift is a big ask. Monthly grassroots donations give us the steady, reliable resources to organize, reach voters and uplift Democrats across the country who will stand up for our rights and for our future. We need to stay ahead of the GOP’s millions in dark money. **Will you help us stay ahead of the GOP and make a monthly donation today?** | | [Yes, I'll make a monthly gift >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111165393/556438775/246949951?amount=10&recurring=yes&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.09_Recurring_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiYjdkZC1mNDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pml61n4FVHnqTkQIwFdpCj8Cv653LAhOjvEhhMkDesE=)

KG

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” is law. Here’s what’s next:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111165444/556438942/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTQ0OGIwMS1mNTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Epaed8Xw-sc__5sCWh6Awn79yfAoXVYiZBKPyWh8IfQ=&emci=3b448b01-f55c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=55448b01-f55c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894) Derek, On July 4th, Donald Trump signed his so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill” into law—the bill that guts health care, food assistance, clean energy, and more to pay for massive tax giveaways for the ultra-rich. **All while it drives up trillions in new debt and jacks up energy costs.** Make no mistake, this bill will leave people sicker, hungrier, and struggling to get by. _It’s morally bankrupt—and every single Republican who voted for it should buckle up to hear from their voters at the polls._ **I know we can take back the House. And the fight to do that starts right here, in PA-17.** I’m the only Democrat in a battleground seat in Pennsylvania, so if we don’t hold the line here, we risk losing the fight altogether. [**So if you’re ready to send a message to Trump and every Republican who voted for this cruel bill, then please, chip in now help protect PA-17 and flip the House blue →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111165445/556438943/-898016266?refcode=email_070925_flipthehouse&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTQ0OGIwMS1mNTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Epaed8Xw-sc__5sCWh6Awn79yfAoXVYiZBKPyWh8IfQ=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111165446/556438944/-898016266?refcode=email_070925_flipthehouse&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTQ0OGIwMS1mNTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Epaed8Xw-sc__5sCWh6Awn79yfAoXVYiZBKPyWh8IfQ=)
---
Polls show that 55% of voters opposed this bill. Yet Republicans rammed it through— _it barely passed in the House and in the Senate!_
The message from voters couldn’t be more obvious: we don’t want this. But Republicans ignored us—and now they need to be held accountable.
I’m determined to show Republicans that this bill isn’t just unpopular, it’s bad politics and it’s going to help Democrats take back the House and put an end to Trump’s agenda.
But to do that, I’m going to need strong grassroots supporters like you standing with me to show that Americans want a government that works for everybody—not just billionaires and huge corporations.
[**Our work starts right here in the battleground of PA-17. clean_body: Derek, On July 4th, Donald Trump signed his so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill” into law—the bill that guts health care, food assistance, clean energy, and more to pay for massive tax giveaways for the ultra-rich. All while it drives up trillions in new debt and jacks up energy costs. Make no mistake, this bill will leave people sicker, hungrier, and struggling to get by. It’s morally bankrupt—and every single Republican who voted for it should buckle up to hear from their voters at the polls. I know we can take back the House. And the fight to do that starts right here, in PA-17. I’m the only Democrat in a battleground seat in Pennsylvania, so if we don’t hold the line here, we risk losing the fight altogether. = | | = Polls show that 55% of voters opposed this bill. Yet Republicans rammed it through— it barely passed in the House and in the Senate! The message from voters couldn’t be more obvious: we don’t want this. But Republicans ignored us—and now they need to be held accountable. I’m determined to show Republicans that this bill isn’t just unpopular, it’s bad politics and it’s going to help Democrats take back the House and put an end to Trump’s agenda. But to do that, I’m going to need strong grassroots supporters like you standing with me to show that Americans want a government that works for everybody—not just billionaires and huge corporations. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks for standing with me, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Justice Democrats
subject: This is dangerous. Ilhan needs us—now.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is
unacceptable.

An incumbent Republican Congressman just unleashed a vile, Islamophobic
smear against Ilhan—calling her a terrorist in broad daylight:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250709-1-io?refcode=em20250709-36827&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36827_1203867_HN9p-K&akid=36827%2E1203867%2EHN9p-K ]Tweet from Congressman Randy Fine replying to Ilhan Omar. His tweet
reads: “I'm sure it is difficult to see us welcome the killer of so many
of your fellow Muslim terrorists. The only shame is that you serve in
Congress.” Below is a quoted tweet from Ilhan Omar stating: “This is
Benjamin Netanyahu’s third visit to DC this year. War criminals should not
be welcomed by any president or Congress. He should be held accountable
for his crimes, not platformed...

And this isn’t even the first time he has spewed his violent bigotry. He
has attacked Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib with Islamophobia in the past and
has even called for Gaza to be destroyed with nuclear weapons.

Comments like these not only endanger the few Muslim leaders in Congress,
but put a target on the backs of every Muslim in this country, including
the ones Rep. Fine represents in Florida.

This rhetoric isn’t just bigoted—it’s dangerous. We’ve seen where this
kind of dehumanization leads. It’s not just words. It’s incitement.

All because Ilhan dared to speak out—because she’s calling out Trump for
welcoming war criminal Benjamin Netanyahu to the White House with open
arms.

And for that, they’re trying to silence her with hatred, lies, and
threats. We can’t let this stand. Not now. Not ever.

Ilhan needs to know we have her back in this moment of crisis—not next
week, not tomorrow. AIPAC may be gearing up to spend millions to unseat
progressive champion and Squad member Rep. Ilhan Omar next year, so we
need your support right now.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250709-1-io?refcode=em20250709-36827&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36827_1203867_HN9p-K&akid=36827%2E1203867%2EHN9p-K ]Please—rush a split contribution between Ilhan and Justice Democrats
today. Show the GOP that when they come for one of us, they face all of
us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250709-1-io?refcode=em20250709-36827&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36827_1203867_HN9p-K&akid=36827%2E1203867%2EHN9p-K ]Contribute $5

Thank you for standing with Ilhan when it matters most.

More soon,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250709-36827-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36827_1203867_HN9p-K&akid=36827%2E1203867%2EHN9p-K

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36827%2E1203867%2EHN9p-K

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Hey friends,
I'm back from vacation and sat down with Don Lemon for what turned into one of the most raw, unfiltered conversations I've had in a long time.
We talked about:
* The horrifying flood in Texas and whether slashed budgets at FEMA and NOAA left people unprepared.
* The deafening silence from mainstream media and why reporters are being told to "watch their tone" instead of doing their jobs.
* How Donald Trump's "big, beautiful" cuts are coming back to haunt his own voters--and what that says about leadership in America today.

And yes--we also had to talk about **Grok 's Hitler nightmare**, Linda Yaccarino's shocking exit from X, and the so-called "America Party" that Elon Musk is toying with. The stakes of this AI, media, and politics mashup couldn't be higher, and honestly, too many people are asleep at the wheel.
👉 **This is one of those episodes you don 't want to miss.**
We deserve leaders who take responsibility. We deserve a government that's ready when disaster strikes. And we deserve journalism that tells the truth, not one that's muzzled by billionaires and fear.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..84E5Z1SswsEWrznQzVdL5AwWEX8FeOy0yNceVnFUxC4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167925672)
With urgency,
--Mike
