clean_body: Watch now (36 mins) | Mike Nellis and Don Lemon -- every Wednesday at 1 p.m. ET | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | Mike Nellis and Don Lemon -- every Wednesday at 1 p.m. ET | | and | Jul 9 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Hey friends, I'm back from vacation and sat down with Don Lemon for what turned into one of the most raw, unfiltered conversations I've had in a long time. We talked about: The horrifying flood in Texas and whether slashed budgets at FEMA and NOAA left people unprepared. The deafening silence from mainstream media and why reporters are being told to "watch their tone" instead of doing their jobs. How Donald Trump's "big, beautiful" cuts are coming back to haunt his own voters--and what that says about leadership in America today. And yes--we also had to talk about Grok 's Hitler nightmare, Linda Yaccarino's shocking exit from X, and the so-called "America Party" that Elon Musk is toying with. The stakes of this AI, media, and politics mashup couldn't be higher, and honestly, too many people are asleep at the wheel. 👉 This is one of those episodes you don 't want to miss.** We deserve leaders who take responsibility. We deserve a government that's ready when disaster strikes. And we deserve journalism that tells the truth, not one that's muzzled by billionaires and fear. I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber. With urgency, --Mike | A guest post by| of The Don Lemon Show Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111165755/556440011/-661510028?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_ThreeNumbers_250709_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWJmZTU4YS1mNjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L6tdFXvIwA-skuEZTU88cN1zKHT_cc4AKIG9AawQx1I=) Team, here are 3 numbers you need to know _right now:_

**$9.7 million.** That’s how much Vivek Ramaswamy has raised in _just four months_ — the most ever for a first-time gubernatorial candidate in Ohio history. These funds came from GOP megadonors lining up behind his far-right campaign and don’t even include how much he’s donated himself. He’s already backed by Trump, J.D. Vance, and a tidal wave of GOP megadonors.

**$172 million.** That’s how much Republicans have raised _just this cycle_. That war chest is already being used to pour dark money into Ohio to support Trump loyalists like Vivek Ramaswamy and Senator Jon Husted, and to protect MAGA control across the country.

**$19.84.** That’s our average grassroots donation this year. We don’t have billionaire donors or super PACs. We’re building a movement powered by real people who care about defending democracy in every corner of our state.

[**_Can you chip in $19.84 — our average grassroots donation amount — to help us compete with the GOP’s billionaire-funded machine?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111165756/556440012/-661510028?amount=19.84&refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_ThreeNumbers_250709_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWJmZTU4YS1mNjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L6tdFXvIwA-skuEZTU88cN1zKHT_cc4AKIG9AawQx1I=)

If we’re going to compete at the ballot box next year, we need to act now while there’s still time to shape the race.

Thank you,

---
Since taking office for a second term, Trump has:

❌ Claimed unlimited executive power under Article II
❌ Attempted to deport individuals without due process
❌ Ignored court rulings that checked his power

And now, he and his allies are pushing the dangerous idea that a sitting president should be immune from criminal prosecution.

**That’s why Democrats are fighting to pass the No Kings Act—legislation that makes one thing crystal clear: no president is above the law.**

The No Kings Act would:
✔️ Affirm that presidents can be held criminally accountable
✔️ Reject any claim of blanket presidential immunity
✔️ Reinforce the rule of law and the separation of powers

If we believe in democracy, we have to act like it. **[Add your name now to support the No Kings Act before our critical midnight deadline!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111166046/556441531/-625024737?refcode=DOTL_20250709_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0M2YzNGY2LWY2NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5vcSMxaqi_FUPlHE5BLXl90pwzPgmVO3WZniJiM5VII=&emci=8cf3bdab-e25c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e43f34f6-f65c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14887570)**

# ACTION ALERT: DEPARTMENT OF STATE HEALTH SERVICES PROPOSES RULES CHANGES FOR EXEMPTIONS!
|
---
For nearly ten years, TFVC has fought to make the vaccine **exemption process more streamlined and parent-friendly**. In the 89th Legislative Session, our work paid off with the passage of HB 1586 (Hull/Kolkhorst), which requires the Department of State Health Services to develop a blank affidavit form that can be printed at home. **This change will finally put the power in Texas parents’ hands!** In addition to the battle for printable exemptions, TFVC and lawmakers fought valiantly to protect college students enrolling in coursework in the **healthcare and veterinary fields**. Current DSHS rules do not permit these particular students to exempt themselves from required vaccinations, but this conflicts with actual Texas law. We are thrilled to report that the Department of State Health Services is finally adopting rules that would not only address the new printable exemption law, but also come into alignment with **statute protecting healthcare and veterinary college students!** Their proposed rule change to 25 TAC 97.62, [included here](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU5NDc1NDM3MDE5MzM0MDUwLFwiclwiOjE1OTQ3NTQ3NDk3MjU0MjA3M30iLCJzIjoiNzc0NmNmOWIyZTRjYjM1YyJ9), significantly updates agency rules to provide blank affidavit forms that can be **printed without having to provide any identifying personal information** and specifies that Texans enrolling in public pre-K through 12th grade programs, as well as childcare facilities and all colleges and universities _including medical and veterinary programs_ , have a right to use these affidavits to exempt themselves from required vaccines. **PUBLIC COMMENTS ABOUT THESE CHANGES ARE BEING ACCEPTED NOW THROUGH JULY 18!** **Make your voice heard by emailing DSHS today in support of these changes!**

|

| | [ Click here to generate an email to DSHS! ](mailto:HHSRulesCoordinationOffice@hhs.texas.gov?subject=Comments%20on%20Proposed%20Rule%2025R041&body=To%20Whom%20It%20May%20Concern%2C%0A%0AThank%20you%20for%20quickly%20proposing%20rules%20changes%20to%20provide%20a%20blank%20Reasons%20of%20Conscience%20Affidavit%20on%20the%20agency%20website%20in%20order%20to%20comply%20with%20recently-passed%20HB%201586.%20%0A%0AI%20would%20also%20like%20to%20thank%20DSHS%20for%20bringing%20agency%20rules%20into%20alignment%20with%20Texas%20Education%20Code%2051.933%20by%20specifying%20that%20veterinary%20and%20medical%20school%20students%20can%20utilize%20this%20affidavit%20to%20exempt%20themselves%20from%20required%20vaccines.%0A%0AI%20fully%20support%20this%20new%20language%20and%20look%20forward%20to%20its%20adoption.%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)

**SUBJECT:** Comments on Proposed Rule 25R041 **SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE:** To Whom It May Concern, Thank you for quickly proposing rules changes to provide a blank Reasons of Conscience Affidavit on the agency website in order to comply with recently-passed HB 1586. I would also like to thank DSHS for bringing agency rules into alignment with Texas Education Code 51.933 by specifying that veterinary and medical school students can utilize this affidavit to exempt themselves from required vaccines. I fully support this new language and look forward to its adoption. Thank you,

body:
| | | **** ******** **** **** **** **** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQspAbPSpPuaj1jgwGWpjiBAgePscIpYXv9ygB3e1J1-ofldDfPIzOIMQlLP18Jn8YfCKagP_1GLFkuic09LW8HvFNrhIGgif-fzZlP8GUN6CBikY3y3zkP3kA93P474xeFKULPmGjJfuSFEJzWu5SmO4S7BeQJMcejBUAoPoxPV6I-8xtrpvzwJYdJ3AN8JB7uYjU9Fa2GB3EmZsV4GAyH7-JS8N-8ct0tCYLGsy-mr4zfDBIsBEkED60P2u-ULTlGp8-KFWcD7iMJ5TMmf65GbQ/4i1/Csbn7hivQGqQK7EU5qHPeA/h0/h001.UaqUaLQFrOZQpTmWQS47w3jnGIypKavdAaNeIJYpsMI)
As we mark July as Disability Pride Month, we honor the strength, diversity, and resilience of our vibrant community. This month is a celebration of disability as a natural part of the human experience, and it reinforces the belief that every individual deserves to live with dignity, access, and opportunity. However, amid our celebrations, we face ongoing challenges. There are those who seek to dismantle the crucial programs that support us, threatening our progress and well-being. Unfortunately, many Republican lawmakers are pushing policies that erode the very systems upon which we depend. It is imperative that we elect leaders who are dedicated to advancing disability rights and ensuring a just, accessible America for all. **Able Dems is committed to this cause. We are launching a critical ad campaign to hold accountable those who undermine our rights and to elect Democrats—both those with disabilities and our staunch allies—who will advocate passionately for our community.** [**But we need your help. This Disability Pride Month, join us in our fight for justice and equality. Your donation to Able Dems will help us build a brighter future where everyone is treated with respect and dignity.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQshfxOMHBXLnsHYw0j60qSdRgDiMik5t7pSMY0qu0aw9THQ9bGsQR8G2U9-_AZkLFcQ0Uk7awXC_sOYv9qqkK6H9whZhGBXz3Bp-s_q1Hz6BjeHU9qrVdHoZpdxeIbkuGBrzaNB6Rn3ZhvbhYMu1aFAPu4TVwEI0M5pR8yJD1L9PBVA5SIC5HSrfnxTbebKprpZda3iBYrGoCzIyecRdYKeFG6ubXh41hqYuJ41kPsF4Zapqiy_iX1NbGKyq2dC2zXA3ZObY334oR2e9n-QrNBLI/4i1/Csbn7hivQGqQK7EU5qHPeA/h1/h001.0PkQ1lsf7pgtXKUoPFm8P_vwpfkqUJY7a4swVzChwwI) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | ** **** As we mark July as Disability Pride Month, we honor the strength, diversity, and resilience of our vibrant community. This month is a celebration of disability as a natural part of the human experience, and it reinforces the belief that every individual deserves to live with dignity, access, and opportunity. However, amid our celebrations, we face ongoing challenges. There are those who seek to dismantle the crucial programs that support us, threatening our progress and well-being. Unfortunately, many Republican lawmakers are pushing policies that erode the very systems upon which we depend. It is imperative that we elect leaders who are dedicated to advancing disability rights and ensuring a just, accessible America for all. Able Dems is committed to this cause. We are launching a critical ad campaign to hold accountable those who undermine our rights and to elect Democrats—both those with disabilities and our staunch allies—who will advocate passionately for our community. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thank you for your unwavering support. \- Jeff Person, Founder, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. # **[SCOTUS Issues Ruling On Trump Layoffs](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The U.S. Supreme Court has granted the Trump administration permission to proceed with sweeping layoffs across the federal government, lifting a lower court injunction and allowing an executive order issued in February to take effect. The unsigned order, issued Tuesday in an 8–1 decision, clears the way for agencies to begin implementing “reductions in force” [...]

There’s no reason why _any_ Member of Congress should be able to trade individual stocks, especially when they’re making policy decisions that have a direct impact on our economy. **[Add your name to our petition now if you agree.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111166876/556444370/1478759989?contactdata=tAws7a4H4c7JLwtyJFMwRrwHSWRzZ1c4SiKCjRx5wYqN+tngaIRD540ds9D2gFZgNJsgQnsQWYd5ocMS3WmfSfOIWdJ+JR9SDJPkfDBE1u7A6G+notbzPxM47XXW9qIdAfFfWZNTVNXipPEPGejxBH9NooGUo+zOltbouhmgzds=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250709_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWJhODc3Zi1mODVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CpMEkh90ioCoYeMYEv0O34y9kOPlByuzwh6W1Cz45hI=&emci=39ba877f-f85c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=45ba877f-f85c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111166877/556444371/1478759989?contactdata=tAws7a4H4c7JLwtyJFMwRrwHSWRzZ1c4SiKCjRx5wYqN+tngaIRD540ds9D2gFZgNJsgQnsQWYd5ocMS3WmfSfOIWdJ+JR9SDJPkfDBE1u7A6G+notbzPxM47XXW9qIdAfFfWZNTVNXipPEPGejxBH9NooGUo+zOltbouhmgzds=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250709_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWJhODc3Zi1mODVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CpMEkh90ioCoYeMYEv0O34y9kOPlByuzwh6W1Cz45hI=&emci=39ba877f-f85c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=45ba877f-f85c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272)

Allowing members of Congress to trade stocks while receiving insider information isn’t just morally wrong — it’s harmful to the trust placed in us by the American people.
There’s no place for it in our democracy.
**[Sign our petition today if you agree that we MUST ban Congressional stock trading.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111166878/556444372/1478759989?contactdata=tAws7a4H4c7JLwtyJFMwRrwHSWRzZ1c4SiKCjRx5wYqN+tngaIRD540ds9D2gFZgNJsgQnsQWYd5ocMS3WmfSfOIWdJ+JR9SDJPkfDBE1u7A6G+notbzPxM47XXW9qIdAfFfWZNTVNXipPEPGejxBH9NooGUo+zOltbouhmgzds=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250709_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWJhODc3Zi1mODVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CpMEkh90ioCoYeMYEv0O34y9kOPlByuzwh6W1Cz45hI=&emci=39ba877f-f85c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=45ba877f-f85c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272)**

Becca

Here's the truth: 🛑 Gavi ignores safety data and pushes vaccines without transparency. 🛑 They prioritize globalist agendas over your family's health. 🛑 We're forced to fund their dangerous policies with our taxes. Peter, I helped expose Dr. Anthony Fauci's blatant lies about the COVID vaccine and myocarditis in young people - and I'm ready to do it again with Gavi. RFK and I are fighting to hold them accountable, but we can't do it alone. We need you on our side in this critical battle. Let's stand together for science, transparency, and the right to make our own health decisions. In liberty, Rand Paul P.S. Every dollar helps amplify our message. name: James Carville
subject: how Democrats can get their mojo back:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Abigail is the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's office this year, and with Trump's inner circle cashing checks to her opponent, it's high time we all stepped up and gave what we can to Abigail Spanberger.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91482?refcode=em20250709-9100&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9100%2E614464%2EysYuYK)
Peter, we've got a situation here.
You all should know by now I'm all in for Abigail Spanberger. She's running one heck of a campaign for Governor of Virginia, criss-crossing the Commonwealth, building a big coalition, and speaking directly to voters on the issues that matter most.
**But here's the problem, and it's a biggie:**
_Abigail's opponent is outspending her on ads._
If we don't make some smart, strategic investments, we could lose the biggest election in the country.
**[Peter, I need you to send a split contribution between Abigail Spanberger and State Democrats Committee right now to fund her outreach to voters. There's no bigger election on the map in 2025, and Abigail has to win big so we can show this huckster in the White House what's what.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91482?refcode=em20250709-9100&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9100%2E614464%2EysYuYK)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91483?refcode=em20250709-9100&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9100%2E614464%2EysYuYK) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91483?refcode=em20250709-9100&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9100%2E614464%2EysYuYK) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91483?refcode=em20250709-9100&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9100%2E614464%2EysYuYK) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91483?refcode=em20250709-9100&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9100%2E614464%2EysYuYK) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91483?refcode=em20250709-9100&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9100%2E614464%2EysYuYK) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91483?refcode=em20250709-9100&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9100%2E614464%2EysYuYK) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91482?refcode=em20250709-9100&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9100%2E614464%2EysYuYK)

Here's the bottom line: The experts say we can win — so long as we act now to stay ahead.
Abigail is the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's office this year, and with Trump's inner circle cashing checks to Winsome Earle-Sears, it's high time we all stepped up and gave what we can to Abigail Spanberger.
I mean it, if you want to see Democrats win and get their mojo back for goodness sake: **there's no campaign more deserving of your dollar than Abigail Spanberger's.**

James Carville

name: Representative Darin Harbick
subject: End of Session Update
body:
| | |
---|---
---
Replies to this message are sent to an unmonitored mailbox.
To contact me, please click here: [Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov](mailto:Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov) |
* * *
---
Dear Neighbors,
As the legislative session comes to a close, I want to take a moment to update you on the work we've done and to thank you for your continued support and engagement. Serving in the super minority means that progress can be difficult and often, we face an uphill battle to ensure that all voices are heard. Being in the super minority isn’t about giving up — it’s about staying grounded in principle, fighting smart, and never forgetting who I work for: you. I’ll be back in the district during the interim and I welcome your thoughts, concerns, and ideas as we prepare for the work ahead.
---
Representative Harbick with Eugene police officers
* * *
---
# SB 243
---
In the last days of session democrats passed [SB 243 C](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSB243/1/01010197f0aca591-c9111a59-1456-4545-bae1-37b0ae956221-000000/Pfsle38Soz5bBEkRH6u_kadB0_MVrwNCXKqE7pVLx_8=413), a deeply flawed gun control measure that does nothing to reduce gun violence, address mental health, or make our communities safer. The bill infringes on Oregonians’ Second Amendment rights by turning those who already own bump stocks and other attachments into criminals, replaces public safety with a door sign, and creates confusion across jurisdictions for concealed handgun license carriers. The bill also delays the implementation of Ballot Measure 114 to March 15, 2026, as the measure faces constitutional court challenges.
House Republicans proposed and made a series of motions to adopt amendments that were ultimately rejected along party lines, including:
* An amenemdment to repeal Ballot Measure 114, which would prevent criminalizing law-abiding Oregonians by repealing Measure 114.
* An amendment that would create concealed carry reciprocity across state lines and would recognize valid Concealed Carry Licenses from other states and allow visitors to exercise their rights when coming to Oregon.
* An amendment to legalize suppressors. As Congress considers the Federal Hearing Protection Act of 2025, the amendment would allow Oregonians to lawfully possess firearm suppressors should there no longer be a registration process at the ATF.

The Democrats’ refusal to adopt amendments that empower Oregonians to protect their families demonstrates that SB 243 is about infringing on the constitutional rights of law-abiding gun owners – not keeping firearms away from criminals.
SB 243 represents yet another unconstitutional attack on law-abiding Oregon gun owners as the majority continues to ignore both America’s and Oregon’s Constitutions while refusing to prosecute or hold accountable hardened criminals and illegal aliens that break our laws. If the Democrat's majority and governor are serious about lowering gun crime, they should focus on raising penalties for crimes committed with a firearm and ensuring that prosecutors have the resources to prosecute criminals. The Oregon Legislature is making it harder and harder for you and your family to protect yourselves.
Thankfully, House Republicans were able to kill a different gun bill [HB 3076.](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FHB3076/1/01010197f0aca591-c9111a59-1456-4545-bae1-37b0ae956221-000000/EC9WOEtmK2J063VCEJBABsCq8z1clNqNnId70k8Z_iY=413) This bill would hurt responsible firearms dealers by adding a new state licensing program, even though arms dealers are already highly regulated by the federal government.
All this bill would have done is add unnecessary strain to small gun dealers and waste taxpayer money on furthering their left-wing liberal agenda.
This was just another attempt by progressive democrats to attack the constitutional rights of their constituents to bear arms and would have done nothing to reduce crime or keep our communities safe.
A motion to rerefer the bill to a dead committee was carried, and the bill died.
* * *
---
# REPUBLICANS STAND UP FOR OREGONIANS WHILE DEMOCRAT LEADERS SCRAMBLE TO ADD BILLIONS MORE IN TAXES TO FUND TRANSPORTATION
---
The 2025 legislative session ended Friday, June 27th at 11:15 p.m. after much last-minute scrambling by Democrats to fund transportation.
Earlier that day, House Republicans delivered a major victory for working-class Oregonians by defeating [HB 2025 B](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FHB2025/1/01010197f0aca591-c9111a59-1456-4545-bae1-37b0ae956221-000000/V7TVhqZ9oIG6cSzjuMikmSbUujKHFNNM6SJ5cUQXnXE=413), one of the largest tax hikes in Oregon’s history. With an estimated $11.7 billion price tag, HB 2025 B would have added dozens of new taxes and fee increases, including a 12-cent gas tax, to fund a progressive left agenda that would harm Oregonians.
In an effort to add a 3-cent gas tax at the 11th hour, Democrats and Governor Tina Kotek attempted to rally votes for a stop-gap funding bill, House Bill 3042, but it didn’t make it to a third reading.
While the governor blamed Republicans for not funding transportation, her party is the one to blame. They didn’t have the support of their constituents for either bill, despite last-minute wheeling and dealing to take from taxpayers.
* * *
---
# Wildfire Maps Finally Repealed
---
I am happy to share that the Legislature has finally passed legislation to repeal the deeply flawed wildfire hazard maps!
SB 83 passed unanimously out of the Senate showing major bipartisan support. However, it got held up in House by the Speaker to try and use as a negotiating chip to steal our Kicker. Republicans tried 5 times to pull the bill out of committee and onto the House Floor for a vote.
On Monday, when eleven Republicans were boycotting the floor due to the transportation fiasco, a Democrat carried the motion to pull SB 83 out of the House Committee on Rules — and it passed nearly unanimously.
And on Tuesday, it was not one of the Republicans who had worked so hard to move this bill forward, who carried it to the floor; it was a Democrat.
This was just one more power move by the majority to take credit for themselves. Democrats said in January that this would be a bipartisan session. Unfortunately, this has turned out to be a session of leverage.
Regardless of the political theater, I am grateful for my Democratic colleagues who worked alongside us to repeal these maps.
* * *
---
# HB 3564
I am pleased to announce that one of my bills, [HB 3564](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FHB3564/1/01010197f0aca591-c9111a59-1456-4545-bae1-37b0ae956221-000000/ewhcPrtMoQAU5HV8TIUycU4nrfLL-4gHYy_wYmM4jY4=413) passed both chambers and got signed into law by the Governor. We worked with the association that represents the news publications in Oregon and the bill flew out of the House unanimously. Unfortunately, once it hit the Senate some journalists opposed the bill, and it got amended down further.
Under current law, in order to bring a defamation claim against a publisher or broadcaster, a plaintiff needs to send the demand for correction or retraction within 20 days after the defamed person receives actual knowledge of the defamatory statement. I felt that timeframe was too short for everyday Oregonians and wanted to extend that window to 40 days. The opponents disagreed and the Senate amended the time extension out of the bill. I will look at this again in future sessions and work to give people who have been victims of defamation by the media more time seek corrections.
The good news now that the bill has passed is that electronic newspapers have been added to the correction/retraction statutes – statutes that have been around since 1955. With the changing media landscape this is something that has been long overdue.
* * *
---
# SESSION RECAP: REPUBLICANS RALLIED FOR OREGONIANS’ TOP CONCERNS, WHILE DEMOCRATS PURSUED A SPECIAL INTEREST, TONE-DEAF, TAX-AND-SPEND AGENDA
At the beginning of this session, Republicans vowed to focus on the challenges that Oregonians face in their day-to-day lives: affordability, housing, education, and homelessness.
On top of defeating HB 2025, Republicans repealed the problematic wildfire hazard map and shot down all but one of the unconstitutional anti-gun bills.
This session, as Democrats gave handouts to special interest groups and supported progressive agendas over the wants and needs of Oregonians they were elected to serve, House Republicans fought to make Oregon a more desirable place to live, work, and raise a family in.
As the session came to an end, I am proud to say that Republicans kept their promises to their constituents, despite being in the superminority. We look forward to continuing to fight for Oregonians who dream of owning a home, for education to be focused on the needs of each individual student, and for restoring safety and livability on our streets and in our neighborhoods.
* * *
---
Now that the long session has come to an end I will be traveling and visiting all the cities and towns that make House District 12 such a great to love. To keep updated on what I'm doing please visit and follow my [Facebook page](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FHarbickForOregon%2F/1/01010197f0aca591-c9111a59-1456-4545-bae1-37b0ae956221-000000/IQAp0vWSkL4l3W4IPos2r0_6nCNKTbIzC11UUONuUOM=413).
Best regards,
Representative Darin Harbick
House District 12
**Capitol Phone:** 503-986-1412
**Capitol Address:** 900 Court St. NE, H-376, Salem, Oregon 97301
**Email:** [Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov](mailto:Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov)
**Website:**[https://www.oregonlegislature.gov/harbick](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fharbick/1/01010197f0aca591-c9111a59-1456-4545-bae1-37b0ae956221-000000/VX8E7uX2jEZ3IiI3VFpRNUpllrE_1MyDGP24LiGRJbg=413)
* * *
**SUBSCRIBER SERVICES OPTIONS:**
**•** To **stop** receiving this newsletter, **add** new newsletters, or**delete** your subscription services click [Manage Preferences](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fpublic.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FORLEG%2Fsubscriber%2Fnew%3Fpreferences=true/1/01010197f0aca591-c9111a59-1456-4545-bae1-37b0ae956221-000000/Ri-RY22u7bbtYTby8W-Lw-3bc7oEuTxPmnDDUIRz7KY=413)
**•** For questions about subscriber services, please email [Help](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsubscriberhelp.govdelivery.com%2F/1/01010197f0aca591-c9111a59-1456-4545-bae1-37b0ae956221-000000/2zoBPi9b_Yl607JxXKWrn28fu1AgEZ545mww7PqFNW8=413) Information provided may not be final and is subject to change.
---
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com using GovDelivery · 707 17th St, Suite 4000 · Denver, CO 80202 · 1-800-439-1420 | [](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsubscriberhelp.granicus.com%2F/1/01010197f0aca591-c9111a59-1456-4545-bae1-37b0ae956221-000000/GXd3BYQuNgLUYI1JFSU1VHtv2xan7hLGgioY2AJUk0E=413)

Peter, last week, Mariannette Miller-Meeks cast her "yes" vote for the Republican tax bill and helped pass this atrocious piece of legislation. She voted to rip healthcare away from over 100,000 of Iowans, threaten the survival of rural hospitals, explode the national debt, and hand billions of dollars to the wealthiest Americans.

_And how did she celebrate?_

1️⃣ **She snapped a _selfie_ with her GOP pals right after the vote** — grinning ear to ear while her constituents brace for higher healthcare costs and fewer care options.

clean_body: 🤢🤢🤢🤢 | = Peter, last week, Mariannette Miller-Meeks cast her "yes" vote for the Republican tax bill and helped pass this atrocious piece of legislation. She voted to rip healthcare away from over 100,000 of Iowans, threaten the survival of rural hospitals, explode the national debt, and hand billions of dollars to the wealthiest Americans. And how did she celebrate? 1️⃣ She snapped a selfie with her GOP pals right after the vote — grinning ear to ear while her constituents brace for higher healthcare costs and fewer care options. = = 2️⃣ She jetted off on Air Force One with DC insiders — who, for the record, couldn’t even be bothered to spell her name right. Maybe because they're too busy soaring above the very people their bill just left behind. = | = ---|--- = 3️⃣ She cozied up to the Republican Party’s elites, the same crowd she always makes time for. If you’re an Iowan worried about losing your healthcare, good luck getting her to listen — unless you come with dollars or status. She’s been running from reporters and constituents for months. = = While Mariannette Miller-Meeks is having the time of her life, Iowans are sitting around kitchen tables trying to figure out what comes next. We deserve better. Christina Bohannan is ready to fight for Iowa families, for working people, and for a future where our leaders care more about us than about photo-ops with party bosses. = If you've saved your payment name: Troy Downing
subject: Democrats have raised $800 MILLION, and they’re not slowing down.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
If you care at all about America’s future, I implore you to read this entire email:

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._QWsEnW4ZdhA)Peter,
**I have alarming news:** Democrats have already raised **_$800 million online_** , and we're not even halfway through 2025:[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**This is a wake-up call for every single one of us who cares about the future of our country.**
Their fundraising juggernaut, ActBlue, is on track to shatter the $1 billion mark before the end of summer.**
****Every dollar they raise is a threat to our values and will be used to try to destroy President Trump's conservative agenda.**
I've seen their plan of attack, and I can tell you that they will stop at nothing to take control of Congress and impose their radical policies on our nation. We can't let that happen.
That's why I need your help today.
We must fight back with every ounce of strength we have.
Your contribution will be used to mobilize conservative voters, support President Trump's agenda, and keep the radical Democrats at bay.
[The stakes are higher than ever, and time is running out. Will you stand with me and fight for the future of our country?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[KEEP TROY IN THE FIGHT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-7x34oM2oJ_beXZw)Donate now and let's show the Democrats that we won't back down.
Sincerely,
**Troy Downing** _Conservative in Congress_| |

clean_body: | = Folks, by now you know that Republicans passed their monstrosity of a bill that rips away health care from millions of Americans. But I can’t help but think: Why did they drag out the vote for so long and in such a dramatic way? We all already knew how they were going to vote. Ever since their cult leader entered the Signal chat, they haven’t been able to stand up for the PEOPLE who put them in office even ONCE. And now that it’s passed, we know they’ll claim that they didn’t know what was in it... They’ll claim that they got duped... They’ll claim that they made a deal... But none of that matters. name: Rob Bonta
subject: ICE is conducting unlawful and unconstitutional stops during immigration raids in CA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
These aggressive, militaristic tactics are not about safety or justice — they’re about intimidation.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em250709&t=1&akid=1868%2E1088799%2EAzT5Qx)
I’m fighting back against the unlawful immigration enforcement tactics that are terrorizing families here in California.
**This week I led a multistate coalition of attorneys general in submitting an amicus brief in support of a lawsuit civil and immigrant rights groups, led by the ACLU of Southern California, filed to stop ICE and Customs and Border Protection from conducting unlawful and unconstitutional stops during immigration raids.**
Tomorrow, the U.S. District Court for the Central District of California will hold a hearing on the temporary restraining order requested to block ICE and CBP’s use of illegal and militaristic enforcement tactics.
[**If you’re ready to hold Kristi Noem, Donald Trump, and the entire administration accountable to the law and the U.S. Constitution, please sign on today →**](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250709-pet-rs/?t=2&akid=1868%2E1088799%2EAzT5Qx)
Let’s be clear about what’s actually happening in our communities: Masked immigration agents are conducting unannounced raids, stopping residents without so much as reasonable suspicion of unlawful activity, and even wrongfully detaining U.S. citizens. People are scared to leave their homes, and communities are left empty.
These unlawful militaristic tactics threaten public safety and public health, and hurt our local economies.
**These aggressive tactics are not about safety or justice — they’re about intimidation, plain and simple.**
We can’t be silent in the face of cruel and unlawful attacks on our immigrant communities. If you agree we need to put a stop to these unconstitutional practices, I’m asking you to stand with me.
[**Add your name today to keep up the fight against ICE and CBP’s cruel and illegal actions.**](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250709-pet-rs/?t=3&akid=1868%2E1088799%2EAzT5Qx)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250709-pet-rs/?t=4&akid=1868%2E1088799%2EAzT5Qx)**
In solidarity,
Rob

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . | Friend, Attorney General Letitia James has thrown her full support behind the antisemitic socialist running for Mayor of New York – Zohran Mamdani. In a newly uncovered video, Mamdani openly called for “seizing the means of production.” Let’s call it what it is: That’s not socialism. That’s full-blown communism. Meanwhile, his partner in crime, Letitia James, has also torn a page out of the same Marxist playbook by weaponizing the legal system to crush dissent and eliminate her opposition. We need to stop this dangerous duo from destroying our Republic. As the ONLY Republican running to FIRE Letitia James, I’m coming to you with an urgent appeal... ...Our campaign has hit the benchmarks set by the state to qualify for a 600% MATCH on grassroots contributions between $5 and $250. That means YOUR donation to kick Letitia James out of office and stop her socialist candidate for mayor could go SIX TIMES FURTHER. Thank you, Michael Henry Republican for New York Attorney General PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY _

Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: You’ll be a part of history
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205fnzdp270w7i3lmp26cd3uc4aymlisptiah4tiwxovyc788cxq2anabutuq9924wn5t8zzfa2kvqpf9bs&__stmp=sz5e9x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h)
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304
---

[Privacy Policy](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=33g5tc4p3i8i0gkprgmp7bfi1tkj4gfhh2s0pmahp0nq55hpfzkwx2zwyx4jl0xsfpow4h72b9c01n5u5l9q2luv7eydovqusr6cb8uxj3dujp0bpl1z2dxmz7qs0z8i801iaejyl2voyd26ea12xi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz5e9x&__onlt=h)

body:
The best kept secret in the global music industry is a shadowy billionaire who hides behind the biggest artists while he funds far-right extremism

| |

* * *
# [How A Billionaire Weaponized Your Favorite Musicians](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=167340183&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3MzQwMTgzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTIwOTE4NDcsImV4cCI6MTc1NDY4Mzg0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._vtVvxy6XVaca14lZoYwOuzHeps0yztBIoGIshEuN3k)
### The best kept secret in the global music industry is a shadowy billionaire who hides behind the biggest artists while he funds far-right extremism
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jul 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=167340183&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3MzQwMTgzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MjA5MTg0NywiZXhwIjoxNzU0NjgzODQ3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uYFIuDPAafpF1v_UbEl29PL9qBV9-win-fpo5OIooqI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=167340183&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3MzQwMTgzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTIwOTE4NDcsImV4cCI6MTc1NDY4Mzg0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._vtVvxy6XVaca14lZoYwOuzHeps0yztBIoGIshEuN3k&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC9ob3ctYS1iaWxsaW9uYWlyZS13ZWFwb25pemVkLXlvdXI_.GnWfdpZ-s3eXYoh0XjyKEizPsty_K1m6xYUj9sQKRT0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/how-a-billionaire-weaponized-your?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Think about some of your favorite musicians. Hold those names for just a moment as you read this. I was told not to write this because it might be "too niche."
But I've learned that justice doesn't only matter when it's convenient or popular--it matters especially when those who seek it are silenced. So let me tell you a story about how the global music industry is being used to whitewash exploitation--and why I'm asking you to take action by the end of this article. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This is made possible by you, the thoughtful person reading this. Join us as a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..k4nAAy1ENQh7bZDKSSa_gQx_t1U5iCABwnadf9UaEiE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167340183)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dfac38a4-c7db-4205-9f39-cc95e3770347?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Vincent Bollore [credit: Getty Images]
## **The Billionaire in the Shadows**
His name is Vincent Bollore. You likely haven't heard of him--but his companies are everywhere. From African shipping ports to French television, from global ad campaigns to the world's most influential music labels, Bollore has an almost dynastic control over media and information.
Through his firm Bollore SE and holding company Vivendi, Bollore quietly built one of the world's most powerful media empires. Still have your favorite musicians in mind? Bollore was the largest shareholder in Universal Music Group--home to artists like Drake, Rihanna, Billie Eilish, Chappell Roan, and Doechii. He controls Canal+, France's dominant TV channel, and a channel that has relentlessly pushed far-right propaganda and platformed sexual predators. His advertising firm, Havas, which is led by one of his sons, handles branding for some of the biggest corporations on Earth.
And underneath this empire lies disturbing truths.
## **The Corruption Trail**
Vincent Bollore and his companies have been investigated for corruption in West Africa. Why? Well, they allegedly offered political consulting to candidates in Togo and Guinea--then received multi-million-euro port concessions after those candidates won. The deals gave Bollore control of vital trade routes. The French courts moved to prosecute. Bollore confessed and in a stunning turn, the court rejected his plea bargain--he is now expected to stand trial.
But justice doesn't end with the courts.
Bollore has used his power not only to enrich himself, but to manipulate public discourse, all while lurking in the shadows and avoiding exposure. His media outlets increasingly broadcast right-wing radical content. His publishing companies have promoted candidates with extremist views. And when he gets a bit of bad news, he sues journalists, censors articles, and suppresses any dissent that comes his way.
A new accountability campaign, the Global Billionaire Accountability Project[ (ExposeDirtyMoney.com](https://substack.com/redirect/65fea41b-7653-44da-89dd-2561059476b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), launched this year to shine a light on Bollore's dealings. It calls for the music industry to cut ties with his corrupt wealth. And this is where you, the music and media consumer can play a meaningful role.
## **Why Music Fans Should Care**
If you listen to music you should care about who profits while you stream.
Billionaires like Bollore bank on our apathy. They need us to not care. When we turn a blind eye to the havoc they wreak in other parts of the world, we provide cover for their assault on human rights, social justice and the freedoms that we hold dear.
Because here's the reality: billions have been made off the backs of African artists, Black artists, and global creatives--while the people profiting at the top have been quietly fueling extremism, abusing legal systems, and cutting corrupt deals with authoritarian regimes. Bollore built his fortune extracting wealth from Africa--and then invested that fortune into the culture economy.
That's not just business. That's laundering through entertainment.
It's not enough to love the art. We have to ask: who owns the infrastructure? Who controls the narrative? And what do those people do with the power we give them?
## **Where We Go From Here**
If this were just one shady billionaire, that would be bad enough. But this is a system where artists are marketed as voices of the people, while the executives above them attack, censor and exploit those very people.
We've seen what happens when money, unchecked, writes its own moral code.
And now, we're seeing what happens when artists, activists, and fans fight back. And we do that by collectively raising our voices and getting behind the Global Billionaire Accountability Project. Take a moment to sign the petition and add your voice.
[Join the Campaign](https://substack.com/redirect/65fea41b-7653-44da-89dd-2561059476b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Not because it's trendy. Not because it's viral.
But because justice demands transparency. Because art deserves integrity. Because Black voices and African economies should not be exploited as props for European billionaires who made their fortune off corruption. We cannot build a future of justice while looking away from all the injustices that fuel our culture.
## **Conclusion**
Unjust actions demand just consequences. This movement is about saying: if you unjustly profit from my streams, you should not be immune from accountability. If you wield global power, you do not get to silence dissent with a legal complaint and a checkbook, while remaining in the shadows and preserving your precious brand.
Vincent Bollore has the wealth, the lawyers, and the platforms. But we have the truth.
Let's use it.
[Join the Campaign](https://substack.com/redirect/65fea41b-7653-44da-89dd-2561059476b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
✍🏽 Sign the petition.
🔗 Share this article.
🎶 Demand that the UMG cut ties and stop cashing in on Bollore's dirty money.

If you wield global power, you do not get to silence dissent with a legal complaint and a checkbook, while remaining in the shadows and preserving your precious brand. Vincent Bollore has the wealth, the lawyers, and the platforms. But we have the truth. Let's use it. ✍🏽 Sign the petition. 🔗 Share this article. 🎶 Demand that the UMG cut ties and stop cashing in on Bollore's dirty money. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Chuck Rocha
subject: 📢 An Opportunity To Make a Difference.
body:
Lending your voice and sharing stories that millions of American's know all too well can make a difference. | |
---
| | |
### _Drugs don't work if people can't afford them._

Dear friends,

We want to take the time this month to highlight our partners and friends that are doing amazing work for our community.
[Patients For Affordable Drugs (P4AD)](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=86a2e5d80f&e=b8f90417f9) is the only national bipartisan patient organization exclusively focused on lowering prescription drug costs. The core of P4AD’s work is **elevating patient stories to create policy change** , and part of our partnership is supporting efforts to i**dentify and engage Latino patients to share their stories in English or Spanish **with lawmakers, in the media, and more. Are you or someone you know struggling with the high cost of prescription drugs? **You're not alone. ** Ready to join P4AD’s cause?
* [Share your story](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=9ba6691c7e&e=b8f90417f9): by amplifying your voice, we aim to drive meaningful policy change that will lower drug costs for everyone.
* [Sign up](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=b97b174f08&e=b8f90417f9): whether you or a loved one is suffering due to high drug prices, there's a way that you can make a positive impact.

---
| [ ](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=7e75e83fbc&e=b8f90417f9 "Comparte tu historia con P4AD")
---
|
The change we need will come when we use our voices! Visit[ PatientsForAffordableDrugs.org](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=7ea2fba4f7&e=b8f90417f9) to learn more and see how you can get involved.

In Solidarity,
Chuck Rocha

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: authoritarianism, plain as day
body:
Peter, what Trump just did should terrify every single person who believes in democracy.
He issued an Executive Order weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after ActBlue — the small-dollar fundraising platform that powers thousands of Democratic campaigns across the country.
Why? Because he’s terrified of us.
He knows grassroots Democrats are his biggest threat — and he’s trying to meddle with our ability to fight back before the election even begins.
This is how authoritarians seize power:
1️⃣ They discredit elections.
2️⃣ They silence the media.
3️⃣ And then — they come for the money.
Trump is officially coming for the money. This is an all hands on deck moment.
This is a targeted, strategic assault on the tools we use to organize, fundraise, and win. We MUST overwhelm him with IMMEDIATE resistance. Rush a donation right now to defend ActBlue, defend grassroots power, and defend our democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=070325_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=070325_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=070325_3&amount=10]

San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=RWjZtB7u93ti1xR9GIZcSkXJC6lOeb9JQ3w3QmVDswDBai4fw8VinUFrGbFbkzsyMLWY4wqArZLlQklydyEVnhv4s%2BoY6mjtapJGeGfxolUBm81DF39hvWruKFBI%2BdaaBpeIhlwIGcXEGaMjU69t3U9kP1C0fbMF0JtPFk%2BXoVb2oPLjYw2XNBu4dorfmo4j8wdLLw9hi7%2B1jcVHfxJG%2BcIHMoTaiGXNjmJwMpQWTodvgTfRhTQ9mbJ4tS%2Bh4jXW1k5A%2F8%2F9Sej4Kzd5mJVGCPURb12Q8uzL3Ljv0YZxbxav%2FPUFSLYw9qIt78ZCHh%2F5PmvwTj%2B%2BphnQ82ijx6lxm6jEJTIoW6zaNeYcRIFSMTR42%2FrA8fCTcl6SBYxIEzHcBuQAk4o3KX225av%2F4y3TGQYRMTgwFBA6%2FxftgulfNjE%3D .

All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. name: Cynthia Lummis
subject: Our work is under threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lummis for Wyoming
body:
Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8b97473c03f841d09ff83c1c94e3ba4f&_e=fwMjYG47godZeR1_ZysSSWcf_YQb_gSx9sag5z_sRlPtCykNgC2-E0aopzdDFfxBs-V_CK94K-hKTIIGiy3CXRX19ViRIVhGjAFDQHVMoMBEyvKlCX_P3hAIU7B4ZV44DePwn6tFVzc_2dnZsMr8BpAne_77OkqsFE80ViBsNBu2zrK1VT76HU8xG3fsQVvPDsqGpl_2EK2MRPkq80MpXiY32K1AvqipvUpjmbu2oo3WYfshfxqynkg0Jj498XX8L1VxutrutTMHHEA_byYc4tt6soF1Od8Hn4u2DhVMOiU3fraJqmOV17_9zW4TgT9sGs2ZAyZ3MT2Lu42pN85rc6B7bBPLVZLXue5XFZ2fbR7rSizo6AQdOUUQbMNRyjLEDVfr-coUDDI99ikI_FK2J73BhO0tGqGOMo0E6uoYGhYBPCxML412FLwFNvROJh7GPpVFletOaM0-0l3korWLPSdSd9GDkjwEgu1YJaeKGJoy7r_mm9-GwoWRHg4If32ZGG13hVNgToVmsQZaRLUYfGK9KLxnV3JLnpX45howVQZJvXyspTLssaU97HhYzK51ap70Lnb1RUH1VQ6uBk3MVT0YFRzwmWYv0fVZg8QyJDNhImk0Xx4i7ZS-WqoOVHe8wfCoOJTkClAtpjVlzqBvpguhN-bLQmQ0MfR61uRbHivxxm5vBde9Uf9eeh9kgMlc)
---
Dear Peter,

I’ve spent my life fighting for Wyoming — because this is my home. I was born and raised on a cattle ranch in Laramie County, and my roots here run deep.

I know what it means to work hard, live free, and take pride in where you come from. That’s the Wyoming way — and it’s exactly what I’ve taken with me to Washington.

From my years in the State Legislature to serving as your U.S. Senator, I’ve never stopped fighting to protect the values that make Wyoming strong and America great.

**Whether it’s securing our borders, defending the Second Amendment, or creating good-paying jobs, I’ve always put Wyoming and America first.**

As Chair of the Senate Western Caucus and a member of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, I pushed back against the Biden administration’s extreme agenda — especially when it came to reckless spending, anti-energy mandates, and efforts to lock up our lands.

I’ve fought to protect our coal, oil, gas, and uranium industries, because I know how vital they are — not just to Wyoming’s economy, but to America’s future.

This year, I’ve also been fighting to cut red tape, secure our border, and lead on crypto policy that protects innovation and freedom. **I’m in the Senate to make Washington work for Wyoming — _not the other way around._**

_But now, our work is under serious threat._

**Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026.** They know that without the Senate, they can’t ram through their radical agenda.

That’s why they’re pouring money into races across the country — including right here in the West — trying to tip the balance of power in their favor.

**_We can’t let that happen._**

If we lose our Senate majority, we lose the ability to block dangerous policies and stand up for the freedoms we hold dear. [**That’s why I’m asking for your help today.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8b97473c03f841d09ff83c1c94e3ba4f&_e=fwMjYG47godZeR1_ZysSSWcf_YQb_gSx9sag5z_sRlPtCykNgC2-E0aopzdDFfxBs-V_CK94K-hKTIIGiy3CXRX19ViRIVhGjAFDQHVMoMBEyvKlCX_P3hAIU7B4ZV44DePwn6tFVzc_2dnZsMr8BpAne_77OkqsFE80ViBsNBu2zrK1VT76HU8xG3fsQVvPDsqGpl_2EK2MRPkq80MpXiY32K1AvqipvUpjmbu2oo2uX2SI1D2uBEo9jEwsMrXoykjHq01_-BzLUgNpePGn8NoqvRpSypq9fnYgpXXjYY7QhVfUwARpNWqvjUWTJPKdOaTkVW5WKN3t-tjuO8YCcMbZl6Bmgd-uH6F9Cb7psjGedUBNJQq-3W_gGsak-KThq1O5BcXCAPB-RuR8BL2tGkJtrGrjZ8fkzFqpFvQRohL_3dR5vDkvKfB0yABUh1Dm0fJMjRFMUt487NNLRpduq6kzVxVcoU6wYCPmI9ttHryr_-FWcHlw6BPZR59GcUyqaBLhy2yw7u5bRws0FzJOhG-0KR7UI6usQf1kK5QzDD7EH7O-BbucXB2Z5yS-EorSP1PAHzg_QSTUGFCzfFllGQNC6ZBmQSDkjUcyOIpczBDpbuNZtbk_YM19C0aWS604WXdQNYG_3B2IlgXCRi7E9hhaLyvOG6nfkRnq6g53iQtW9xoRXGZQOI-kPk4DxV9C)

**Will you chip in to help us hold the line and defend our Senate majority?** [**Every dollar you give will go directly toward fighting back against the Left’s assault on our values and helping me continue to be a voice for America First priorities in Washington.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8b97473c03f841d09ff83c1c94e3ba4f&_e=fwMjYG47godZeR1_ZysSSWcf_YQb_gSx9sag5z_sRlPtCykNgC2-E0aopzdDFfxBs-V_CK94K-hKTIIGiy3CXRX19ViRIVhGjAFDQHVMoMBEyvKlCX_P3hAIU7B4ZV44DePwn6tFVzc_2dnZsMr8BpAne_77OkqsFE80ViBsNBu2zrK1VT76HU8xG3fsQVvPDsqGpl_2EK2MRPkq80MpXiY32K1AvqipvUpjmbu2oo0R-VDLm8zy7zNEZ8Mc_5SpI60YMUhVr3HvjXmF4-XkwMKO-acYIVsIly3fenIBvN2jZQeHy-ErxGjtmEG4MhPkmb8Mgz1rQeRf-flK7q-sAnnZ6VsRjdbe0GQ0o48OBsxejFZ1ulciIJYI9XIVVkh8zlONF-PIK7tHGfyl6W5zBL6Oj-LUf5krj6NgJ514otvTGRDiqi7HK5DfWbOBRX7FDDGUiNwUCMezIRY8ASwKh5uASkAKQBwD4r7datUZ_ovpjo-7mowW-PaosIVfEdWsW1YIrhaxubOYjEIj4B2bXHDGY6BN549PVHd62DHEpjSbB6ERoK5h2nATiWKIigpYBjRqJBwf-Ux4JgdTcbcMhSkFYE7IwDBLTaCK4V8UShPIXvqN79xR7X2ePir54SvF5OHh7GbD1_4To82APYf3xEWSUTTFyX2SKbiDHh8jxuUZPcOoaKMmnp2rU0_NONgK)

clean_body: Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026. | Dear Peter, I’ve spent my life fighting for Wyoming — because this is my home. I was born and raised on a cattle ranch in Laramie County, and my roots here run deep. I know what it means to work hard, live free, and take pride in where you come from. That’s the Wyoming way — and it’s exactly what I’ve taken with me to Washington. From my years in the State Legislature to serving as your U.S. Senator, I’ve never stopped fighting to protect the values that make Wyoming strong and America great. Whether it’s securing our borders, defending the Second Amendment, or creating good-paying jobs, I’ve always put Wyoming and America first. As Chair of the Senate Western Caucus and a member of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, I pushed back against the Biden administration’s extreme agenda — especially when it came to reckless spending, anti-energy mandates, and efforts to lock up our lands. I’ve fought to protect our coal, oil, gas, and uranium industries, because I know how vital they are — not just to Wyoming’s economy, but to America’s future. This year, I’ve also been fighting to cut red tape, secure our border, and lead on crypto policy that protects innovation and freedom. I’m in the Senate to make Washington work for Wyoming — not the other way around. But now, our work is under serious threat. Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026. They know that without the Senate, they can’t ram through their radical agenda. That’s why they’re pouring money into races across the country — including right here in the West — trying to tip the balance of power in their favor. We can’t let that happen. If we lose our Senate majority, we lose the ability to block dangerous policies and stand up for the freedoms we hold dear. Will you chip in to help us hold the line and defend our Senate majority? | I’m not in this fight for headlines or personal gain. I’m in it because I love Wyoming and America — and because I believe that with the right leadership, our best days are still ahead. Thank you for standing with me. With gratitude, Cynthia Lummis U.S. Senator – Wyoming Follow Cynthia Lummis | Paid for by Lummis for Wyoming Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I’m in this for them:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=474%2E181023%2EMiNPS0)
As a former educator and daughter of two public school teachers, I know firsthand how important it is to give our kids access to a world-class education.
I grew up in classrooms and saw the importance of public education from a young age. I watched how hard they worked and how deeply they cared about their students to give every kid the best chance at success.
My love for education and the incredible teachers who do that hard work day in and day out has grounded every step of my career.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2507-public-edu?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250709_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=474%2E181023%2EMiNPS0)
That’s why, when at 35, I was appointed dean of Wayne State University Law School, I worked to give every student the opportunity to succeed. I was the youngest woman to lead an accredited law school in American history, and I’m proud of what we accomplished.
I worked to raise money to ensure all students could pay for their education, lower costs by freezing tuition and expanding scholarships, and took Wayne State from a fourth-tier law school to the top 50 in the country.
My son is 9. Right now, he’s in those formative years where every moment shapes who he’ll become. What he believes about himself. Whether he’ll feel prepared to lead a life here in Michigan.
Every decision we make today shapes that future, for him, and for kids like him all across this state.
As governor, I’ll make sure every school has equitable, transparent funding, elevate teachers’ voices in the policy-making process, and work to ensure every kid can read and do math so Michigan is in the top 10 states for public education.
**[Let’s fight to give every kid in Michigan a strong education — no matter what zip code they’re born in. Add your name now to stand with me>> ](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2507-public-edu?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250709_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=474%2E181023%2EMiNPS0)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2507-public-edu?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250709_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=474%2E181023%2EMiNPS0)
---
**I’m in this for them: For every kid growing up in Michigan, counting on us to get it right. Let’s make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home.**
Let’s go,
Jocelyn
[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2018?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250709_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=2&akid=474%2E181023%2EMiNPS0)
---

* * *

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-jbmi/?t=3&akid=474%2E181023%2EMiNPS0)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information-jbmi/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=4&akid=474%2E181023%2EMiNPS0)

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

name: Ben Waldon
subject: We hit our goal—here’s what’s next.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250709_julymonthlyask_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250709_julymonthlyask_act]
Hi folks, it’s Ben, Michael’s Campaign Manager.
Last week, our campaign hit its first-ever end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. We set the bar high, and thanks to your support and generosity, we were able to meet it!
Let me tell you why this is important:
We know we’ve got a long campaign ahead of us, the results of which will have real-world stakes for the people of Colorado.
We’ve got to ensure we have a ground game that can reach every county in Colorado, the resources to share Michael’s message across Colorado, and the ability to engage with as many Coloradans as possible, as early as possible.
Michael has served and fought for working Coloradans and their children for over 20 years—and he has no plans of letting up anytime soon.
If you’re on Team Bennet, here’s how you can best support us:
As our campaign manager, it’s my responsibility to ensure that all of our campaign operations have the resources they need to succeed—and to plan for the unexpected. While hitting our quarterly deadlines is important, a successful campaign works around the clock.
That is where you come in, team. One of the most effective ways you can support Michael is by becoming one of our monthly donors. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250709_julymonthlyask_act&recurring=1]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250709_julymonthlyask_act&recurring=1]
Knowing we have supporters with us for the long haul gives us the confidence to map out our campaign investments, not just for the next month, but over the next year and beyond.
Your monthly donation would truly give us a leg up in this race and allow us to bring in as many Coloradons as possible into the big-tent coalition we’re building statewide. If you can, consider becoming a monthly donor today. Even just $10 or $5 makes an impact. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250709_julymonthlyask_act&recurring=1]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250709_julymonthlyask_act&recurring=1]
DONATE ONCE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250709_julymonthlyask_act]
Thank you,
Ben Waldon

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I am going to take this fight to Joni Ernst’s doorstep
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We know where Ernst is at on this. “We are all going to die.” It’s all fun to her, a real laugh — but thousands of people in her state are going to lose their health care, their food assistance, the little help they get.
#

If we’re going to take back the House and Senate next year, we have to start showing up where it matters.
That’s why I’ve been doing town halls in Republican states and districts all year. It’s why I called into an Alaska Democrats town hall after Trump’s budget passed. And it’s why I’m going to Iowa next month.
Republicans just pushed through a cruel budget that rips health care from millions, hikes energy prices, and slashes food assistance to fund billionaire tax breaks. And Iowa Sen. Joni Ernst and Rep. Mariannetter Miller-Meeks voted for it.
Either one of them could have defended the people of their state with one small moment of courage. They could have killed that budget. Instead, they turned their back on Iowans. Just like Murkowski betrayed Alaskans.
They both had the power to save millions of people from losing access to health care. They could’ve forced Republicans back to the drawing board. Instead, they willingly gave that power up.
We know where Ernst is at on this. “We are all going to die.” It’s all fun to her, a real laugh — but thousands of people in her state are going to lose their health care, their food assistance, the little help they get. And they’re losing it because Joni Ernst wanted them to.
So, I’m going to Iowa. People are pissed off because they sent Joni Ernst and Marianette Miller-Meeks there to fight on them. Instead, they supported drastic cuts to Medicaid and SNAP to fund tax cuts for corporations and billionaires that are doing just fine summering on their yachts.
We’re going to hold them both accountable. We’re going to defeat them. That requires a sustained grassroots mobilization — like going out to Iowa and making sure the people of that state hear us. Fighting back against the scale of corruption happening before us requires significant resources.
[**So please, if you’re with me in this fight, I hope you will consider making a contribution to support my work. Anything you can spare will make a difference.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250709-1-160&t=1&akid=3915%2E734936%2E5Cxxpf)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250709-1-160&t=2&akid=3915%2E734936%2E5Cxxpf)
Thanks so much for the help.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=3&akid=3915%2E734936%2E5Cxxpf). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=3915%2E734936%2E5Cxxpf). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=3915_734936_5Cxxpf&akid=3915%2E734936%2E5Cxxpf)

name: Nellie Pou
subject: What happened to getting costs under control?
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Team,

Everything costs more this summer. Groceries, gas, even a simple day at the beach. And you can thank this administration for that.

This administration promised to lower costs — but didn’t. Instead, they are giving massive tax cuts to billionaires and corporations, driving up the deficit, and are now proposing brutal cuts to Medicare and Medicaid, free school lunch programs, and Social Security. All while everyday people are struggling just to get by.

The truth is these policies will do nothing to improve the lives of New Jersey working families.

I ran for Congress to make housing more affordable, health care more accessible, and wages strong enough to keep up with rising costs. House Republicans are fighting me every step of the way, but I need your help to keep going.

New Jersey families can’t afford this economy. Let’s take back the House majority to implement an agenda that works for the people.

Can you chip in $25 today to keep this seat blue and take back the House? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?amount=25&:refcode=250709_np_beach_l1]

DONATE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250709_np_beach_b1]Thank you,

Nellie
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.

Follow Nellie
