name: Politivist Action PAC
subject: How are you building in your community?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]
Hi Peter,
Movements are built one relationship at a time—and right now, we need you.
Every day, Donald Trump and his allies are working to dismantle our government and strip away our rights. The fascist march to overthrow our government isn’t slowing down, and we can’t afford to either.
That’s why Politivist Action PAC was created—to fight back with everything we’ve got.
At Politivist Action PAC, we believe in the power of activism and politics working together to drive change. That’s why Cori Bush coined the term "politivist"—a powerful union of politician and activist.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250709_communityaction_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250709_communityaction_act]
Cori Bush is a politivist.
From standing on the frontlines in Ferguson to making history as the first Black woman to represent Missouri in Congress, she has always led with courage and conviction, while refusing corporate money; fighting for racial, economic, and social justice; and bringing the power of activism into policymaking.
You don’t just find politivists in Congress. They’re in every community, organizing, mobilizing, and fighting for justice. Our neighbors, friends, coworkers all have the power to become politivists... And that includes you.
How are you showing up for your community? What does being a politivist look like in your life? Click here to share your story, and we’ll highlight some of our favorites. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Q55_gjNo-EGfLb_st0qIcA2]
SHARE YOUR STORY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Q55_gjNo-EGfLb_st0qIcA2]
Let’s keep building, one relationship, one movement, and one victory at a time.
And as always, if you believe in the power of movements led by and for the people, chip in whatever you can today to help us elect more politivists and build lasting change. Donate here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250709_communityaction_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250709_communityaction_act]
Thank you, and we look forward to hearing from you,
—Politivist Action PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250709_communityaction_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250709_communityaction_act] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at PolitivistAction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]

# Texas Agriculture Commission handles a nearly Billion dollar budget for the state that generates tremendous revenue and is strategic asset for not just Texas, but, our nation and the world.
---
| |
---
---
**Tomorrow, SID MILLER is our special guest at the BIZPAC Roundtable luncheon. Like always, we'll take a deep dive into the critical business of our Agriculture Commission and programs most do not even know about.** Commissioner Miller oversees entire industries for Texas including food crop production, livestock, weights and measures for fuels, rural economic redevelopment, nutritional school lunches, and is even helping with disaster relief from the Hill Country flooding tragedy. We'll learn about this and more and how our businesses can help and be involved in commerce with 200 rural counties that would welcome our involvement.
---
|
---
Our friend Tom Glass will be on deck with report on this legislature. I like to call it: "after the smoke clears" reporting or "what they just did to us".
Tom is a recognized and appreciated member of his community active in civic and legislative matters. Often time, Tom provides expert testimony and speaks up for small business owners in the legislature committee hearings.
Doors open at 11am and we will finish at 1 sharp. Do not miss this meeting and **bring guests.**
Houston Country Club
Potomac Room
11am to 1pm
Business Casual Dress Code

body:
Democracy Docket: Lawmakers Look To Restrict Ballot Initiative Process in Florida, Missouri and Ohio [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/DD_BallotInitiativesHarder.png]
In state legislative sessions, suppressive lawmakers across the country have looked to curtail the ballot initiative process, which allows citizens to directly affect policy change by voting on proposals to change state laws and state constitutions.
In recent years, progressive policies — including Medicaid expansion, minimum-wage increases, marijuana legalization and establishment of independent redistricting commissions — have proved overwhelmingly popular with voters and have been put into law via this process.
Team: We're looking to hear from our supporters about ballot initiatives. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Should state officials limit the ballot initiative process?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=Hl6phs+Lg/kf1G7n5X+gvxvWfUWjel0zcpfsu7Te40cXgcxP2jOsgm3d6u3QbFwAA83m8lNCsMojkdqQqaFqqaLi++Gt7eUS8Q+HO7ePLcw=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=Hl6phs+Lg/kf1G7n5X+gvxvWfUWjel0zcpfsu7Te40cXgcxP2jOsgm3d6u3QbFwAA83m8lNCsMojkdqQqaFqqaLi++Gt7eUS8Q+HO7ePLcw=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=Hl6phs+Lg/kf1G7n5X+gvxvWfUWjel0zcpfsu7Te40cXgcxP2jOsgm3d6u3QbFwAA83m8lNCsMojkdqQqaFqqaLi++Gt7eUS8Q+HO7ePLcw=]

body:
#

Peter,
We have sent a lot of fundraising emails lately, especially at the end of last month. And because we still need your help, we wanted to explain just how important these messages are to ensuring we re-elect Jon Ossoff.
Here it is:
Already, GOP-aligned Super PACs are spending millions of dollars on television and digital ads attacking Jon. Maybe you’ve seen them? And beyond the ads, the entire GOP — from the self-proclaimed “MAGA Warrior” running against Jon to Donald Trump himself — is going to make beating Jon Ossoff their number one priority.
We have to fight back if we’re going to win this race.
And what you might not know is that the overwhelming majority of the donations to Jon’s campaign come from lots and lots of people chipping in what they can when they can to emails just like this one.
So when you see us fighting back against the GOP’s lies; when you see us building the largest organizing and mobilization effort Georgia has ever seen; and when you see us win this November, know this: **it’s donations from supporters like you that make it possible.**
[**So please. Use this link to give $25 to Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign today. We will put every dollar raised right to work making sure we re-elect Jon Ossoff and keep MAGA out of the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250709-1-subs&t=1&akid=533%2E5691347%2EYOopWD)

Thank you!

Sen. John Kennedy put Prof. Richard Painter **[in his place during an explosive hearing,](https://substack.com/redirect/ab9ab7c2-5c59-476b-b7bb-f158ebcd7f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Wednesday, after the professor called Sen Kirsten Gillibrand a crook in an X post, accusing her of being corrupted by the crypto industry.
_" You're a wack job!!"_
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ab9ab7c2-5c59-476b-b7bb-f158ebcd7f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ab9ab7c2-5c59-476b-b7bb-f158ebcd7f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Why do you think the crypto industry is buying Sen. Gillibrand?" Kennedy asked the professor, bluntly.
"I said look at the campaign contributions in the industry!!" Painter fired back. "You need to focus on this bill instead..."
**["You called one of my colleagues a crook!"](https://substack.com/redirect/ab9ab7c2-5c59-476b-b7bb-f158ebcd7f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Kennedy exploded. "What evidence do you have,... You're a wack job!"
"This isn't middle school senator!!" Painter squaked back.
Watch the chaotic moment here:
[Click to Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ab9ab7c2-5c59-476b-b7bb-f158ebcd7f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Together with Bonner Private Wines**
## **[Drink Wine That's NOT Made by Globalists](https://substack.com/redirect/742ea06c-14f2-40e5-bf73-a892098102ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/742ea06c-14f2-40e5-bf73-a892098102ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Want to know what's really in that $12 bottle at the store?
* Chemical dyes
* Fake oak flavoring
* Grape concentrate

These mass-market wines are made in factories owned by global corporations.
What they don't want you drinking? Wine made in tiny batches by honest, hardworking families -- deep in the Andes, or tucked away in the hills of Tuscany.
**[That's what we source at the Bonner Private Wine Partnership.](https://substack.com/redirect/742ea06c-14f2-40e5-bf73-a892098102ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Every quarter, we ship 6 rare bottles -- from places so remote, most Americans will never even hear about them.
These wines aren't for sale in stores, and they'll never be featured on a celebrity's Instagram.
They're for people like you. Folks who still believe in hard work, tradition, and doing things the right way.
**[See What's Inside the Box - Join Now](https://substack.com/redirect/742ea06c-14f2-40e5-bf73-a892098102ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
You won't find these wines at Costco. And that's a good thing.
- Will Bonner
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/742ea06c-14f2-40e5-bf73-a892098102ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump on migrant farm workers: "There's no amnesty"
President Donald Trump on Tuesday **[ruled out amnesty](https://substack.com/redirect/09f9e936-d14b-4503-b0bb-86e00449bb0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for undocumented farmworkers, saying his administration would support agriculture through a new work program while continuing mass deportations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09f9e936-d14b-4503-b0bb-86e00449bb0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **" There's no amnesty,"** Trump said during a Cabinet meeting. "We got to give the farmers the people they need, but we're not talking amnesty."
* **Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins** proposed replacing deported migrant laborers with able-bodied Medicaid recipients, citing a new requirement in the _One Big Beautiful Bill Act_ that mandates work or service for certain, able-bodied Medicaid beneficiaries. "There are 34 million able-bodied adults in our Medicaid program," Rollins said, adding that "there are plenty of workers in America."
* **The law requires childless adults aged 18 to 64 to work at least 80 hours per month** -- or participate in education, community service, or approved work programs -- to remain eligible for Medicaid, which currently serves about 70 million low-income Americans.
* **Trump also suggested a plan allowing farmers to vouch for longtime undocumented workers** , potentially shielding them from deportation. "If a farmer is willing to vouch for these people... I think we're going to have to just say that's going to be good," he said. "We don't want to do [border security] where we take all the workers off the farms. We want the farms to do great."

* * *
# Jeffery Epstein's brother attacks FBI memo concluding his brother's alleged suicide
**[Mark Epstein is blasting federal investigators](https://substack.com/redirect/0d2a0322-1b64-4ce1-89f4-14c95e82cd2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for reaffirming that his brother Jeffrey Epstein died by suicide, calling the findings "stupid" and mocking the recent FBI memo.
* **Mark Epstein has been vocal that his brother was murdered** , citing autopsy inconsistencies and the fact that his brother was reportedly looking forward to a bail hearing.
* **Mark Epstein said officials refused to provide him basic records** , like the 911 call from the day of Jeffrey's death, and claimed their statements only hurt their credibility.
_" Every time they say something or do something to try to quash the fact that he was most likely murdered, they put their foot further down their mouths," Epstein said._
* **The FBI insists there was no evidence of a "client list"** or blackmail operation involving the elite class and many celebrities in their official 128-page report. Ti also concluded that Epstein died by suicide in his New york CIty cell while awaiting trial. Ghislaine Maxwell, Epstein's associate convicted of sex trafficking, told _The Guardian_ , "I believe that he was murdered."

* * *
# Biden's doctor BOLTS from congress when asked if he ever lied about the former president's health
Dr. Kevin O'Connor, who previously served as former President Joe Biden's physician, **[invoked the Fifth Amendment and refused to answer questions](https://substack.com/redirect/767a892f-23ad-495b-bbc7-bcf0d2400c3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a House Oversight Committee deposition on Wednesday, including whether he was ever told to lie about Biden's health.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/34935e31-cefe-473a-98be-833eb6210d0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **O 'Connor only confirmed his name before exiting**, prompting Committee Chairman James Comer (R-Ky.) to call the move "unprecedented" and suggest it supported allegations of a cover-up regarding Biden's mental and physical fitness.
* **Comer said the physician declined to answer** both "Were you ever told to lie about the president's health?" and "Did you ever believe President Biden was unfit to execute his duties?"
* **Comer referenced claims from the book** _**Original Sin**_**** recently published by CNN's Jake Tapper**** that senior Biden aides acted as a "Politburo" making key decisions in the White House as evidence of a broader effort to shield the president's decline.
* **The committee plans to interview several former top Biden aides** in the coming weeks as part of its investigation, including Ashley Williams, Ron Klain, and Anita Dunn.

* * *
# Host of viral subway shorts deleted Kamala Harris interview: "It was really, really bad..."
Former Vice President Kamala Harris filmed a 2024 episode of the TikTok show "Subway Takes," but **[the segment was never aired](https://substack.com/redirect/785882ca-07b7-48df-9b7c-7fe33924f41b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** due to a "confusing and weird" interview, host Kareem Rahma said.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/785882ca-07b7-48df-9b7c-7fe33924f41b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"Subway Takes" host Kareem Rahma
* **The show hosts a series of short interviews** where guests often provide hot takes. Rahma told Forbes that Harris's hot take -- "bacon is a spice" -- was not what he had been briefed on, and so strange he feared airing it might severely damage her presidential campaign. Rahma also does not eat pork due to his Muslim religion, so he did not know how to relate to her opinion.
* **Harris 's team had originally told producers **her take would be about opposing shoe removal on airplanes, but she switched topics mid-interview.
* **" It was really, really bad.** It didn't make any sense," Rahma said, adding the decision not to publish the video was mutual.

John Kennedy put Prof. Richard Painter Wednesday, after the professor called Sen Kirsten Gillibrand a crook in an X post, accusing her of being corrupted by the crypto industry. " You're a wack job!!" "Why do you think the crypto industry is buying Sen. Gillibrand?" Kennedy asked the professor, bluntly. "I said look at the campaign contributions in the industry!!" Painter fired back. "You need to focus on this bill instead..." Kennedy exploded. "What evidence do you have,... You're a wack job!" "This isn't middle school senator!!" Painter squaked back. Chemical dyes Fake oak flavoring Grape concentrate These mass-market wines are made in factories owned by global corporations. What they don't want you drinking? Wine made in tiny batches by honest, hardworking families -- deep in the Andes, or tucked away in the hills of Tuscany. "We got to give the farmers the people they need, but we're not talking amnesty." Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins proposed replacing deported migrant laborers with able-bodied Medicaid recipients, citing a new requirement in the One Big Beautiful Bill Act that mandates work or service for certain, able-bodied Medicaid beneficiaries. "There are 34 million able-bodied adults in our Medicaid program," Rollins said, adding that "there are plenty of workers in America." The law requires childless adults aged 18 to 64 to work at least 80 hours per month -- or participate in education, community service, or approved work programs -- to remain eligible for Medicaid, which currently serves about 70 million low-income Americans. Trump also suggested a plan allowing farmers to vouch for longtime undocumented workers , potentially shielding them from deportation. "If a farmer is willing to vouch for these people... I think we're going to have to just say that's going to be good," he said. "We don't want to do [border security] where we take all the workers off the farms. We want the farms to do great." Jeffery Epstein's brother attacks FBI memo concluding his brother's alleged suicide for reaffirming that his brother Jeffrey Epstein died by suicide, calling the findings "stupid" and mocking the recent FBI memo. Mark Epstein has been vocal that his brother was murdered , citing autopsy inconsistencies and the fact that his brother was reportedly looking forward to a bail hearing. Mark Epstein said officials refused to provide him basic records , like the 911 call from the day of Jeffrey's death, and claimed their statements only hurt their credibility. " Every time they say something or do something to try to quash the fact that he was most likely murdered, they put their foot further down their mouths," Epstein said. The FBI insists there was no evidence of a "client list" or blackmail operation involving the elite class and many celebrities in their official 128-page report. Ti also concluded that Epstein died by suicide in his New york CIty cell while awaiting trial. Ghislaine Maxwell, Epstein's associate convicted of sex trafficking, told The Guardian , "I believe that he was murdered." Biden's doctor BOLTS from congress when asked if he ever lied about the former president's health Dr. Kevin O'Connor, who previously served as former President Joe Biden's physician, during a House Oversight Committee deposition on Wednesday, including whether he was ever told to lie about Biden's health. O 'Connor only confirmed his name before exiting, prompting Committee Chairman James Comer (R-Ky.) to call the move "unprecedented" and suggest it supported allegations of a cover-up regarding Biden's mental and physical fitness. Comer said the physician declined to answer both "Were you ever told to lie about the president's health?" and "Did you ever believe President Biden was unfit to execute his duties?" Comer referenced claims from the book Original Sin recently published by CNN's Jake Tapper that senior Biden aides acted as a "Politburo" making key decisions in the White House as evidence of a broader effort to shield the president's decline. The committee plans to interview several former top Biden aides in the coming weeks as part of its investigation, including Ashley Williams, Ron Klain, and Anita Dunn. **“It’s immaterial.”** That’s what Vice President JD Vance responded with when asked about the devastating impacts of this administration’s disastrous budget. Not the 42 million Americans who are going hungry. Not the 16 million people about to lose their health care. Not the 300 hospitals on the brink of shutting down. Not the 200 Planned Parenthood clinics forced to close their doors. Not the lives that will be lost as a result. All of that — in his words — is “immaterial.” Because to Vance and the GOP, the only thing that matters is making the ultrawealthy even richer, even if it means hardworking families have to foot the bill. clean_body: JD Vance doesn’t think you matter | = “It’s immaterial.” That’s what Vice President JD Vance responded with when asked about the devastating impacts of this administration’s disastrous budget. Not the 42 million Americans who are going hungry. Not the 16 million people about to lose their health care. Not the 300 hospitals on the brink of shutting down. Not the 200 Planned Parenthood clinics forced to close their doors. Not the lives that will be lost as a result. All of that — in his words — is “immaterial.” Because to Vance and the GOP, the only thing that matters is making the ultrawealthy even richer, even if it means hardworking families have to foot the bill. They are openly admitting what we’ve known all along: they value billionaires over everyday people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for stepping up, Fair Shot PAC Fair Shot PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | mailto:info@fairshotpac.org | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

name: Michael DiManna
subject: Join Congressman Louie Gohmert in Denver on August 9th!
disclaimer_text: paid for by Team Imer PAC and was not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
You are invited to join me and Team Imer in Denver, CO for a special evening with Congressman Louie Gohmert...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C-spNESEBMxbQjDH78jIlrFv38xsZU9mjYdT0QmC6FDlx_xgyQ5Qf-MB3C8WSnImwwjcumqhHd8PKPfE83MOoFLHTdTcu2EXwCrAtMYm_l1qfGYWRpkzPPCaPVBmEpy9kKsPpLFpkpsKyOEMeFsa2HC1SYbrJos4BNqmzmcIOABZP_HdLLsntntZWMGVWOpXXmL2Y0HVWZzFCk3VaVB5pnnLPIos3v8B55ktCnikjrHvpr70wCw1wx7d7NCS8vd6&c=84qrDcy9HtVa-iO-LWxsBhLcX2Sa3TMcuZau38LetdNuzfap1CR1Vw==&ch=k04ZVFYoVr5YqnX4C1En1Getjl7E1osuM6wJ48kMcgCmIqmf5NJf2Q==)

| Friend, I invite you to join me and Team Imer on Saturday, August 9th, in Denver, CO, with special guest Fmr. Congressman Louie Gohmert, for a special evening benefiting Team Imer and the important work they are doing to preserve the America we all know and love.
My wife Sara and I are looking forward to hosting this special event with Congressman Gohmert for the Team Imer PAC.
This fundraiser is an excellent opportunity to catch up after my campaign, but also to be introduced to Team Imer.
Tickets can be purchased at the website below, and opportunities to [join the host committee](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C-spNESEBMxbQjDH78jIlrFv38xsZU9mjYdT0QmC6FDlx_xgyQ5Qf-MB3C8WSnImxCbsUlURyTcjTfcLaAKNUR5Mikq7vtLN2B40Wp7JMgwR70Tkn7LiIQCg0dVet2dwIBsOhuHTrQDEkMJHm_EPjQIPvtNneCrgW2WjpoLjiZ-6WDEYJlM9FA==&c=84qrDcy9HtVa-iO-LWxsBhLcX2Sa3TMcuZau38LetdNuzfap1CR1Vw==&ch=k04ZVFYoVr5YqnX4C1En1Getjl7E1osuM6wJ48kMcgCmIqmf5NJf2Q==) are still available.
---
|
---
| [RSVP Here!](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C-spNESEBMxbQjDH78jIlrFv38xsZU9mjYdT0QmC6FDlx_xgyQ5Qf-MB3C8WSnImwwjcumqhHd8PKPfE83MOoFLHTdTcu2EXwCrAtMYm_l1qfGYWRpkzPPCaPVBmEpy9kKsPpLFpkpsKyOEMeFsa2HC1SYbrJos4BNqmzmcIOABZP_HdLLsntntZWMGVWOpXXmL2Y0HVWZzFCk3VaVB5pnnLPIos3v8B55ktCnikjrFRWwuTZtusJgpzshnLPRGD&c=84qrDcy9HtVa-iO-LWxsBhLcX2Sa3TMcuZau38LetdNuzfap1CR1Vw==&ch=k04ZVFYoVr5YqnX4C1En1Getjl7E1osuM6wJ48kMcgCmIqmf5NJf2Q==)
---
| On behalf of my fellow host committee members, Mr. Adam DeRito, Mrs. Charleen Carter, and Team Imer, we are hopeful you will join us for this patriotic and fun-filled evening.
See you soon!
My Best,

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: Big Beautiful News for Nevada Families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Proudly Supporting the Big Beautiful Bill for Nevada | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d123c74f2cac/welcome-to-team-flippo-10338982?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=6d347e5d9d&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Friend,
The Big Beautiful Bill is now law. A historic victory that delivers **permanent tax relief**. Cuts **wasteful government spending**. Secures our borders. Strengthens **energy independence** and invests in critical infrastructure. This bold legislation puts hardworking Nevadans and all Americans first.
---
|
---
| Here is what it means for Nevada
• **More money in your pocket** with lower taxes for families and small businesses across our state
• **Stronger support for hardworking Nevadans** through expanded deductions for overtime and tipped workers
•**Investment in Nevada’s infrastructure,** including roads, bridges, and vital community projects that keep our towns connected and growing
• **Support for Nevada’s small business, veteran, and energy communities** by cutting unnecessary regulations and empowering our local economy I am proud to stand fully behind this bill and proudly alongside President Trump and the America First movement. This is the leadership Nevada deserves. We are just getting started, and I am excited to see what else President Trump has planned for our state. You can count on me to be right there, fighting for Nevada families every step of the way
---
|
For Nevada, for freedom, and for America, David Flippo
_Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress_
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
_**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=41fd61511e&e=273c9a71fb)**_

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Decimation at the VA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Thanks to Trump and Elon Musk taking a chainsaw to the federal government with DOGE, 30,000 VA staff will be gone by September.
#
Thanks to Trump and Elon Musk taking a chainsaw to the federal government with DOGE, 30,000 VA staff — the people who millions of Veterans depend on for everything from medication to suicide prevention — will be gone by September.
They are decimating the VA.
This could mean that Veterans with cancer can’t get the treatment they need. Veterans Crisis Line operators who have seen a surge in calls, won’t have the support they need. Beds for mental health and detox will continue to be reduced. Veterans’ healthcare appointments will keep getting cancelled. Wait times, which have already risen, will continue to rise. All while clinics are operating with a fraction of the staff they need.
At the same time, Trump is patting himself on the back for giving billionaires a massive tax cut that adds trillions of dollars to the national debt. Pardon our French, but this is bullsh*t.
VoteVets needs you. We're asking for a massive day today — everyone who can afford to donate giving whatever they can. The kind of fundraising surge that will send a message to Trump and the MAGA Right: We’re going to kick all of you out of office.
**[Please. Not everyone can afford to chip in, but if you can we are humbly asking you to donate $20, $10, even $5. Please. Because every donation counts and they all add up.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250709-1-120&t=1&akid=34471%2E3013755%2EnOyCo0)

subject: Asking for your thoughts
body:
|

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111172416/556463144/-1882563727?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhlMzExNTgtMGY1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YQXmXwjdOkRIJrOIGNVEknoO05z0VGOPswgBguKrPD8=&emci=36e31158-0f5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=38e31158-0f5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=27336212)

Friend,

These last few weeks have been challenging. I feel it, and I know you do too.

Congressional Republicans betrayed the nation by passing Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” – eliminating healthcare access from 17 million Americans, and cutting SNAP for 4 million children.

**Republicans are hoping you turn away now. We can’t let up from the fight.**

It’s unacceptable. Unlike them, I’m staying focused on the people who sent me here. Every weekend, I come home to listen – at local businesses, events, and in conversation with constituents, whether they voted for me or not.

**[That’s why instead of asking for your hard-earned money for a contribution today, I’m asking instead for a minute of your time to complete our new July campaign survey. Can I count on your responses today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111172417/556463145/-1882563727?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhlMzExNTgtMGY1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YQXmXwjdOkRIJrOIGNVEknoO05z0VGOPswgBguKrPD8=&emci=36e31158-0f5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=38e31158-0f5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=27336212)**
| **[Begin the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111172418/556463146/-1882563727?refcode=em-7.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhlMzExNTgtMGY1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YQXmXwjdOkRIJrOIGNVEknoO05z0VGOPswgBguKrPD8=&emci=36e31158-0f5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=38e31158-0f5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=27336212)**
---

Congressional Republicans betrayed the nation by passing Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” – eliminating healthcare access from 17 million Americans, and cutting SNAP for 4 million children. Republicans are hoping you turn away now. We can’t let up from the fight. It’s unacceptable. Unlike them, I’m staying focused on the people who sent me here. name: Deb Haaland
subject: This is a story about what I did when I first decided to run for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
When I first decided to run for Congress, I did what most candidates do: I picked up the phone.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3127%2E400544%2ERx_QsL)
When I first decided to run for Congress, I did what most candidates do:
I picked up the phone and called around to my close friends, family, and people who would give me their honest opinions. My close friends believed in me, and they were ready to help.
But folks across the country said it couldn’t be done.
People were saying it’d be impossible for a Native woman to raise enough money or win that type of election, especially given the fact that I was in a competitive 6-way primary. It was no secret I’d start the race at a disadvantage – but we overcame extraordinary odds thanks to the power of community. Thousands of New Mexicans came together to canvass, make phone calls, and chip in. And, as they say, the rest is history...
I love telling this story, because it’s a reminder that _together_ is how we make the impossible possible. It’s with that same hopeful spirit that I want to let you in on an ambitious goal my team and I just set for our campaign.
**We’re getting close to a major milestone of 125,000 online donations to our campaign.** That number represents more than just a dollar amount we can spend. It’s proof to the media – and to our MAGA-backed opponents – that we’re building a dedicated team of grassroots supporters who are ready to fuel this campaign through a competitive race for governor.
**[If enough people like you step up to make your first-ever donation to our campaign today, we’ll be within striking distance of reaching our goal. Will you please pitch in $5 to help us hit 125,000 online donations?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250709_1_call?amount=5&refcode=em20250709-3127&refcode2=3127_400544_Rx_QsL&akid=3127%2E400544%2ERx_QsL)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250709_1_call?amount=5&refcode=em20250709-3127&refcode2=3127_400544_Rx_QsL&akid=3127%2E400544%2ERx_QsL)**
Like I said earlier: when I made the decision to run for Congress, the first thing I did was pick up the phone to call the people closest to me. I wanted to hear directly from people I could count on – and they ended up being my biggest supporters in my long-shot campaign!
**That’s why I’m planning to call a few folks who chip in to help reach this big milestone so I can personally thank you for your support. 📞**
Every donation means the world to me. Especially now, when I know it’s not easy to afford to contribute financially to a campaign. But if your budget allows, chipping in today would make an impactful difference in our goal to reach 125,000 online donations.
**[Can you contribute your first-ever $5 donation to our campaign? I’m planning to personally call a few people who help us hit this exciting goal, so if you see an incoming call from an unknown number, consider picking up!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250709_1_call?amount=5&refcode=em20250709-3127&refcode2=3127_400544_Rx_QsL&akid=3127%2E400544%2ERx_QsL)**
With hope and gratitude,
Deb
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=2&akid=3127%2E400544%2ERx_QsL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=3&akid=3127%2E400544%2ERx_QsL)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: 3 reasons to pay attention to California in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39880%2E3422442%2Ehl5DGF)
Dear Peter,
It’s a mistake to take our eyes off California just because it isn’t a swing state, especially in 2026. Here are three quick reasons why:
1. **California has the most swing House seats of any state.** If we want to retake the House in 2026, we need to defend vulnerable incumbents here and challenge the Republicans who rubber stamp Trump’s agenda.

2. **Down ballot offices are competitive—and that’s where some of the fiercest debates are happening.** School boards and city councils are front and center in addressing questions about what books belong in libraries and which kids can play sports.

3. **Our next governor will have a big platform to push back against Trump.** We need to make sure we elect someone with the backbone to take on tough fights.

Katie is the only candidate in this race to win a House seat in a purple area, so she knows what it takes to help down ballot candidates clinch victory. And, she has a track record of taking on the Trump Administration to deliver for all of us, securing a commitment from his CDC Director in the early days of the pandemic to make COVID testing free for everyone.
**[Katie is the governor California (and our country) needs, but we can’t get her elected without your help. Will you please chip in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250709_1_ak?refcode=em20250709-39880&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39880_3422442_hl5DGF&akid=39880%2E3422442%2Ehl5DGF)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250709_1_ak?refcode=em20250709-39880&refcode2=39880_3422442_hl5DGF&akid=39880%2E3422442%2Ehl5DGF)
Thanks for reading,
Team KP26

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250709-39880&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39880_3422442_hl5DGF&akid=39880%2E3422442%2Ehl5DGF)**

#
Last week, House Republicans passed legislation that slashes Medicaid by nearly $1 trillion. **My opponent David Valadao voted for it.** This is an attack on families like mine. In May, I fasted in protest as MAGA Republicans moved to gut Medicaid, because I know what it would mean for our community. I personally relied on it growing up, just like nearly 70% of folks here in CA-22 rely on Medi-Cal today. Valadao broke his promise and betrayed over two-thirds of our district who depend on Medi-Cal to survive. He made a choice. He chose a party over people. Billionaires over the Central Valley. Again. **This is personal.** For me. For my students. For the thousands of families across CA-22 who are scared right now about what this means. But we can fight back and we can flip his seat. Because with his vote, Valadao is more vulnerable than ever and has proved he doesn’t deserve to stay in power. **[If you’re ready to send Valadao packing, chip in $3 right now. name: Justice Democrats
subject: No food. No water. This is a war crime.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The Israeli government is using mass starvation as a weapon of war — and
the U.S. is funding it.

That’s why Rashida Tlaib just led a letter demanding that the Trump
administration immediately end U.S. complicity in Israel’s use of
starvation as a weapon of war.

The Israeli government has been using mass starvation as a war tactic.
This is not self-defense. This is collective punishment. It's a war crime.

The Trump administration has approved a staggering almost $12 billion in
military aid to Israel. We must end our complicity in this genocide.

Rashida is demanding that the U.S. stop fueling this atrocity — we need a
wave of people power behind her.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-signup-20250709-rashida-tlaib-letter/?source=em20250709-36828&t=1002&akid=36828%2E1203867%2E7Zw0cO ]Will you add your name to sign onto Rashida’s letter demanding to end

So, what did their governor, Greg Abbott, just do?
He snuck redistricting into a special session that's supposed to be about flood recovery — all to help Donald Trump hold power and rig Texas' congressional maps even further in Republicans' favor.
This was supposed to be about relief and helping people.
But instead, Abbott and Trump are using this moment of crisis to redraw Texas' districts in the middle of the decade, something we just did in 2021, to try and steal even more seats from communities of color and hand them to MAGA loyalists.
This is voter suppression, plain and simple. And we're not letting them get away with it. We're working right now to build the ground game to fight back, but we need your help to fund it.

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Texans are hurting. Gov. Abbott is playing politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0709_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0709_e]
Friend,
Texans are once again facing a devastating tragedy. Now more than ever, our communities are looking for leadership, for solutions, for someone who will put people before politics.
But what is Governor Abbott doing?
He’s calling a special session to help Republicans cling to their narrow majority in Congress by calling for an off cycle redistricting to potentially get rid of majority minority districts, including the 18th Congressional District.
Simply put, this is outrageous.
Abbott’s real priority couldn’t be clearer: rigging the rules to protect his party, not the people.
We deserve better. We need leaders who show up in moments of crisis, not ones who exploit them. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0709_e&refcode2=0bb4634a-145d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b]
Chip in now to help us fight back! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0709_e&refcode2=0bb4634a-145d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b]
Amanda K. Edwards

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter: Polls are OPEN in the runoff for Georgia’s critical Special Primary Election for Public Service Commission! Donald Trump is failing to deliver on his promise to bring down the cost of living, and every day Georgians are paying the price. We can't afford to wait around. Luckily, we have the opportunity to take action RIGHT NOW. Polls are open to cast your vote until July 15th, or you can help the team here at the Democratic Party of Georgia get out the vote before then! = | | | = If you need more convincing, here's why we need YOU to show up this election — be it with your vote or with your support: 1. Trump is giving handouts to the wealthy left and right — all at our expense. 2. All the while, countless Georgians are struggling to pay their bills and keep food on the table. 3. Special Elections like this one are critical to offsetting Donald Trump's disastrous policies at the state level. This is your chance to make your voice heard. Vote ahead of Election Day on July 15th and help spread the word so we can restore affordable power to the people! = | | = — Democratic Party of Georgia HQ | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. The Democratic Party of Georgia works year-round to elect Democrats who share our values of a strong middle class, integrity in government, and equality and justice for all Georgians. **➤➤ BREAKING: Iowa signs citizenship challenge law into effect** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111174622/556470539/1071238056?refcode=em-7.09.25-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjY2MjliNC0xNTVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ue9uxTV_Jw_QguJwpWzGbG5DzZxSiGoXySo2tHGcjz4=)
* * *
This is one of the most brazen voter suppression laws we’ve seen this year. Iowa’s governor just signed legislation allowing poll workers to challenge a voter's citizenship status, _based on nothing more than suspicion_. Let us be clear: this law is a green light for racial profiling and voter intimidation. It empowers partisan poll workers to harass naturalized citizens, immigrants, and anyone they “think” shouldn’t be voting. And this isn’t isolated. Similar efforts are cropping up in other states, encouraged by Trump’s executive orders and MAGA-led legislatures across the country. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last firewall to stop this kind of overreach, protect voters’ rights, and make sure these laws don’t spread any further. But they need our support to do it. [**If we don’t fight back now, these tactics will become the norm in 2026 and 2028. Can you chip in $3 or any amount today to help us protect voters and elect Secretaries of State who will stand against this kind of intimidation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111174623/556470540/1071238056?refcode=em-7.09.25-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjY2MjliNC0xNTVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ue9uxTV_Jw_QguJwpWzGbG5DzZxSiGoXySo2tHGcjz4=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111174624/556470541/1071238056?refcode=em-7.09.25-all-2-b&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjY2MjliNC0xNTVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ue9uxTV_Jw_QguJwpWzGbG5DzZxSiGoXySo2tHGcjz4=)**

| Recently, I packed the house for a town hall in Wichita, Kansas, where Republican Rep. Ron Estes has REFUSED to face his constituents.

**Over 1,500 of Rep. Estes’ constituents showed up. The congressman? Nowhere to be found.**
[ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/aRC8Rxtqvjq96HeXnmYHxw~~/AAPPABA~/6kLdUC9AB0YRIbaWdjHyHV0ilEIWpy2MYsAlScWuFSpTxC72wDUpWT9nGd2R4E61uZ9AcxcOC9-yzrFK9OMryHi2eOEPKjHoHZFwlE_FPOgPuNTgAvHsbvY_oTwsWUFK614bYZ1HCJLl4kMGnkuuJjtfV2PpxMjGtKRPJJsfHSy--AM_o950fzUbEc2aY8zsDn0CtEIesw5_jGMq4b673er3yESkb2uZkJUhUiq_7zKENTVWO6McNp2LWtOPn7TTqcJoUIh0gYOJlMkd8T_iolNMSgC9CYj34e3VJTQXSJI03ZGWlnX7aIz-Ff5Tf_9KqpdrY4Ls34GWJcq95hkQK8U-Nq3RufI9HM2GFr3LexM~) It’s clear: Working people are pissed off. They see that Republicans are rigging our economy against us with a bill that will literally destroy millions of livelihoods.

But the people are still not backing down. They’re showing up, and they’re getting louder.

Because it doesn’t matter if your district is red or blue. _Your elected officials should give a damn about you._

**Well, I give a damn.** That’s why I’m holding town halls in red districts across the country – because while Republicans hide and vote to cut SNAP and Medicaid, working people are coming together. And thanks to you, I’m right there with them.

But holding these events across different states takes major resources, so I need your support so I can stay on the road and bring even more people into this fight for our country’s future.

[**_Just one donation from you today will keep me on the road so we can grow our people-powered movement against Republicans’ attacks on working people. Can you give just $1 as your first donation to my campaign so I can hold even more red-district town halls across the country? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/zlgcuGhvNE4xaw1Yvw7C4g~~/AAPPABA~/_NLBs35vKKYge1IoYKIwPTRci33NAdDQNcHv8j-gUJC6D_HU-8qr9ONEO76nrLzDZVl17lSAbiX50WIru8-Yx1Vu9x8FmG8HLWHzbCInA5qcnLs7R7nz6zAF5HxvHHghpAsb3N9y8Q_bdQwC8XI71v8wwGQnBrA9FpfP90aG5K_5mvblbN95AOn-r5z1_cqsiEMV4A8DL4Xq2GUStzRp7L-bYe9lkZ-JznhYN8hfyUjkAgNixSH9IDs1Hw61gMlMkABF4bx_6cBviUrz2vc1wCisB0aYEKsJlQJpZwBGHxGrGcOAMesf8g2w4RSBdOnoGsPuyIHTLX1eBVyhLiusYScrWpfSgBCnIM-MvrrEnDI~)

Estes’ constituents showed up. The congressman? Nowhere to be found. ~ It’s clear: Working people are pissed off. They see that Republicans are rigging our economy against us with a bill that will literally destroy millions of livelihoods. But the people are still not backing down. They’re showing up, and they’re getting louder. Because it doesn’t matter if your district is red or blue. Your elected officials should give a damn about you. Well, I give a damn. That’s why I’m holding town halls in red districts across the country – because while Republicans hide and vote to cut SNAP and Medicaid, working people are coming together. And thanks to you, I’m right there with them. But holding these events across different states takes major resources, so I need your support so I can stay on the road and bring even more people into this fight for our country’s future. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thank you so much, Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. body:
The MAGA Supreme Court just ruled that South Carolina can bar Planned Parenthood from Medicaid, and patients can’t do a damn thing about it. | |
---
Peter, Yesterday, the Supreme Court ruled that the Trump administration is indeed allowed to fire federal workers at will: [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt2SXrTw-zfVWD1hE-ysjHATmTKDfxR_orYSD7Dk-FJuZ0UUrz12hMFSojRCSZJoSNfdp5q1iXqBK7tBeu5XXvMZnhS0wN6vhMNHV6M5mooDxAItkqUf9XFSOFc9edZOb9ngI_Esqe752akaSNPXFNZXFgnvQQbAZohoF8Ob2-YqvBy-4Gldx9gC9MCsaXzU5fN4gkTFnPz3ruIGTmzuII3JjJ4Khhs35xbcLxOv0_cu0GHbBETPX2D77_aCRlVNfc/4i1/MTqscFlKQPa2zCt2IUqwsA/h0/h001.cGdzntdNLjJsc-EXhgtJw4fzgVoHbNO0aoURTc9VmWY) **Once again, the bought-and-paid-for MAGA Supreme Court has stepped in to let Trump act on his extreme, blatantly illegal agenda before the courts have weighed in.** When Trump got the keys to the Oval Office back, he wasted no time attempting to eliminate hundreds of thousands of government positions—from the VA to the Social Security Administration to the National Park Service. Lower courts stepped in to stay many of the firings and challenge their legality But now, the Supreme Court has given him the green light. **Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson warned that the ruling would allow the “mass employee terminations, widespread cancellation of federal programs and services, and the dismantling of much of the Federal Government as Congress has created it."** 1 It’s clear that the Roberts Court is determined to let the Trump administration implement as much of its agenda as possible. Why? **Because right-wing extremists spent decades and billions of dollars packing the Court for this exact reason.** Justice Sotomayor said it best this month: “The administration has the Supreme Court on speed dial.” **The MAGA Supreme Court justices aren’t beholden to the American people—they’re beholden to the right-wing extremists that got them their seats.** It’s up to us to take our democracy back and demand the Supreme Court work for us. [**United for Democracy is leading the fight to hold the MAGA Supreme Court justices accountable. Chip in today to power our efforts.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt2SXrTw-zfVWD1hE-ysjHAvQvY4alLPslxX-Drv_5zIHg2zoEuLlUFTtTe00jGBxD8e6YMotSQbyRwQyePmGw68tnTIEbA6kDGSmPHwKM9geilTlxttcVR11y70gN9OgmZVN3br6Yf9DWgF4ZvBANYPDmGwTMF9NJbLBVDMwXEMQgnqjPYybTUUDI2zajDCloXe_G99apRPC-r_XupaUGq18HE_bWFGtvr3BsKYjm5kvczo7vrwzaSsmOIhhdtQzA/4i1/MTqscFlKQPa2zCt2IUqwsA/h1/h001.VSLEZ0Rcpit4CIZVkoPJQp20Pv4nInVgVBRlh9vHdJo) Thank you for standing up for federal workers, Stasha Rhodes

subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth – Will You Stand with Me?
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMFygjAQhp8muckkm4TIIYcqkx5aHaf20PYWQihxiCBBqD59R2u57n67_ze_CV3jq4tCcoUAal9GBIDYEwI4fU6hPx_Cy_Ni-7bJF6d0G8RtC-sHOsIMH61x19X-snP1Iab5h96In2ykMz5cOjfDj9DEBeOb21TmuFSsKgnHTlEpgBIqmMS14qwwpuBpKa2QvFhmXFaECseIqYTjFnsFBASRJAMQQHmSGUEsSJuJwpliCYiTe05iguu9NTQOk-n7tg2JbQNuVD0MXbyLaQR66tvkeLaNO8e_M9sGBPqhjECPCPROL8f9O99fOWL6XhrLTynl6y_zCrhXZTf5pvExlYiT7_83eFTwGwAA__9Y3G5N)

| | | | [****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA)
[****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA) Dear Patriot,

I’m James O’Keefe, and I’m writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who’s poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that’s bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I’ve fought to expose the truth—about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It’s been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I’m asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O’Keefe Media Group****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what’s right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone—exposing NPR’s bias in 2011**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA).

I’d lie awake at night, wondering how I’d pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt—**Congress cut ACORN’s funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don’t like being exposed**, and they’ve been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu’s office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me—the Americans who deserved to know the truth—and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn’t stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government’s thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR’s CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me “one of the great journalists,” and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a “grand slam.”**

But every victory came with a cost—more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA)****.** We’re the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden’s daughter.**

They took my phones, my computers, everything—trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, “This is an attack on the First Amendment.” That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I’ve faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O’Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA)

Donate today.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsz7GOnDAQBuCnMR3IHmNYCopcECmiO0VJk1QnYw_gOwY4Y3azefrICG117e9vPPNrWifX32tWPjGA0dmNATD5hQF8_LmR39_o-7f05edzk34UL6TiK3w96RUeeDYa_z39uv_A8W0rmt_ts_pbXcWDh_uKD3wuzZC0m2JaNomtZW95nmAtSgWCCyXLZKwFL_JLwRXkKFEYCVhwbnWv8152-mITVwMHxUteASgQeVZpxQ2UplId6u4CLOfHnkwTeme02MJNe78slJmFkqkeQ1i347CWQbuh2T1meka7hCgYtMs7Yo-E1unBL_saIxpS77Z3tCle0d_D6OYhpS49Bphs90Cv27J7g0w2n2oGRUTx250OdCZG06rdMDPZUMeg0LTsc2CyAXWKgD5OAK8kvN68SHxt15ubJrcVJcv5cBSO9a41_A8AAP__k_aYAA)

There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll.

I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O’Keefe Media Group** , I’m building a legacy.

We’re not just reporting news—we’re training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we’re not done.

Y’all, make it make sense:

**Trump is the first convicted felon in American history to sit in the Oval Office... _yet he also claims to be the King of Law and Order?!_**

body:
What were they thinking?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111175273/556472834/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250709GOP_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzllZTM3OC0xODVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55dKTugh0o3bQa6QQ2hgxRxm6ntg1L0NBIpeNSFKkz4=) Peter,

Last week, Trump’s Big Ugly Bill became law. This bill will not only be detrimental to those in need but also to our economy as a whole, potentially costing Ohio over 40,000 jobs.

As Shontel has said, **_“This is what happens when you prioritize the wealthy over everyone else.”_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111175275/556472837/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250709GOP_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzllZTM3OC0xODVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55dKTugh0o3bQa6QQ2hgxRxm6ntg1L0NBIpeNSFKkz4=) According to the _Ohio Capital Journal_ , deep cuts made to Medicaid and SNAP will wipe out jobs, stifle state economies, and diminish tax revenues that state and local governments depend on. That’s not all: **This bill will “destroy 1.2 million jobs in the United States by 2029 and shrink state economies by $154 billion.”**

_What were Republicans thinking?_ They wanted to take away health care and food security for millions of Americans in order to give handouts to the megawealthy. The American people deserve better.

We need to hold Republicans accountable for pushing this bill at the behest of our wannabe king. Let’s send this message loud and clear: Come after our families; we’re coming after your seats.

Greece Is the Word

As Texas flooded, Cruzin' Ted was spending summer nights on the Aegean
Sea. He claims he raced back faster than Greased Lightnin', but flight
records say otherwise. Teddy, my love: When you croon "hopelessly
devoted to you," it shouldn't be in the mirror.

by Maureen Dowd
### **DAVID SHUSTER VIDEO, EXCLUSIVELY FOR YOU!**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a5140606-3281-4ec2-b0a8-e599e9d4ebe6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4f6273bf-b80c-4e52-96a1-d76de5ee2f01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Trump's kill bill will strip 14 million Americans of access to
healthcare care. Here's why our top story today is something a
neo-Nazi sent us about a college application from 15 years ago.
### **Call Your Doctor --RFK's Anti-Vax Coup Means Your Kids' Vaccines May Be Out of Reach**
by Matt Robison
_A stealthy cabal of wingnuts is putting children 's health in danger_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4f7081a8-a5aa-4f67-98bc-4fbc3364707a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At a recent routine checkup, our pediatrician had a surprise: our son was going to get an unexpected shot. He's at the youngest end of the recommended age range for this particular vaccine, and our doctor wanted him to get it immediately. Not because he's at imminent medical risk, but because he's at imminent political risk.
"I'm doing this with all my patients," he told us. "Because if we wait until the next visit, your insurance might not cover it anymore."
For those paying attention, there's a flashing red signal going off for the 63 million American parents of school-age children: get your kids their vaccines now, because soon you might not be able to.
The anti-vaccine movement has long simmered in the background of public consciousness, like a virus lurking in a sweltering jungle. Vaccine skeptics would periodically spring forth to spread misinformation and harass state legislators, but achieved mostly mischief, public confusion, and aggravation.
(When I was a state legislative staffer, I would occasionally hear from the head of the local anti-vaccine group, an earnest, disarmingly pleasant woman who kindly remembered my children's names and never changed a single state senator's mind).
Vigilant doctors and public health experts in charge of government policy mostly kept the anti-vaxxers relegated to the darker corners of medical discussion. And later, to the backwaters of social media.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9c11a6f8-7b38-4be2-b457-ef8e2a832d7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But the pandemic era created fertile ground to sow public doubt about whether the medical establishment was being fully forthcoming. With Democrats' slow-footedness on easing COVID-19 restrictions and then-President Donald Trump's political weaponization of public frustration, the new openness to doubting science was a lifeline that pulled vaccine activists from the far fringes.
From their strengthened position, in recent months the anti-vax cabal made its big move, executing a silent coup at the pinnacle of our medical establishment.
`Full Blue Amp Subscription For Just .26/Day!`
_**Get The Truth corporate media ignores from a former Biden ad man & former Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor who know and will tell What Is Really Going On.**_
_**And support our new *Soundcheck Fund* to help fund & promote independent media!**_
_**Amplify Good. Support Indy Media!**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_._cv6uPmlwLt-Pf_4ARCgCs5AqOcQVAablXc1KPT9SrE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167908332)
First, despite Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s assurances during his confirmation hearing to become U.S. secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS) that he would leave the government's process for reviewing and recommending vaccines alone, a mere four months later he fired all the members of the panel that advises the Centers for Disease Control (CDC) on how to use vaccines and replaced them with anti-vaccine conspiracy theorists.
Second, he immediately convened that group to get them to end--in contradiction of all known science--the use of the preservative thimerosal in flu shots. This was telling because studies have repeatedly shown no link between thimerosal and autism (as anti-vaxxers allege) or any other medical harm.
Coincidentally, those studies were abruptly removed from the Centers for Disease Control website.
One of the committee members even acknowledged the medical findings, but said they had to act because misinformed people might fear harms anyway. Side note: if you thought the role of public health officials was to explain good science so that the public doesn't act on bad science, welcome to the upside-down of RFK-world, where the government's job is now to endorse non-scientists' gut feelings and stoke public fear.
Next, the CDC will announce that if you spill salt you should throw a pinch over your shoulder, because, ya know, demons.
Third--and this is the part that parents really need to pay attention to--RFK, Jr. finally said aloud what's he's clearly been itching to say for years: on top of his earlier announcement that the vaccine board would be revisiting the schedule for when vaccines are given, he actually wants to re-examine the use of all the childhood vaccines.
Period.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a91ddaf7-2dda-4f1d-a96d-3847ce68b65b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The board's recommendations determine vaccine insurance coverage for 55 million American kids. Affordability and coverage significantly affect how many kids get vaccinated.
If they change the schedule or drop a vaccine, you lose coverage. Less coverage means less vaccination. Less vaccination means more sick and dying children.
**We are now on the cusp of retrograde wingnuts achieving a stealth demolition of American vaccine policy.** All it took was six months for a celebrated conspiracy theorist who does not even believe that germs cause disease to lie to gullible Republican senators about his plans.
And sack the people in charge of determining who gets what vaccines. Open the citadel gates to anti-science diehards who--surprise--openly admit that they don't intend to use science in making decisions. And, finally, announce that he's coming for all of our kids' vaccines next.
It's bad enough that the Republican budget that Trump just signed into law will gut health care coverage for millions of American children. If RFK has his way, even if you still have coverage, you may not be able to afford the shots that your doctor wants to give.
Our pediatrician took the earliest possible chance to get my son his vaccine. Parents should call their doctor to find out what shots their kids should get--while they still can.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4f6273bf-b80c-4e52-96a1-d76de5ee2f01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

subject: The truth is in the numbers

body:
The numbers don’t lie. This will, once again, be one of the most competitive swing districts in the country, and could very well hold the key to the Democratic House Majority. With so much on the line, we absolutely can’t afford to fall short next November.

name: Team Crow
subject: Grassroots donors power this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Jason Crow is fighting in Congress to make life more affordable for families — whether it’s lowering the cost of health care, expanding access to child care, or ensuring everyone has a safe, affordable place to live.

But while Jason works to deliver for the people he serves, his Republican colleagues are doing the opposite. They just rammed through Trump’s budget bill to slash Medicaid, rip away SNAP benefits, and give handouts to their ultra-wealthy donors while working families are just trying to stay afloat.

Jason knows what’s at stake, and he’s not backing down.

But to keep up this fight, he’s relying on grassroots support from people like you.

Will you start a monthly contribution today to power Jason’s work for affordable, people-first policies? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025?recurring=true]

MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025?recurring=true]

Monthly giving is one of the most impactful ways to support our campaign. It helps us plan ahead, organize early, and stay focused on what really matters: fighting for you.

Thanks for pitching in,

Team Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States

Jason knows what’s at stake, and he’s not backing down. But to keep up this fight, he’s relying on grassroots support from people like you. Will you start a monthly contribution today to power Jason’s work for affordable, people-first policies? [] MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION [] Monthly giving is one of the most impactful ways to support our campaign. It helps us plan ahead, organize early, and stay focused on what really matters: fighting for you. Thanks for pitching in, Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111176133/556475685/-2102056427?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTI1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjhlMWFhZS0xYzVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNX-EF5MxTdkyEAT4DMjurdamw3B2suOrJ4wA8xp_DE=&emci=18443e12-115d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0b8e1aae-1c5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7748243)
---
Dear Friends,

It’s been over three weeks since Speaker Emerita Melissa Hortman and her husband Mark Hortman were assassinated in their homes, and our lives changed forever. On the same night, Senator John Hoffman and his wife Yvette were shot and gravely injured, and still others were violently stalked and threatened.

It’s impossible to sugar coat this—the last few weeks have been some of the hardest DFLers have ever been through. House DFLers lost our Speaker, our team captain, our friend.

This immeasurable loss comes in the middle of a year that was already historically challenging. After attempting an illegal power grab early in session, Republicans stalled Minnesota’s budget until they could take away health care from thousands. And now President Trump is taking food assistance and health care away from millions of Americans to pay for tax giveaways to billionaires.

**House DFLers are committed to winning back a House majority** to push back against attacks on our health care, and to lower the cost of living for hard-working families by saving you money on housing, child care, and daily essentials. It's what Minnesota needs us to do. It’s the right thing to do. It’s what the Speaker Emerita would expect us to do.

We can do it, but only if we work together. We’ll have more to share soon, but to stay updated, [**please visit our website.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111176134/556475694/-166699110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTI1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjhlMWFhZS0xYzVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNX-EF5MxTdkyEAT4DMjurdamw3B2suOrJ4wA8xp_DE=&emci=18443e12-115d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0b8e1aae-1c5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7748243)

---
Derek, **FIRST:** Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans unveiled their “Big Beautiful Bill,” which includes the largest cut to health care and food assistance in American history. **THEN:** Congressional Republicans held back-to-back marathon voting sessions to pass it and give the ultra-wealthy $1.7 trillion in tax cuts. **NOW:** It’s up to us to send a message to Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans. **Derek, poll after poll shows that Americans overwhelmingly disapprove of this bill, and we won’t stand idly by while it becomes law: We’re organizing earlier than ever to kick Republicans who voted against their constituents out of office.** [**Chip in now to support the DNC’s work to organize nationwide, hold Republicans accountable for this disastrous bill, and win back Congress →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250709_3906_fr&refcode2=3906_22930333_8UJAXW&akid=3906%2E22930333%2E8UJAXW) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250709_3906_fr&refcode2=3906_22930333_8UJAXW&akid=3906%2E22930333%2E8UJAXW)**

The Democrats
