name: John Fetterman
subject: Trump loves a culture war to try to distract us 🤡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hey, Derek, it's John.

So many stupid things happened last week, but I wanted to reach out to make sure you saw something that might've flown under the radar.

To distract from the bullsh*t budget he signed into law last Friday, Trump also spent time bullying trans folks. 🤡

He's been trying to draw attention away from the fact that he's ripping health care away from 17 million people to pay for tax cuts for the rich, so he's holding funding hostage here and there to get everyone to gang up on trans athletes. It's just wrong.

I support the trans community, especially trans folks in PA. That isn't being "woke." It’s being decent. It's respecting every person – *including* folks in the LGBTQIA+ community.

👉 I won’t back down while Trump tries to bully trans folks to wage his culture wars. If you agree that we should leave our trans friends and neighbors the hell alone, will you sign my petition now?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51396?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1001&akid=10193%2E434096%2EUs525l

As a former college offensive tackle, I know how hard student athletes work in the gym, on the field, or in the pool to prep for that next game or race. I know how hard these young people work to balance their sports and their schoolwork.

Believe me, it's not for the faint of heart.

So it's nothing short of ridiculous to see Trump and Republicans throwing these folks under the bus.

Banning trans students from sports doesn't do anything except make our schools more hateful and divisive.

And now, almost as if Trump planned it himself, two cases about trans athletes' ability to play in college sports are headed to the Supreme Court. So the clock has started.

My team and I launched this petition, and we want to get 10,000 signatures by midnight to show our trans friends and neighbors that we got their backs. Will you take 10 seconds to sign now?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51396?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1002&akid=10193%2E434096%2EUs525l

Thanks for signing,

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1003&akid=10193%2E434096%2EUs525l

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=10193%2E434096%2EUs525l

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: we need to respond to this NOW, Peter

Trump has declared war on ActBlue — and on all of us. This is how authoritarians tighten their grip. We need to fight back right now. Chip in ANY amount you can right away >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=070925_4]
Peter, what Trump just did should terrify every single person who believes in democracy.
He issued an Executive Order weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after ActBlue — the small-dollar fundraising platform that powers thousands of Democratic campaigns across the country.
Why? Because he’s terrified of us.
He knows grassroots Democrats are his biggest threat — and he’s trying to meddle with our ability to fight back before the election even begins.
This is how authoritarians seize power:
1️⃣ They discredit elections.
2️⃣ They silence the media.
3️⃣ And then — they come for the money.
Trump is officially coming for the money. This is an all hands on deck moment.
This is a targeted, strategic assault on the tools we use to organize, fundraise, and win. We MUST overwhelm him with IMMEDIATE resistance. Rush a donation right now to defend ActBlue, defend grassroots power, and defend our democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=070925_4]

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. name: Team Lizzie
subject: Trump and Texas Republicans Move Forward Redistricting Plot TODAY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
BREAKING : Texas Governor Greg Abbott has announced a special legislative session for later this month—and today he added redrawing the state’s Congressional districts to the agenda:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250709?refcode=lpfe250709 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250709?refcode=lpfe250709]
DONATE TO FIGHT BACK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250709?refcode=lpfe250709]
Donald Trump wants Texas Republicans to redraw Texas’ congressional maps—a brazen, unconstitutional power grab aimed at protecting their hold on the House of Representatives and silencing the voices of Texas voters.
No matter what happens, we must be ready. Can you make a contribution today to help us prepare? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250709?refcode=lpfe250709]
Republicans know that they’re at risk of losing seats in the midterm elections. That’s why they’re trying to rig the system to carve out as many as five new GOP seats in Texas alone. That means eliminating five Democratic seats. But their scheme could backfire. Redistricting can cut both ways, and shifting district lines could end up threatening GOP seats, too.
We have an opportunity to show Donald Trump and Texas Republicans that Texans won’t stand for more partisan gerrymandering and that we’re ready to defend leaders like Lizzie who fight for our communities and our values in Congress.
We can win these battles if we prove that overwhelming support for Lizzie and candidates like her will shrink the Republican majority in Congress—not expand it. But that’s only possible if we have the resources to reach voters, fight back against misinformation, and run strong campaigns and candidates all across the state.
If you’re able, can you make a contribution to help us keep up the fight and stop Donald Trump and House Republicans from rigging the Texas congressional maps in their favor? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250709?refcode=lpfe250709]
Let’s remind the GOP that you don’t mess with Texas—or with our democracy.
Thanks,
Team Lizzie
